| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

---
| | |

Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Living in a Barbie World: Woke or Wonderful?
body:
Episode #17 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-r/) Hi Peter, I've got to say, this week's episode is one of my favorites so far of Unleashed. We're delving into the world of womanhood through the lens of two iconic figures, Barbie and Taylor Swift... probably not what you would expect from a conservative-leaning podcast.

When the Barbie movie was released a couple of weeks ago (the same week my three daughters also attended the infamous Taylor Swift Eras tour in Denver, more on that later), the little girl in me was so so excited. The woman in me was skeptical. Would Hollywood Barbie be "woke," or would it be wonderful? You might be surprised by my answer.What I loved about the Barbie movie was the real, raw look at womanhood. We grow up with dreams of a world where we can be ANYTHING, only to realize the system is still doing its damndest to keep us from those dreams and turn us into something we're not... I've lived that reality. As a young woman entrepreneur launching a franchise business in an industry dominated by men. As the only woman in the room as I was trying to raise capital for my business. As a mom of four kids that had to balance it ALL. As a political candidate for Governor, going up against an incredibly wealthy man who claimed he was the champion for women's rights. As a conservative woman, the most despised type of woman by so many.I think the Barbie movie challenges us to go back to our roots. To ditch the modern view of feminism and remember the ORIGINAL women's movement - where we fought together peacefully for one common purpose... WOMEN! It's being destroyed. I have three daughters - I will not stand by and watch all of our progress be wiped away.
### **Episode #17 - LIVING IN A BARBIE WORLD: WOKE OR WONDERFUL?**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-y/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-j/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-t/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-i/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-d/)_
## **WE WILL NOT CO-PARENT WITH THE GOVERNMENT!**
On my daughter's 14th birthday, I got a suspicious message from my pediatrician's office telling me I NO LONGER had access to any of her records or portal, except for billing. While the laws around this are fuzzy, this is a prime example of ways Polis and the Dems are leading the charge to pry away parents' rights here in Colorado. We will NOT co-parent with the government!It's no surprise most of you were just as shocked as I was. Check out the comment section on my [Instagram](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-h/) or head to [Twitter](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-k/) to see some of your responses! More on this to come... [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-b/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-n/) Have a great week, folks!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-p/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-a/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-aeijlt-66AAC70D-tkwdjuidt-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-aeijlt-tkwdjuidt-z/)
---

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

| | When you look at the problems in Washington, representatives like David Schweikert are at the core of them. **He will spend millions this cycle trying to make folks forget this. Still, he was co-founder****of the far-right Freedom Caucus** — a contingent of House Republicans who always rush to attack programs like Social Security and Medicare, push for government shutdowns, and uplift the most dangerous versions of MAGA politics. For over a decade, Schweikert has voted to hurt our economy, aligned himself with extremists, and chosen obstruction over action. **He even voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election.** [**He's disgraced Arizona long enough. Join the movement to defeat him!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553531/420074027/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-03-schweikert&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9bba3aee-5b32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJiYTNhZWUtNWIzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6uZqSW6kSMboxf48rgg5RP_gQ6ao1C8K9smiHFrfSYc=) **[Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553532/420074029/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-03-schweikert&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9bba3aee-5b32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJiYTNhZWUtNWIzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6uZqSW6kSMboxf48rgg5RP_gQ6ao1C8K9smiHFrfSYc=)** Democrats need to nominate a candidate in 2024 who can take the fight to Schweikert, speak to local concerns (the issues he's ignored), and run a campaign that can go toe-to-toe on the airwaves with the super PACs that Schweikert will call on to bail him out. [**With your help, I will be this candidate. Will you pitch in $3 today to help me get my message out across AZ-01 and introduce myself to voters? Together, we can flip this seat from red to blue and begin to restore sanity to the House of Representatives.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553533/420074030/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-03-schweikert&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9bba3aee-5b32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJiYTNhZWUtNWIzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6uZqSW6kSMboxf48rgg5RP_gQ6ao1C8K9smiHFrfSYc=) **[Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553534/420074038/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-03-schweikert&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9bba3aee-5b32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJiYTNhZWUtNWIzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6uZqSW6kSMboxf48rgg5RP_gQ6ao1C8K9smiHFrfSYc=)** Arizona's 1st Congressional District has changed a lot in recent years – it's gone from a district that Republicans like John McCain carried by double-digits to a district that was essentially 50-50 in the last election. **But David Schweikert**** _hasn't_****changed.** He's still the guy who votes to dismantle healthcare, who opposes a woman's right to choose, who puts people's retirement security on the chopping block, who refuses to get serious about gun safety, and who won't lift a finger to address the growing water crisis that Arizonans face. We need to build a campaign that can expose Schweikert's record and make the case for new leadership in District 1 and we need grassroots supporters like you with us for that to happen. [**So I'm asking: please chip in $3 and be one of 500 founding donors during our launch week. clean_body: He votes to hurt our economy and throws his lot in with extremists. | | | | When you look at the problems in Washington, representatives like David Schweikert are at the core of them. He will spend millions this cycle trying to make folks forget this. Still, he was co-founderof the far-right Freedom Caucus — a contingent of House Republicans who always rush to attack programs like Social Security and Medicare, push for government shutdowns, and uplift the most dangerous versions of MAGA politics. For over a decade, Schweikert has voted to hurt our economy, aligned himself with extremists, and chosen obstruction over action. He even voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election. = = Democrats need to nominate a candidate in 2024 who can take the fight to Schweikert, speak to local concerns (the issues he's ignored), and run a campaign that can go toe-to-toe on the airwaves with the super PACs that Schweikert will call on to bail him out. = = Arizona's 1st Congressional District has changed a lot in recent years – it's gone from a district that Republicans like John McCain carried by double-digits to a district that was essentially 50-50 in the last election. But David Schweikert hasn'tchanged. He's still the guy who votes to dismantle healthcare, who opposes a woman's right to choose, who puts people's retirement security on the chopping block, who refuses to get serious about gun safety, and who won't lift a finger to address the growing water crisis that Arizonans face. We need to build a campaign that can expose Schweikert's record and make the case for new leadership in District 1 and we need grassroots supporters like you with us for that to happen. = Humbly, Conor ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Conor for AZ. |

name: Tina Smith
subject: Your responses mean a lot to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I wish I could meet each and every one of you in person — in the meanwhile, my team and I put together this Priorities Survey so I can hear what’s on your mind! |
#
Hi folks! The Senate is in August recess, which means that throughout the month, I’ll be traveling across our great state meeting with small business owners, community leaders, students, and working families. At every stop and meeting, I make sure I hear from Minnesotans about what’s on their mind and what matters most to them. Sometimes, it makes me late for my next meeting (sorry to my team!), but nothing means more to me than connecting with voters. I wish I could meet each and every one of you in person — in the meanwhile, my team and I put together this Priorities Survey so I can hear what’s on your mind! **[Please, take a moment to fill out our August Survey so my team and I are addressing your top priorities. It will take just a few minutes to fill out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553634/420081760/1738202373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20230803_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVkZGVjMi01ZTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJggdL57-2S-3G5l30eWwDg1x0o61RIO2hfPwzAgv1k=&emci=055ddec2-5e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=085ddec2-5e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67553635/420081761/1738202373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC60_20230803_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVkZGVjMi01ZTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJggdL57-2S-3G5l30eWwDg1x0o61RIO2hfPwzAgv1k=&emci=055ddec2-5e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=085ddec2-5e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932)

Your responses mean a lot to me — so thanks for taking the time to share.
I hope to see you soon — hopefully, I’ll see lots of you at the fair!
— Tina

name: Katie Porter
subject: How to whiteboard anything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I carry a whiteboard in my purse because you never know when good oversight will be needed.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27605%2E3422442%2ETaZzVQ)
As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural.
It ended up being an incredibly useful tool for breaking down the math behind all sorts of issues, and helped me connect Washington with the lives of my constituents.
You too, can whiteboard anyone, at any time. Here’s how to do it:
1. **Work backward:** Determine what you want your lesson to accomplish.
2. **Let the whiteboard speak for itself:** It’s a visually engaging tool, so utilize it. Draw a chart or graph. Hold off on simple bullet points.
3. **Control the conversation:** In Congressional Hearings, we only have a few minutes to question a witness. That means really utilizing your questions.
4. **Don't fear silence:** No explanation needed.
5. **Be fearless:** Accountability is a good thing.

I carry a whiteboard in my purse because you never know when good oversight will be needed. And if I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’ll serve on double the committees. **That means double the whiteboards, and most importantly—twice as many opportunities for accountability!**
[**_Chip in a few bucks to help send me and my whiteboard to the Senate._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230803-2?refcode=EMAK03_1_WHI_20230803_V1_F&refcode2=27605_3422442_TaZzVQ&akid=27605%2E3422442%2ETaZzVQ)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230803-2?refcode=EMAK03_1_WHI_20230803_V1_F&refcode2=27605_3422442_TaZzVQ&akid=27605%2E3422442%2ETaZzVQ)**
Thank you, Derek!
Katie
(the woman with the whiteboard)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230803-2?refcode=EMAK03_1_WHI_20230803_V1_F&refcode2=27605_3422442_TaZzVQ&akid=27605%2E3422442%2ETaZzVQ)

clean_body: I carry a whiteboard in my purse because you never know when good oversight will be needed. As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural. It ended up being an incredibly useful tool for breaking down the math behind all sorts of issues, and helped me connect Washington with the lives of my constituents. You too, can whiteboard anyone, at any time. Here’s how to do it: 1. Work backward: Determine what you want your lesson to accomplish. 2. Let the whiteboard speak for itself: It’s a visually engaging tool, so utilize it. Draw a chart or graph. Hold off on simple bullet points. 3. Control the conversation: In Congressional Hearings, we only have a few minutes to question a witness. That means really utilizing your questions. 4. Don't fear silence: No explanation needed. 5. Be fearless: Accountability is a good thing. I carry a whiteboard in my purse because you never know when good oversight will be needed. And if I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’ll serve on double the committees. That means double the whiteboards, and most importantly—twice as many opportunities for accountability! Thank you, Derek! Katie (the woman with the whiteboard) Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift
body:
In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66acfee7319e42bfba95ba78711e6013&_e=SpJ5t8dSDa87HhRCHOCkqAxwlkaqvXjMXWuT9q3PAMjPVS7WqwWpA3-gDoY3CeCc0qXzPxK_i17-ntLcXI-QHCqqowwQfbWPxpqPuLrzoMhTDdBxmwW7Q2gYoqM12PIQlQrUlXxf6hiN0vVBsGJxgvxjdskr1T8u2TG81bUUtJ3rHQiVl1jA9YzD9JdvaXumsX4nYAyyy57MmWBfRO3wEVC0CesIeqG2YCiGJK3pxwfMNJIKlEHtHJO-xNeELEvQk3uJxI-Z7UFd7XRICagTWCAQqoVT1Csm60GSPEhKo0V95Ps83ZtfcDvUsyNCUbf3)
---
| | |
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66acfee7319e42bfba95ba78711e6013&_e=SpJ5t8dSDa87HhRCHOCkqAxwlkaqvXjMXWuT9q3PAMjPVS7WqwWpA3-gDoY3CeCc0qXzPxK_i17-ntLcXI-QHCqqowwQfbWPxpqPuLrzoMhTDdBxmwW7Q2gYoqM12PIQlQrUlXxf6hiN0vVBsGJxgvxjdskr1T8u2TG81bUUtJ2X2o4dIuFUiTS8D-VGy1pozky26B2oZ-57xadhG8LETrAE6lzUwQ5wdYNATqoaVGGCVRI1xhSqeTecReqc8AwB1_MvZqVd9NhvGdFXWjtJfFc60Ewc8Vd3673Z2XQnPMuAnYmHmw2xrwwCV8BMj8jr)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

| | Friend,

---
This is truly a dark day for our country...
---
My father has been officially ARRAIGNED right in the belly of the beast – the D.C. Swamp – despite having committed NO CRIME._
_
---
He is an innocent man, plain and simple.

---
His only offenses were to cast out the globalists and communists in our government, to challenge the corrupt ruling class in Washington, to BEAT the radical Left, and to put _YOU_ – the America people – FIRST.

---
And for that, Crooked Joe Biden and the Deep State are seeking to throw my father in JAIL for _6 LIFETIMES_.

---
**As of about 4:30 P.M. today, America took another step closer to total tyranny under Joe Biden.**

---
The Left knows they can’t beat us in 2024, and they know that they can’t stop the greatest political movement in history, so the ruling party is attempting to IMPRISON its leading opposition.

---
_But, my father will be the first to tell you to NEVER give up._

---
In 2024, We The People will peacefully band together to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

And to show the President just how many Americans had his back – and America’s back – on this dark day, we want to share with him one FINAL list of donors who stepped up to peacefully DEFEND our movement when it mattered most. Nothing would energize him more today than to see all of the love that he’s received from patriots all across the country. | | You have to ask yourself: why is the Left going to such incredible lengths to try and stop President Trump? Because they know that President Trump is the ONLY candidate who can’t be bought, bullied, or controlled. We just watched President Trump march straight into the belly of the beast of the Washington Swamp today. You can be certain that he will ALWAYS have the courage to STAND UP FOR YOU. His only offenses were to cast out the globalists and communists in our government, to challenge the corrupt ruling class in Washington, to BEAT the radical Left, and to put YOU – the America people – FIRST. And for that, Crooked Joe Biden and the Deep State are seeking to throw my father in JAIL for 6 LIFETIMES. The Left knows they can’t beat us in 2024, and they know that they can’t stop the greatest political movement in history, so the ruling party is attempting to IMPRISON its leading opposition. But, my father will be the first to tell you to NEVER give up. In 2024, We The People will peacefully band together to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! name: Tom Fitton
subject: Breaking News…We’re Holding Hunter Biden Accountable!
body:
We forced the release of stunning records from the U.S. Air Force Academy that address Critical Race Theory, as well as "white privilege" and Black Lives Matter.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Last Friday, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice regarding the Internal Revenue Service investigation of Hunter Biden.
Evidence shows that the Justice Department obstructed this IRS criminal investigation, which also implicated President Joe Biden!
The Biden administration is doing all it can to spare President Biden's son from punishment for his crimes and any further damaging revelations about his sleazy overseas influence-peddling schemes which may have _enriched his father, and endangered our national security_.
And on top of _that_ scandal, the Justice Department has been violating federal FOIA law by stonewalling Judicial Watch's lawful open records requests to access IRS records related to that investigation... _records that the American people have a right to see_.
[That's why we sued them_...and it's why I ask you to give us your support.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Stunning recent testimony by two IRS whistleblowers before the House Oversight Committee detailed how the Garland Justice Department obstructed their criminal investigation of Hunter Biden and other members of the Biden family, _including the president_.

This testimony occurred shortly before a judge in Delaware refused to accept a sweetheart plea deal brokered by Hunter Biden's lawyers and the Justice Department...and no wonder!

As one of the IRS whistleblowers, Joseph Ziegler, testified before the Oversight Committee:

"**_If the Delaware U.S. Attorney David Weiss followed DOJ policy as he stated in his most recent letter, Hunter Biden should have been charged with a tax felony, and not only the tax misdemeanor charge. We need to treat each taxpayer equally under the law_**.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

This is a textbook case of the liberal Washington Establishment protecting one of its own...and it is also _more_ evidence of wrongdoing by the Biden family, trading on Joe Biden's office and influence.

Judicial Watch has been "on the case" of Biden family corruption orchestrated by Hunter Biden since 2020, and nowwe need you to join with us and keep to keep the pressure on!

We are pursuing multiple federal lawsuits related to Hunter Biden and Biden family influence peddling, and our litigation has already forced the release of State Department records about allegations of Biden corruption in Ukraine.

Others _complain_ about Biden family corruption and stonewalling...

**[...but while others _talk_ , we use the legal system and the courts to deliver real results!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

With your help, we will _keep breaking through the veil of secrecy_ the Biden administration is using to protect Joe and Hunter Biden, _we will provide_ the American people with records and documents they have a right to see, and _we will hold_ the Bidens accountable under the law!

Thank you for joining with Judicial Watch and helping us fight for the principle that “no one is above the law.”

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64454&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Thousands have gotten their copy -- will you claim yours?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you. **I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book,_How We Win!_** Thousands of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.-iqNMjilKtCzIw)
---
| | **That's right -_ANY AMOUNT!_ Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of shipping.** [**Click here to get yours before we run out of copies!**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Until now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make gifts of $100 or more. But frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that selective. As far as I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little -- even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I need to get this valuable book into your hands. [**If that's you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.**](http://trk.libertyledger.) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. You see, after _ELEVEN YEARS_ at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ criss-crossing the country... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... **... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.** We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** But to do it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to arm you with this book today.
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
And remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. [**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.**](http://trk.libertyledger.-_rtVOwCg)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Please, don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right. Claim your copy of _How We Win_ today and help us secure victories for American Greatness! For America,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._lZBF4YOg)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjE2LWY5ZTY5NWYzYWU2NDRmNDJiZGIzNzEzNTkzNjQ0NDE5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/O60rEYJwigcAMsb7foj3Ng) to unsubscribe.

subject: We lost you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3a62aibpj4o1v5gprcpdnilevpope4c0nunrkf8_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmcoj5cph2bs)
---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv1qjusr2rhgl9ao69msekem6isq5bhm29jue4c0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmcoj6cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlfqb5dchvrbk5ki5sf5qp1i46qhqghk3dqg0mjg_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmcoj6cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zptf2su3p0iklgv97ue63pjjg292bf5j9gvf1rh8_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmcoj6cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0a8g7nkjrmvpjhajdu6k6ne0fedol6qedb14ls8_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmcoj6cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

subject: We lost you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---

---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can't do it without you. Renew your membership before it's too late](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn38olm99tlgeq5ttapg7j31ib63rtnlb59dqd7g_rp22sh2s8i66p74chgmao32c5h2bs "We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your response will only take a few minutes
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb663tm38i91gqembac7k3pd89ki90fpevpv1j6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65splm9o7cppledo68oj76lj68s3lmpp6eob5mup76tdmc5hmap1me8qn9dr0cqo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm2phgmiqr4ptmchj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9p34clgm0ob2c8iv0)

| | |
---
| *Sponsored Message* | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmalcgaviuk0s953sj2felqk2k8bn35h11389st0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chim2o31c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z33te70ji3k26usui2m49dk79pfck09os3q3606o_rp22sh2s8i66p74chim2o31c9h2bs) [NO](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zir42rah8gn9d6j39ev2cff6m5ph68c4f9q10mso_rp22sh2s8i66p74chim2o31c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

That is why I’m reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu7sigdohvn4gv4au8eg8kpbvi9vm6cs978csmqo_rp22sh2s8i66p74chim2o31c9h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention—and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

## Trump Pleads Not Guilty in D.C. Court
Donald Trump pleaded not guilty in federal court Thursday to four charges of obstruction and conspiracy related to the events of Jan. 6, later calling it ["a persecution of a political opponent.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQAL8Gd1iwYDgXFK9xd69NaWFY7jbCYGFyVv4-ytWppphmNB_39e4pU3n89zu6nurqQ6cXruLGNQe1whBdQgRUAzppZim11coOT2fsDcCAAoxbSib6CWYMBqdkJzsDDuRAgBI3ocWsLKgRNpRywwk0bjJMimmBkXpt42el0p-Y8nd9YRtD3Yfsnr0fJ1P_GCwMluu6xrKFgtf56xksR83UKZwMlliLz5H39rUfDJY3uW_N06Ng5FQihY6RgwDBMWPoVAtvofjZWquH5uJxUc50Gsu0eOye8rui__nkJwAA___aG2Oz)" Prosecutors requested an early trial date, and [Trump's lawyers protested](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGnwQwLGhQNCC4xm0svtBBa7SkUSpjx5u23duON_-Sv799jfjiKdG5_3YG2rml2vtIbZzFwzUHN0AS7IgKqBq3sRym10co0u3WdWLTvRwfDIEMfwKxu7Myy-iC0MENDFgQoMQgtRmVAtbCglAt2oHGRvlNMCwxU09U-E511xzV-0huv1qejiXavNRem_jCYGEz3fbdr-n_iXb47gymnSJV8YTDV63VkniO6UPiZKt9eFOuH-91dGxZeMnpykfv0OgtG_nQn73m-0oLNZUO-KUYqvWFabIej-HNQf_X4CgAA__-yWGPj), asking for more time to prepare their case. They pointed out the prosecution has been investigating for 3-1/2 years, and Trump's team only saw the charges this week. Trump was fingerprinted during the arraignment, but as in his other cases, [no mug shot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uwyAURp8Gb7bwhRh7YOjiLV07WoCvbSp-IrgJ6ttX6dzt03eGo_N13-7GB5_OTxNR05E348i_cONzL3sQG3S7PhABRYd6nJZxlEoK1V3aod2VnSXCIbkTs5oWMR3WgrVuxsV0XgMHwWcu-SIUiAEsjqPFG0i0o7sJJjnunnIZvrNPdOERfvILy-By7IK-iB6ViQ8GK4O1tTY4WxO2-uYM1vdksFJ5xkdvSjH-TBET9c3URO8HK-Hep9zH51mvTAzWruj90XwIvk6KSX5G48OfkP7N_w0AAP__ty5eLg) was taken out of deference to his presidency. ## Anheuser-Busch Reports Steep U.S. Revenue Drop
Anheuser-Busch reported Thursday that overall sales [dropped 10%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGupCAUgOGnwQ4D5zAiBcVuNnaz7ZYG9DieDYoRnMm8_c3c-tZf8-f_dx_vgRPvj79hI1-XPIap8pNG1UsjAUdoZr8QAWFDXndOa2MN2mb1VncIFlRc0LoJjOqUA9v3ASD2xmHDHhSg6pVRDi1gC5G0jnQDQ1FPNxRG0cw1n-3_zHtdaUnv_KSznfLWJL_WehSBvwQMAoYQp51epX3kDwsYfl-FdyrlY_tKV6FTxqtMqzzOvHCVR7q2jWqRqORVZNh4lvGaBQyl5vMtcOBZ4B-ttOs1OmhOPx8vTolLZ4VRjy1w-m6pP575CgAA__-K8mLd) in the U.S. over the past three months compared to the same period last year, primarily due to the unprecedented drop-off in Bud Light sales. Core profits in the U.S. for Anheuser-Busch fell 27%, according to the company's first quarterly report since the Bud Light fiasco. However, A-B's [strength in overseas markets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1qwzAUhZ9G3mSkKyVyBg1dvKVrR6Of6_gW2QrWbUzevrhzl8OBA4eP7-s-3QMV2h6fYUXPc51CYnrhpAZpJZgJuuxnREDTodfXm9bWWeO6xRs75IQ2OA3g5hDSHF3IECDCoKzRHXlQYNSgrLoZB6aHiFpHvIDFqNPFCKswE9e9_6608YJzedcX7n2qa1f8wvxswnwIGAWMx3H0aYvpHAWM57WAUQ1nnC3-ZFnosbCsx4a7DFHSFvElIwZucq47ptC4yYztSYwy1neqzP3Ca-l2n58HlULt6oRVjzVQ-cPgf6X8BgAA__9tXmMQ) gave it 7.2% global revenue growth overall. The stock remained generally flat Thursday on the news, closing at $57 a share. The day before the infamous promotion featuring a trans influencer, the stock stood at $67.
## Home Depot Hit By Revolving-Door Scam
A Connecticut man conned Home Depot out of nearly $300,000 by picking up expensive doors at one end of the store and then returning them for store credit at the other end [without stopping to pay in between](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7hzBLnhxQfGadHntlRYL65gTDpbNJbq_P-XqK0dTjDQft_kWcsmP-_-wiW9LnUNs-SmzcoMZAGfok19EQLAXr8dJa0MGqV89xrBwFNBsU3A0EU_JxjQFpoW00n32oACVU0ZNSIAXYNGaxYIR1tFiZ5Sk3Opx-az50VZZynd9ynGJdeuLX1vbzw7_dXDt4Br2h7zOt3rD0XIs0sF1rZsMSfbahlTrMSxH-EqDiLU8ji4FNEyCgsRMlhy6wNZhf_i0v3Ip-RypM-q-hVx-s-3PCT8BAAD___tyXKs).

The man, Alexandre Costa-Mota, 26, posed as a contractor to load doors onto a lumber cart, which he took to the service department for a refund without a receipt. If the store refused, he took the doors with him to return at a different Home Depot.

In all, he hit Home Depots in [eight states over six months](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO5CAQRb8GZ1i4oP0IHGzirDfd0MJQNLXi0TLVbc3fj3riSa-udI7Ov_t-t5SoPP7ajCuHulvH9MZdzdJI0Dt0fg2IgLrDdRiXYTCT0VMXV62PA4YR_WKD8Xacgw5LmKbZG-XQm45WUKDVrIxa9AS6hwOH4cAbGDwGd9PCKPTE9ez_VyocMaSv-sazdzV3aY3Mzyb0HwGbgO26rj7b1hK98XMQsBW8moDtQxGwqVnA5mopMtsiqXhyjF5SkZ8RHVMt8iKOMr8Sk2xsGWWsGaXHZ2XpMZz25ak8ZHMRM_aRc-rO1T8vSonaOAmjHtlS-jHkX3t9BwAA__-ZaG6D). He's charged with multi-state wire fraud and conspiracy.

clean_body: Donald Trump pleaded not guilty in federal court Thursday to four charges of obstruction and conspiracy related to the events of Jan. 6, later calling it “a persecution of a political opponent.” | | | | | | FRIday, August 4, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1790, Alexander Hamilton established the Revenue Marine Service, largely forgotten today. But in 1915, it became the very well-known U.S. Coast Guard. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Trump Pleads Not Guilty in D.C. Court Donald Trump pleaded not guilty in federal court Thursday to four charges of obstruction and conspiracy related to the events of Jan. 6, later calling it " Prosecutors requested an early trial date, and , asking for more time to prepare their case. They pointed out the prosecution has been investigating for 3-1/2 years, and Trump's team only saw the charges this week. Trump was fingerprinted during the arraignment, but as in his other cases, was taken out of deference to his presidency. His next court appearance is set for Aug. 28, when a trial date could be set. Anheuser-Busch Reports Steep U.S. Revenue Drop Anheuser-Busch reported Thursday that overall sales in the U.S. over the past three months compared to the same period last year, primarily due to the unprecedented drop-off in Bud Light sales. Core profits in the U.S. for Anheuser-Busch fell 27%, according to the company's first quarterly report since the Bud Light fiasco. However, A-B's gave it 7.2% global revenue growth overall. The stock remained generally flat Thursday on the news, closing at $57 a share. The day before the infamous promotion featuring a trans influencer, the stock stood at $67. Home Depot Hit By Revolving-Door Scam A Connecticut man conned Home Depot out of nearly $300,000 by picking up expensive doors at one end of the store and then returning them for store credit at the other end . The man, Alexandre Costa-Mota, 26, posed as a contractor to load doors onto a lumber cart, which he took to the service department for a refund without a receipt. If the store refused, he took the doors with him to return at a different Home Depot. In all, he hit Home Depots in . He's charged with multi-state wire fraud and conspiracy. Oh, and by the way, that's 50% off too! ➤ The world 's largest community of 3D-printed homes just unveiled its first completed house in Georgetown, Texas. Prospective buyers toured the neighborhood at its grand opening. () ➤ Astronomers say they've captured the moment when a 2021 solar storm simultaneously hit Earth, the moon, and Mars. It's the first time scientists measured a solar eruption on three planetary surfaces at once. () ➤ A pair of "ultra-rare" Apple sneakers sold at auction for $50,000. The sneakers were custom-made in 1986 for Apple employees attending a sales conference and never sold to the public. ()➤ A rollercoaster in Cedar Point, Ohio, got stuck at its highest point of 200 feet, forcing passengers to carefully walk down rickety metal steps with only a thin handrail for support. name: David Horowitz
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it 's true._ _ _ _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ** ** **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. ** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ - and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I'm asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=969e9df2050149aaae0c60683fb9d913&_e=dg-y5GjKB1Mrtt7x_wMROfdAFBoyhy_GOChPWE-VAuvP_2Zyu_Cd-IW8xn3ME5s32-DDA67nqJ___ci2sc13INlA-uIRScigEM-T0NEWellWlkovDCgi9dYwEM1NZTW03BnGVCYwSd7-1uzG3TzReSoHEBaI9M3ohzGoXvs2dTbEHNd1UOKI2YLYZ4ubJ3xXkZKGzGqJFghuhqzTNzF-gqAaSAdwPmNIl9YYHlgjNfem9c-NjbX5vhJKv9a_ooE3f7vAiV0vm3YtFXIsIe3ctW-3qE7Mq0ECcCKqkz0Om6q2RIX4sZ1EJqOWDWBtuuK3yxpaohx7c9QAG8L0iM5LuPXAm9zHrsSW4S0Z2e40sPOW3x1h47s362gUP2jT2dxHPXC-4GCtsJZQZUwKJ7bf2Q%3D%3D) And as a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **" A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza** ** ** **" The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin** ** ** **" David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=969e9df2050149aaae0c60683fb9d913&_e=dg-y5GjKB1Mrtt7x_wMROfdAFBoyhy_GOChPWE-VAuvP_2Zyu_Cd-IW8xn3ME5s32-DDA67nqJ___ci2sc13INlA-uIRScigEM-T0NEWellWlkovDCgi9dYwEM1NZTW03BnGVCYwSd7-1uzG3TzReSoHEBaI9M3ohzGoXvs2dTbEHNd1UOKI2YLYZ4ubJ3xXkZKGzGqJFghuhqzTNzF-gqAaSAdwPmNIl9YYHlgjNfem9c-NjbX5vhJKv9a_ooE3dhC5Q1hwuX7r3GqFAPxcqVIQxuqPsVvIUa9nd0eWeyHYUSRSCccQZ8MqGESAf-Tfsst5lAlHoVaet5sK2Ca3KUFTiQHPFNGEoq_cHUK-K3DZhCGtispQJVtHfC1x6bHDPNGK19cN9vHkWbXA61BnNg%3D%3D)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform [it]." **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. [**Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today** ,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=969e9df2050149aaae0c60683fb9d913&_e=dg-y5GjKB1Mrtt7x_wMROfdAFBoyhy_GOChPWE-VAuvP_2Zyu_Cd-IW8xn3ME5s32-DDA67nqJ___ci2sc13INlA-uIRScigEM-T0NEWellWlkovDCgi9dYwEM1NZTW03BnGVCYwSd7-1uzG3TzReSoHEBaI9M3ohzGoXvs2dTbEHNd1UOKI2YLYZ4ubJ3xXkZKGzGqJFghuhqzTNzF-gqAaSAdwPmNIl9YYHlgjNfem9c-NjbX5vhJKv9a_ooE3UZlTunfsLFTOeCaFYVJIY1gfONk5Tugu_U2zxaIOm60Fa0B2iMwtzkxipDujL0AaamzxM8QrsT6iooYC0scwd7gDcCGpiDBWZp2DzgpnSJBDjr2dSAQkRL7K4_bzLMLERYWa6TP_zQGb9O5HARB7Ew%3D%3D) and as a thank you for your generous support, I'll reserve a complimentary copy of my book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth.

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: We lost you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=307faaa9e9cb45dd9ebb191fc260fd5c&_e=kadI5NRHMMcBSvBeRqC1yGeJCxDOs-T1Uc0Gt8G5hdmmlExIwb889dOJyoPLguK5DNAupXWQjFf-AfvgFhFjpgKjQvDMdRPO2Y3vhMe4WQidWNQnQZhpGn62ZWxh4OopktpaGFsBVO2kgArvHX-BRH4Ez2-71PvaN76KWJPdz8a2xyqSKVQC02gkhwXuIf1AOn0yER070EZ8OOkUbK8MIIdQvaGnEteVB4Y8wgTV0b63ASYBaF0uB9ti-yZ8zwhCfCdHoOBgqaZCfT4H2WB7SZzB_9tEH3KDiaVym6fvU4uFX8GZRvlaQjUPlo-_lOf85IzfaI0ULEa809YXo84UeMHc-6-0lwDDvpODRDwRQUmcXzyCy6b1bcsV5PLA6Zgjq7wObZcQfyM5ReWGapSvNzn6mqrF_AWHQ6VRAIAa4MnZd7f9kvhBBUUqcxmqPghK)
---

name: Nalin Haley
subject: $5 Friday: Casting my vote for Nikki Haley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Happy Friday, Peter! I hope you’ve had a great week. Last week I was on the road with my Mom, and I must admit that her travel schedule is not for the faint of heart. But seeing her talk with voters and share her message makes it all worth it. Seeing my mom in action on the road brought back one of my early memories I have with her – https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80e1b8e777d985f1e78c25ed1964ce3593aa1723279c5a77879baefb94e4b706e119edfb6186b63d08ad98900e4fd7aa0af44a0c9621c538ab9d9f118f6c0146 The year was 2010, and I was walking hand-in-hand with my Mom as she stepped into the voting booth on Primary Election Day. She was running to be the next Governor of South Carolina. If she was nervous at all, she didn’t show it. She had a bigger smile on her face than I had ever seen before. Although I was young and didn’t quite understand the gravity of that moment, I could sense something big was happening. My Mom, on the other hand, never took a moment of that challenge for granted. I remember her taking it all in until I impatiently interrupted asking, "Are you ready, mommy?" To my surprise, she took my little hand and we punched the button that read, "Nikki Haley” together. I can still remember the immense pride we both felt walking out of the booth. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80e1b8e777d985f1e78c25ed1964ce3593aa1723279c5a77879baefb94e4b706e119edfb6186b63d08ad98900e4fd7aa0af44a0c9621c538ab9d9f118f6c0146 Now, fast forward 13 years later, I am counting down the days until I get to cast my vote for “ Nikki Haley for President.” With the first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses less than six months away, my Mom needs every ounce of your support. Whether this is your first $5 Friday or not, your participation today gives my Mom’s efforts the boost she needs to fund her campaign. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80e1b8e777d985f1e78c25ed1964ce3593aa1723279c5a77879baefb94e4b706e119edfb6186b63d08ad98900e4fd7aa0af44a0c9621c538ab9d9f118f6c0146 Can I count on you to take part in today's $5 Friday, so we can continue to build the momentum my Mom needs to win this election? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80e1b8e777d985f1e78c25ed1964ce3593aa1723279c5a77879baefb94e4b706e119edfb6186b63d08ad98900e4fd7aa0af44a0c9621c538ab9d9f118f6c0146 CHIP IN $5 Thank you in advance for giving whatever you can spare today. I hope you’ve had a great week. Last week I was on the road with my Mom, and I must admit that her travel schedule is not for the faint of heart. But seeing her talk with voters and share her message makes it all worth it. Seeing my mom in action on the road brought back one of my early memories I have with her – The year was 2010, and I was walking hand-in-hand with my Mom as she stepped into the voting booth on Primary Election Day. She was running to be the next Governor of South Carolina. If she was nervous at all, she didn’t show it. She had a bigger smile on her face than I had ever seen before. Although I was young and didn’t quite understand the gravity of that moment, I could sense something big was happening. My Mom, on the other hand, never took a moment of that challenge for granted. I remember her taking it all in until I impatiently interrupted asking, "Are you ready, mommy?" To my surprise, she took my little hand and we punched the button that read, "Nikki Haley” together. I can still remember the immense pride we both felt walking out of the booth. Now, fast forward 13 years later, I am counting down the days until I get to cast my vote for “ Nikki Haley for President.” With the first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses less than six months away, my Mom needs every ounce of your support. Whether this is your first $5 Friday or not, your participation today gives my Mom’s efforts the boost she needs to fund her campaign. Can I count on you to take part in today's $5 Friday, so we can continue to build the momentum my Mom needs to win this election? CHIP IN $5 Thank you in advance for giving whatever you can spare today. This would not be possible without each and every one of you. body:
With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast.

| | |
# **Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden's Tax Plans...**
---
|
---
| | With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast. His **tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement** investments.

And if you DON'T want to see [_**your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaf0c75bf8e04a80b52711b755cd65c0&_e=d1wKk54e36Hwo0i5dVdU02yHjwBr0AtxFisuMGtmIBcsD1l3YuCugc9WxrUkaNfoXJC6PctGpYAVORwkTFgu_0q00Ud8YsIiCU0Yy8FrLWd_bnN6Mm0g-BC5A4dfrZRh-wcLeVAe8WrUYhop8UWuxcA32GIZLSJc9ivpUUnGMIRXQ5xL2mdkWZCepx085N5SqUPVma620EZxdN1dxpnb3zhS6_re5JBr3epC0eVMJp8DskjizRSvzsYnld9qNKQi6vLjwzPc-P6XNiJXzj0HYAJOX25TACY3BkOsm8uOjTbYUuxexhVNNvxjOoJw1yeYlEuHq5tRYqXZYWoZ-P6Y7k9ykrD__5Z_ZmehHit5XfWHqC_SYXHNueqULAOikSb93FYP1iGS-AnACVG7FaCMyN2tOWX2nt_40POuzDeWpZZQ7eFNKeK0-w4EfSolnPwQj2Yo6tTiz3v17lGfNt5d-2d6ke2CTsq2QeKGQZgdFKQtbgD6b5TzsHRQ1nby65r2)...

You've got to move your money.

Now.

BEFORE he changes the laws.

Look, **Joe Biden has already said he 's making raising taxes a top priority**.

So make protecting what's yours a top priority, too.

Right now, but potentially not for much longer...

A **unique IRS loophole** lets you move your IRA, 401(k), pension, TSP, and savings accounts...

Into certain **tax-advantaged investments** that could protect you from Creepy Joe's greedy, grasping hands...

name: Taking the Hill
subject: The Veterans of the Congress
body:
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]
As we approach the 2024 election season, it is remains imperative that we support the men and women who have served our country in uniform that are now serving our country in a different way - in Congress.
These veterans have continued their commitment to public service by representing their communities with integrity and fighting for the livelihoods of their constituents in every corner of our nation.
Mikie Sherrill [https://www.mikiesherrill.com/] has served the 11th District since 2019 and continues to champion issues of national security, defense, and veterans’ affairs.
Pat Ryan [https://www.patryanforcongress.com/] has served New York's 18th District since earlier this year, spending his first term in Congress fighting for his constituents' foundational freedoms and funding public safety initiatives.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kpwcca2p3EA [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kpwcca2p3EA]
And Jeff Jackson [https://www.jeffjacksonnc.com/] , a freshman from North Carolina, has used his social media presence to inform North Carolina’s 14th District, as well as the entire country, of the progress he has made expanding Medicaid, increasing school funding, and standing up for women’s reproductive rights.
In 2024 we have the opportunity to extend this progress.
By donating to veterans currently in office, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill] you can play a critical role in ensuring that veterans’ voices continue to be heard.
If reelected, these veteran candidates can carry on demonstrating their leadership, commitment to service, and their strong understanding of the issues our nation faces.
We are working hard to ensure they can continue this work. We hope you will join us, too.
You can donate to the cause here:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill]
Yours in the fight,
Patrick J. Murphy
Founder, Taking the Hill
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill]
https://www.facebook.com/takingthehillpac [https://www.facebook.com/takingthehillpac] https://twitter.com/TTHpac [https://twitter.com/TTHpac] https://www.instagram.com/takingthehillpac/ [https://www.instagram.com/takingthehillpac/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/taking-the-hill/?viewAsMember=true [https://www.linkedin.com/company/taking-the-hill/?viewAsMember=true]
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]

Taking the Hill
499 S Capitol St SW
Washington, DC 20003
United States

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1913297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **“No more drilling on federal lands, period. Period, period, period.” ** That’s what President Biden said on the campaign trail, Friend. _But he’s expanded extraction by approving more permits to drill than Trump._ America’s public lands are full of beautiful scenery – from snow-capped mountain peaks to sparkling rivers rushing through red rock canyons. The landscapes are breathtaking – and **they’re in danger.** Big Oil disrupts these peaceful places with **screeching** metal, **earth-shaking** drilling, and **noxious** fumes that pollute nearby communities and displace frightened animals. Above all, this drilling drives the climate crisis – nearly **one-quarter of U.S. climate emissions** come from fossil fuel extraction on public lands. We don’t have to accept Big Oil domination of our wild places. President Biden could act TODAY to help change that – but **we need your help to make him.** [**Tell President Biden to PROTECT public lands from destruction and FIGHT the climate crisis! Add your name now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1913298?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***352 Signatures Missing from Your State*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1913299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Just this summer, entire cities choked from wildfire smoke, extreme droughts ravaged the Southwest, and unprecedented storms whipped through our communities. Public lands were not spared from these climate disasters – and the _**worst is yet to come if we don’t act.**_
Take just a moment to picture all the stunning landscapes that could be washed away, the unique and vibrant species we might lose. Remind yourself of what’s really at stake here. **All of life as we know it.**
Now, help us do something about it. [**Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to demand President Biden issues new rules protecting our planet and public lands from Big Oil and the climate crisis >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1913300?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1913299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Victor Riches
subject: Joe Biden: “They’re all our kids.”
body:
President Biden recently doubled down on his comments about children

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663117%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VKTJ2TRgrKFo2gocq4PkRA&sysid=1)

Friend,

President Biden recently doubled down on his comments about children belonging to the state. This echoes what the Secretary of Education recently said about parents, _“Teachers know what is best for their kids because they are with them every day.”_

This nonsense needs to stop.

The Goldwater Institute is taking groundbreaking steps to defend parental rights in education and bring academic transparency to public schools.

_**We’re launching our new project: askyourschoolnow.com**_

You have a constitutional right to direct your child’s education, upbringing, and healthcare. Your rights include knowing what your school is teaching your kids.

Here’s how you can help us launch this massive new project.

_The Goldwater Institute is looking to raise $34,000 online towards parental rights and curriculum transparency. We don’t have corporations, the media, or Hollywood on our side. We are counting on your immediate support to help the Goldwater Institute_.

[Can you donate $250, $35, $50, or even $10 today to the Goldwater Institute? Click here to send your urgent donation >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663118%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=32ZHT%2f9OjEuaNXRDmSPRwg&sysid=1)

[Donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663119%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MQr%2bwSkZ84e4eddxRxzaiQ&sysid=1)

Academic transparency is the newest battle in reclaiming our education from radical leftists.

The National Education Association (NEA) -- the nation’s largest teachers’ union -- teamed up with the New York Times’ 1619 Project to promote classes like “Reparations Math and Reparations History.”

It’s a “3-4 week” pro-reparations program. It includes a mandatory final project in which students will “share their research into the lasting impacts of slavery” and make the case for reparations, including “what math function the U.S. should use to determine and provide monetary preparations [sic].”

There’s a good chance that your child’s district is teaching some sort of radical ideology, such as Critical Race Theory, gender theory, or another politically charged agenda, without your knowledge.

The Goldwater Institute is holding public schools accountable with our latest project, **Ask Your School Now**. It’s critical that we go on the offensive and give parents the tools they need to exert their rights.

**Please help me raise $34,000 online for the Goldwater Institute.**

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663110%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k%2fINEzalzNU9WIJ6xZanQw&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663111%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xdcvMxCFlp%2bgmO5Tyr5T4g&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663112%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rmj%2fWrPbiHANZr8qmwX%2fyQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663113%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iPd9Fvc09gP9CvNaxQNg%2bg&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663114%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K%2b8TaCc%2bEI5eHbaJfA9ihw&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663125%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bHcsqvmm6NzsNYaewYKRQA&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663126%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qdEFa3%2b2RwGgISzuHk4JdQ&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663127%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=18DJNXsbleRbI8LBlWZ2CA&sysid=1)

Why support the Goldwater Institute?

There are dozens of organizations fighting for free market values, but none have had the success of the Goldwater Institute.

_For over a decade, the Goldwater Institute has led the nation on school choice_.

Goldwater delivered the nation’s first universal school choice program. We have now passed school choice laws in nearly 20 states, and we won’t stop until all families have access to the best possible education for their kids.

_We’re also leading the movement to defund Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion pledges used by schools and universities as political loyalty oaths_.

The Goldwater Institute has developed legislative proposals to explicitly prohibit schools from using political tests to screen out pro-liberty teachers or from granting preferential consideration to leftist applicants.

We’re giving conservatives nationwide the tools to reclaim their schools.

Please donate any amount you can generously afford to contribute to this fight.

_Contribute $10 to fight for curriculum transparency._

_Contribute $10 because we will put every dollar we receive today toward our work on parental rights and education._

_Contribute $10 because every donation reaches our important goal of raising $34,000 online._

[Please use this link to contribute $10, or whatever you can afford today, to the Goldwater Institute. Every donation we receive sends a powerful message to the radicals in education that their time is up.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663128%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aA3ftcaEeawZtzMQE%2ffJ1g&sysid=1)

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663110%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k%2fINEzalzNU9WIJ6xZanQw&sysid=1)

Victor Riches

We are counting on your immediate support to help the Goldwater Institute. Academic transparency is the newest battle in reclaiming our education from radical leftists. The National Education Association (NEA) -- the nation’s largest teachers’ union -- teamed up with the New York Times’ 1619 Project to promote classes like “Reparations Math and Reparations History.” It’s a “3-4 week” pro-reparations program. It includes a mandatory final project in which students will “share their research into the lasting impacts of slavery” and make the case for reparations, including “what math function the U.S. should use to determine and provide monetary preparations [sic].” There’s a good chance that your child’s district is teaching some sort of radical ideology, such as Critical Race Theory, gender theory, or another politically charged agenda, without your knowledge. The Goldwater Institute is holding public schools accountable with our latest project, Ask Your School Now. It’s critical that we go on the offensive and give parents the tools they need to exert their rights. Please help me raise $34,000 online for the Goldwater Institute. Why support the Goldwater Institute? There are dozens of organizations fighting for free market values, but none have had the success of the Goldwater Institute. For over a decade, the Goldwater Institute has led the nation on school choice. Goldwater delivered the nation’s first universal school choice program. We have now passed school choice laws in nearly 20 states, and we won’t stop until all families have access to the best possible education for their kids. We’re also leading the movement to defund Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion pledges used by schools and universities as political loyalty oaths. The Goldwater Institute has developed legislative proposals to explicitly prohibit schools from using political tests to screen out pro-liberty teachers or from granting preferential consideration to leftist applicants. We’re giving conservatives nationwide the tools to reclaim their schools. Please donate any amount you can generously afford to contribute to this fight. Contribute $10 to fight for curriculum transparency. Contribute $10 because we will put every dollar we receive today toward our work on parental rights and education. Contribute $10 because every donation reaches our important goal of raising $34,000 online. Thank you for your support! Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4680?t=1009&amount=25&akid=323%2E52803%2ETGSGFa ]Angela Alsobrooks working out

Hey Peter, I don’t want to dwell on bad news, but I need to
share something with you.

I just had to cut my workout short because I got word from my finance team
that we’re lagging behind on this week’s fundraising goal.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4680?t=1010&amount=25&akid=323%2E52803%2ETGSGFa ]I’m counting on this grassroots team to flex its
muscles, Peter.
Would you be willing to pitch in a quick $25 to give our fundraising a
quick burst of momentum?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4680?t=1011&amount=25&akid=323%2E52803%2ETGSGFa ]Donate

We’ve got what it takes to win this race, Peter.

We’ve got a strong core thanks to our experience, endorsements from more
than 70 Maryland leaders, and the most dedicated grassroots team I could
ever ask for.

We’re punching above our financial weight class, so we can’t let our
multi-millionaire opponent’s financial edge be the difference in this
race.

Peter!

—Angela
