body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcqamm0tk1r5ifuc9ggbs0tel4go0v9ggac18e2g_rp22sh2s8i66p74chhm2o74c1h2bs)
---
| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden’s Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zae7srojojeuf2q8fm9j75ekq89vglpj7td0oapo_rp22sh2s8i66p74chhm2o74c1h2bs)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America – the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running – proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America’s economy, to secure America’s borders, to renegotiate America’s trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America’s forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I’m on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _“United States of America v. Donald J. Trump.”_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we’re living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Drop right-wing PragerU curriculum from Florida schools!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell Florida schools to get rid of right-wing PragerU curriculum >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0effa3b9-a062-434e-b27f-c2d88d8598d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The Florida Board of Education is at it again – after approving new curriculum in Florida schools that promotes the ways in which slaves “benefited” from slavery, they are now approving the use of videos from right-wing group PragerU: Florida schools have approved the use of “supplemental curriculum” created by PragerU, an unaccredited right-wing advocacy group that seeks to offer an alternative to “dominant left-wing ideologies,” in classrooms days after the state Department of Education approved new, controversial academic standards for Black history curriculum. (Source: [USA Today](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72cbae6d-dd78-4b15-a3ea-933f7b027552/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) PragerU videos are filled with disinformation, hateful rhetoric, and right-wing extremism. They should not be shown in schools – and the Florida Board of Education needs to stop trying to rewrite history! [Sign your name: Tell Florida schools to get rid of right-wing PragerU curriculum >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc590170f-2e56-4837-87a5-3a4527552b71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Conservative's Last Stand in Mississippi
body:
In the past few weeks, there has been an unprecedented push against conservative candidates. When I first arrived in the Mississippi legislature eight years ago, I wrote an article in which I estimated there were 20 conservative legislators in the Mississippi House of Representatives. That observation proved to be somewhat optomistic but generally true. But as I prepare to leave the legislature, I see that number has dwindled to almost zero.

Photo by [Kevin Grieve](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/95b4422b-24f8-4137-8a4a-9169fc381ea9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cd09b3e4-cb0a-4bdd-853a-e54c48091a5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In the past few weeks, there has been an unprecedented push against conservative candidates.
When I first arrived in the Mississippi legislature eight years ago, I wrote an article in which I estimated there were 20 conservative legislators in the Mississippi House of Representatives. That observation proved to be somewhat optimistic but generally true. But as I prepare to leave the legislature, I see that number has dwindled to almost zero.
What Happened?
The last holdout for conservative principles in the Mississippi legislature was the Mississippi House Conservative Coalition. This group had been birthed by conservatives in the House who were tired of being beaten by liberals and Democrats. They were often called the "conservative conscience" of the Mississippi House.
But while this group was growing in numbers, another group was forming. Philip Gunn came onto the scene and soon decided there was no need for a conservative group of legislators. The two groups coexisted for several years until Gunn saw an opportunity to kill the conscience. When he did that, he took the money, dismantled the only voice for conservative policy, and led the legislature on its downward slide into big government.
As we watched the liberalization of the Republican Party, Steve Hopkins and I decided to form the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. Today, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who fight every day for the Republican Party Platform.
Because we have dared to go against the overlords in Mississippi government, those in positions of power have launched an all-out attack on anyone associated with the conservative movement. They have spent millions of dollars, much of it from Democrats and out-of-state liberals, in hopes of ending any chance that conservative candidates have to gain control of the legislature.
**Chris Brown, Proven Conservative**
One of the races in which Democrats have decided to fight against the conservative is the Northern District Public Service Commissioner race. [Proven conservative Chris Brown](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9ec1b8bd-72e9-4c05-8ce8-527c2670e7eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has run his campaign on his twelve-year record in the Mississippi legislature. Chris has been instrumental in banning sex change practices being performed on our Mississippi children
\- a bill to PROTECT women's sports, which stops biological men from competing against girls
\- a bill to DEFEND life, which ultimately led to the overturning of Roe v. Wade
\- a bill that led to the LARGEST tax cut in state history
\- many bills to EXPAND our 2nd Amendment right, including constitutional carry Chris is a successful entrepreneur who will not sell his position on the Public Service Commission to the highest bidder.
His opponent has taken money from solar farm businesses. So why are solar farm businesses funding a Public Service Commissioner race in Mississippi? Because once Tanner is elected, you can bet money, and they are, that one of his donors will get a huge contract in Mississippi. Tanner's campaign is also being funded by two of the best known Democrats in Mississippi. Wealthy Democrats know who is on their side and who will help promote the Biden Climate Agenda, and it is NOT Chris Brown.
Below is an example of who is donating to Tanner Newman. Why are long time Democrats donating to him? Because they know he is a Democrat pretending to be a Republican. Do not be fooled!
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/63727e96-352b-4b2a-800f-211db5c8ac48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Travis Childers, long time democrat politician
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4455f006-b8ff-4ff8-bd4a-e54e6c11ef81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dicky Scruggs, wealth democrat who went to prison for bribing a judge
The primary election on August 8 is the last chance for the citizens of Mississippi to have a conservative government that represents their values. If the establishment folks win, there isn't much chance in Mississippi to stop the Biden agenda.
Here is a list of the candidates who will fight against the corrupt system and represent your values. **[CLICK HERE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4a19ec4f-3861-4fd4-af20-a8ebe0122e18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

Chris has been instrumental in banning sex change practices being performed on our Mississippi children \- a bill to PROTECT women's sports, which stops biological men from competing against girls \- a bill to DEFEND life, which ultimately led to the overturning of Roe v. Wade \- a bill that led to the LARGEST tax cut in state history \- many bills to EXPAND our 2nd Amendment right, including constitutional carry Chris is a successful entrepreneur who will not sell his position on the Public Service Commission to the highest bidder. His opponent has taken money from solar farm businesses. So why are solar farm businesses funding a Public Service Commissioner race in Mississippi? Because once Tanner is elected, you can bet money, and they are, that one of his donors will get a huge contract in Mississippi. Tanner's campaign is also being funded by two of the best known Democrats in Mississippi. Wealthy Democrats know who is on their side and who will help promote the Biden Climate Agenda, and it is NOT Chris Brown. Below is an example of who is donating to Tanner Newman. Why are long time Democrats donating to him? Because they know he is a Democrat pretending to be a Republican. Do not be fooled! | | ---|---|--- Travis Childers, long time democrat politician | | ---|---|--- Dicky Scruggs, wealth democrat who went to prison for bribing a judge The primary election on August 8 is the last chance for the citizens of Mississippi to have a conservative government that represents their values. If the establishment folks win, there isn't much chance in Mississippi to stop the Biden agenda. Here is a list of the candidates who will fight against the corrupt system and represent your values. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15IvvokU0M__8yrZ1mWW9mKAxGjLRolniMHgHxLeOrqxV2NDvQK0ZJCYM4xBWaNnty9Z1XvXTzAsju7pVYoyvo0TGWSa86q-oXs_fpYidKQz6DOuvc1QKHGIUTJBgQYKqsJbiS6SKof6Er2BhXrccUzr7dDw%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15IvvoPuZISL7jW4BE_vfcM0QRGwPByWI89nKL3rRHQgjrVVRN-PJgK3V8ppIt124n8cDMG0oagcbx9z5JMflqstrwmU_eSC5-W6xCM1yt2axW-Tvw4AJfsQOPBCkzPxMhfLJwq0wzedTzyUfRxZF5E7ub4Q%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15IvvoTycnLQOhFVA9mklzokTFXK4t-xYUAlrMcqFWGR1yL-bToFDYiMBranbqt_orOOiyITwaHs1LnKXQ7XV9nYyQD10BPpKHRIEZr7ua95rcYmvspO1YD-Z3ZqMUS3p3lxtTGnB5Yzfc6JsWBL5og6IFFA%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15Ivvojn7CYnkpg1eXkz1p_N_9lpnUMF0m5RYMwDvxy7Az1WfvW-0TJRI09sLhMB099QsViXcBxJszMfbH-_WMUwZDFmsNXI7UrlpMzkZOshQtd4O9Xzhnq9r_b1R0VEJ3_XrdO6pa7gGQ6BTA-A9dhPc7ZA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15IvvoFfCXp3iRHzITsBidPLnGUKrAB1_dcPPoy-O-s5QKXVqQ92H5DR9W9qEnUMpyasWo9szQBZb25w8Ifgu47l9K7iG-B2w5OLMIS6bI4ygf_ngHPqrAKHfChpLG5eBII8J3O9qNMK4c-4Xjyx5Mf2da7w%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=814ae945dfff441cbb896d0a46fee742&_e=eL5i56ygZ6zaoGFP6zz6w35ONPPqcqBt0AALRVLjtRJws-XKkw30q1VCpRRTEUL6IrwNGKXeXKosKuDLzmCXvJjA7V0Mh7ADHSyrEag32Eu2oWVBCowi0sUb_q__bcUnMOA8rxaRUbRlfLEPzzECa4rM0q8_a7cLbZ3XG6F2r8FpfSMkLhaS3rl4bM-dclQxq3HUNOb4LRi37rzNGrPrTujeBEoOeWz0wo9pVoUl3nQ8nf78Whb-8Eh83u15Ivvo1-L7PEMiXl9R9l9Xt3g6IDGMYXR7gmbL8A9riqE9EB2_oU7GGZDuBsDAl67xJ74Ur-TtcgTxs33Lvm5pGADCQxb7vDTc8X2QOm0IHzvtYKdX-ukknA0xstwV9WtWpmafoTb7Uv8IPDiJCfQLpSr1qQ%3D%3D)

---

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Less Than a Week Away_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/191cf2b5a04559a4c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We're less than a week away from our biggest event of the year — our [2023 State Dinner](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/bce266f8eec7e104c3d6b838967d376c/40313). And trust me, you won't want to miss it. Not only will the evening feature the graduation of the third cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, but it will also feature a keynote address from Congressman and Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jim Banks. Congressman Banks has been a fighter for Hoosier values in the halls of Congress since 2017, standing up for our veterans and working to hold China accountable for its role in the fentanyl crisis that has harmed communities across the country, including here in Indiana. Next Thursday at 7 p.m., join Congressman Banks, Bowie, MD Mayor Pro Tem Roxy Ndebumadu, and hundreds of your fellow Republicans as we prepare for the fight for victory in 2024. Click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/f11428aaca38a92bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) to get your tickets while you still can. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? [Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/130a38535f5b5785c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Toyota 🤝 Indiana_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** provides remarks during the Toyota event._**
---
This week,** Governor Eric Holcomb **and Toyota Indiana celebrated the production of the first ever grand Highlander SUV.
* The announcement also [included](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/8e489578ac8a9fbec3d6b838967d376c/40313) a multimillion-dollar commitment to create career readiness and community engagement in Indiana schools.

**What he’s saying:** "Today is another Toyota Terrific day for the state as they roll out their first Grand Highlanders down the production line," said **Gov. Holcomb**.
* "And not only that—we also celebrate Toyota's continued contribution in early learning programs, which will further help strengthen investments we're making across the state and set the stage for some of our youngest Hoosiers to pursue a future in STEM."

This past legislative session, **Gov. Holcomb** signed legislation that will bring additional high-quality STEM education into more Hoosier classrooms, allowing more students to get hands-on experience in the field of robotics.**

---
|
---
**More:****Gov. Holcomb** [presented](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/1c92da70cd2c4ab3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) officers from 76 police departments across the state with the Indiana Criminal Justice Institute's All-Star Traffic Safety award.
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/c51bcbfa57a85285c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
| |
# _One Year Later_
---
---
One year ago yesterday, we lost **Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** , her district director and St. Joseph County Republican Party chairman, **Zach Potts** , her communications director, **Emma Thomson** , and **Edith Schmucker** in a tragic car accident in northern Indiana. The magnitude of these losses is still felt to this day, but we find comfort in knowing that their lives will not be forgotten. For we will always remember **Jackie** and her unmatched passion for her constituents, her fierce advocacy for our veterans and those in need, and her desire to leave the world a better place; **Zach** and his dedication to the St. Joseph County Republican Party, the Indiana Republican Party, and the Second Congressional District; and **Emma** and her unparalleled work ethic in our nation's capital and her distinguished career of public service. May God bless **Jackie** , **Zach** , **Emma** , and **Edith**.
---
|
---
# _National Review: Hunter Sought ‘Credit’ with Burisma Execs for Then-VP Biden’s Ukraine Trip, Cited Dad’s Speech as Evidence of Influence_
---
From _[National Review](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/e7056aa014b57f9fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : "Hunter Biden and his business partner Devon Archer pitched then-Vice President Joe Biden’s official April 2014 visit to Ukraine — and the contents of a speech he delivered while there — as evidence of their influence and value to [the Ukrainian energy company Burisma](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/5206320d1974b39cc3d6b838967d376c/40313), according to emails obtained by the House Oversight Committee. "Writing to Archer ahead of his father’s scheduled visit to Ukraine, Hunter argued that they should characterize the trip as the result of their influence in conversations with Burisma executives who would, days after the emails were exchanged, appoint each of them to the company’s board at a rate of $83,000 per month each. Not wanting to set expectations too high, Hunter stipulated that they should make sure their Burisma colleagues understood that they did not have direct control over the vice president’s actions or speech. “'The announcement of my guy’s upcoming travels should be characterized as part of our advice and thinking — but what he will say and do is out of our hands,” the younger Biden wrote to Archer, referring to his father. “In other words, it could be a really good thing or it could end up creating too great an expectation. We need to temper expectations regarding that visit.'” _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/1e7b2917531b4387c3d6b838967d376c/40313).[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/bc326d8683812fc1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _NBC News: Note Cards and Shorter Stairs: How Biden's Campaign is Addressing His Age_
---
From [NBC News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/617c02a2a5b583c2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _:_ "The president of the United States tripping and falling is never a good moment in the throes of a re-election campaign. But when the president is 80 years old and already faces concerns that he’s too old for another term, it’s something of a crisis. "Joe Biden’s aides realized they had a problem last month when [the president tripped over a sandbag](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/2083523ea7bf4c0bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) — hard — at the Air Force Academy’s graduation ceremony. Afterward, during a post-event recap, a few aides** ** tried to figure out what may have gone wrong and how to make sure that such an embarrassing and dangerous incident “never happens again,” according to two people familiar with the discussion. “'You can’t be too careful,' one said. "Biden’s answer to voters who question whether he’s up to the rigors of a second term is simple: 'Watch me.' The trouble is, voters are watching, and what they’re seeing is hardening impressions that it’s time for him to step aside,[ polling shows](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/bd1b8fd529677503c3d6b838967d376c/40313). Apart from being the most taxing job on the world stage, the presidency is also the most public, and signs of advancing age are tough to miss." _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/8a232b32c99959a0c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/925ede18419772ccc3d6b838967d376c/40313).__
---
|
---
# _Candidate Feature: Dan Ridenour for Muncie_
---
---
We've long talked about our deep bench of talent across the state. And in this year's municipal elections, it's certainly showing. **The candidate: Mayor Dan Ridenour **has served as a transformational leader for Muncie, cleaning up the mistakes of the past while plotting a course to attract new public and private investment in the city. **Catch up:**[Read](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/e95924475fdacc21c3d6b838967d376c/40313) our quick Q&A; with **Mayor Ridenour**.
* Learn more and get involved with the campaign by [visiting](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/6c3318a1da0d58f9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) his website and [follow](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/3c4a24b2c8dabcd3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) him on Facebook.

On or before November 7, reelect **Dan Ridenour** mayor of Muncie! _[Read other candidate features.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/077ac2df3a69bcf9c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Vacationer-in-Chief 🫡🏖️_
---
From _[FactCheckBiden.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/8dc449d3bfdc0f02c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : President Biden is currently on a [10-day summer retreat](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/2ff17b70003fff7dc3d6b838967d376c/40313), [hiding](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/93a0ae18a0636c4bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) from questions about his failed “[Bidenomics](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/3a57c00c280f2aadc3d6b838967d376c/40313)” agenda and the ever-growing scandal [involving](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/4896e919bccd4571c3d6b838967d376c/40313) his son’s corrupt foreign business deals. **The facts:** The vacationer-in-chief will soon set the modern record for days spent away from the White House in a first term.
* By the end of his current vacation, President Biden will have spent 367 full or partial days on vacation, equating to nearly 40% of his presidency.
* According to the latest New York Times poll, President Biden’s approval rating is under [40 percent](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/17827a0f3b88fd79c3d6b838967d376c/40313) amid his incessant vacationing and constant crises.

**What is true?** President Biden may be on vacation, but his [problems](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2df12c787b9470b3/13318f6b89109768c3d6b838967d376c/40313) aren't.
---
|

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Because we believe in Ruben, and we believe everybody deserves a fair shot at success in this country.
#

There are a lot of jobs out there, Peter.
We’re working to elect Ruben, and you might be wondering why. We hope this explains it:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230804-1-30&t=1&akid=882%2E734936%2Ee8yJNi)
Because we believe in Ruben, and we believe everybody deserves a fair shot at success in this country.
And you’re here with us. You’re reading this email still, so maybe you agree.
As far as we’re concerned, you’re a part of this team.
Now, we send a lot of emails. No lie. And we don’t expect you to donate every time we ask. But we do hope you will today because in the last week we had two big stories drop:
First, CNN put Arizona as one of the most likely states to flip in 2024. Arizona’s Senate seat could go to a Republican. It could even go to Kari Lake — and that would be very bad.
Second, Inside Politics rated Arizona as a PURE toss-up state in 2024. One of only three toss-up states, in fact. That means this state is a HUGE target, and we’ll see waves and waves of attack ads in the coming months.
We have to be ready for that.
So please: [**Consider making your first donation today. It could be for $3. It could be for more. It could be for less. But if you can, take that next step. It’ll mean a lot to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230804-1-30&t=2&akid=882%2E734936%2Ee8yJNi)

subject: Do you believe in miracles?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
I am so proud of him!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjpjkg42nd7gomjsas5sfbhhr55gqj5f24jsp8n0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj1ethj5d33c1jr2cbimdp78dj7moqe6dbmcorr2chi69g60ormm9rr5chhe8rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm2phgm2qr8pti65j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9p34cdge2p35c8iv0)

| | Fellow Patriot, If you don't believe in miracles then this message isn't for you. Fifty-two years ago today, a baby was born in Saigon. How could he have known he would leave under the direst of circumstances, come to America only to spend seven years of his childhood in Africa. Upon return to the States he spoke no English but already had a deep sense of patriotism and decided he was going to serve in the United States military. NOTHING stopped him from achieving that goal. **Hung has spent a lifetime serving our nation with integrity and dedication and now, although he 's in a different kind of fight, the goal is the same: to save our country from what his family escaped from.** I am so proud of him! Would you help me celebrate him today? His life story, like so many, is a MIRACLE and I know how much he means to me and our children. **In honor of him,[please consider giving $3-the cost of his favorite drink-a bottle of Coca Cola-so he can continue to FIGHT FOR US.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbtg9kldl9n25cr5eeis0ksqccm60ab5m8p79l5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74chhm1ob4clh2bs)**

subject: re: Control of the Senate

body:
We can't let them| | | We are in for a fight, Friend. **Freedom vs. Left-wing authoritarian control. **** ** **Free Speech vs. Censored, controlled speech. **** ** **Right to OWN AND BEAR ARMS vs. Government-controlled gun registry lists. **** ** **Pursuit of LIFE, LIBERTY, AND HAPPINESS vs. Coastal elites exercising total control over your life. ** The choice between Republicans and Democrats couldn’t be clearer. **Patriotic, Conservative Senators like Ted Cruz, Rick Scott, Marsha Blackburn, AND others are facing EXTREME Left-wing opponents in their races.** These are NOT your grandfather's Democrats. _They want total control of your life_ – what you can eat, what you can say, what you can DRIVE, what APPLIANCES you can use in YOUR home. It’s un-American, and we have to stop them in their tracks. Democrats are spending **HUGE sums of money** in an attempt to defeat Conservative warriors like Ted Cruz and Marsha Blackburn. body:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67563638/420129665/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.04_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRkZTExZC1jYzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPLUyphjr3xbol8BVmIs8_HAND3MxeCtHawXjxsaxbI=)

Hey friend, it’s Greg.

Earlier this week, **Donald Trump was indicted for a third time.**

I’ve said it countless times before, and I’ll say it again: **Americans deserve better than what this chaotic, extreme Republican Party has to offer.**

**This Chaos Caucus would rather fight amongst themselves and clean up after Donald Trump than deliver for children and families.** I’m fighting every day for the affordable healthcare, quality public education, good-paying union jobs, reproductive freedoms, and gun violence prevention that our communities deserve.

I will _never_ stop fighting for a better future for our communities. **But I can’t do this without you.**

[**We need to work together to defeat the extreme Republicans majority and restore our Democratic House Majority, and that starts by defending seats like mine. This Chaos Caucus would rather fight amongst themselves and clean up after Donald Trump than deliver for children and families. I’m fighting every day for the affordable healthcare, quality public education, good-paying union jobs, reproductive freedoms, and gun violence prevention that our communities deserve. I will never stop fighting for a better future for our communities. But I can’t do this without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8fsiqelt49uv67nt2a8q6k9s6iunengnhg6budo_rp22sh2s8i66p74chjm0p73c3h2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2fuie3oi0d8v270v9aoa8fc4p3gkpsgdd0blr0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chjm0p73c3h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2it38pf8umls6n2jg02j6hcvus54j45rktt3tvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74chjm0p73c3h2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

name: John Kasich
subject: Another day in court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
If there was ever a time for Republicans to speak out and start to move away from Donald Trump, it's now.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6f5e3f568a954506b77d8bf450b8d36d&_e=jGISnhhKtJxscHP0mln6reXrrvBWz4xHFMBADT1mIdskXwC6TIwPGLDuVXwF5wh1COIKCjRUfEWV1kjHctya3Tn6eD62TyxaCHSfm3PsyqPMtt9Eq8DidPrbzb-LDQavsdxy4pvDTj9WBQczQx87XKwIFfeb3F5fzVd9TNqy7AFgRnIAnz6l0LzI9nZa4zR0K1vf3QW83tsklKnEM6RURw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, If there was ever a time for Republicans to speak out and start to move away from Donald Trump, it's now.

We had yet another week where an indictment was announced and the former president had to appear in a court room. He may relish the attention, and his most avid supporters may think he did nothing wrong, but the fact is that the longer Republican candidates and party leaders stand by him, the longer it will be before we can win elections again.

As has happened before, nearly all of the other Republicans candidates running for president stood by him this week rather than calling for him to step aside for the good of the party and the country. I spoke this week about why this doesn't make any sense. [Watch the clip here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=6f5e3f568a954506b77d8bf450b8d36d&_e=jGISnhhKtJxscHP0mln6rZda4OKnSSgvS-yDt824RTUykVZmoI6-S8yiZbBJHZ01AbK8CZ5cnZuLMZmk8B9lLFWiVgnCzFHfYJiUn0J97k5z9HFz-f9oGWUu-e2HWAXMmzPayNqwyBVJOmvZqMOh5nJGF-7NO69gaYuYD4ecXymEfdsbVmq6AcxuS6HjrfJ285IVqN4bCJ4EedyO0nAMPw%3D%3D). How much more evidence is needed? With Trump leading the party, we lost in 2018, 2020, 2021 and 2022! President Biden has historically low support, but the one Republican candidate he can defeat is Trump.

While it's not being discussed yet, the question I have is this: With all of Trump's legal problems mounting, could we get to the point where he cuts a deal that would mean dropping out of the race for president?

I discussed this in several interviews this week. Use the links below to watch them, and please let me know what you think.
---

Before I started as the vice president of Digital at EMILYs List, I worked in Florida politics — so I've seen _firsthand_ the damage done by Gov. Ron DeSantis and his hateful agenda.

You're a supporter of Democratic pro-choice women, so you know as well as anyone that Ron DeSantis is one of the most dangerous forces in American politics today. His anti-choice, anti-democratic attacks on women, children, people of color, and LGBTQ+ folks are ceaseless, heartless, and devastating for Florida's most vulnerable communities.

As the head of the EMILYs List digital team, it's my job to keep you up-to-date on our organization's mission and priorities. And it's also my job to keep our team up-to-date with _you_ : What are _your_ priorities this cycle? What are you most concerned about?

**So, Peter, as we prepare to fight back hard against Republicans like Ron DeSantis and everything they stand for, we want to hear from you. Will you fill out this quick survey — and let us know what you think about the Florida governor and his right-wing extremism?** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67566610/420141296/-2147054774?sourceid=1051606&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Q2YTIzMS1jZjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qU4TDB4yoeXnwTxT2DKgkq8TqA3nr6QjOP3MUsMTgk=&emci=5caceece-7a30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ccd6a231-cf32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you for your input,

Cayana Mackey-Nance (she/her/hers)

| Peter,

I'm sending this card at noon, and I'm really hoping to see your name on it.
Peter, today is President Obama's birthday – and I was hoping you would join me in wishing him a happy and healthy 62nd birthday.

Peter, we wanted to take a moment to wish President Obama a happy and healthy 62nd birthday – and we hope you'll join us!
**President Obama's tireless work and sacrifices for progress gave us the foundation that we have today. **

He took the first steps toward reforming our badly broken health care system, opposed and challenged the gun lobby, was our _first_ president to openly support same-sex marriage, and was a fierce advocate of reproductive health.
Peter, President Obama continues to be an inspiration for the Black community and fighters for progress alike – and we couldn't let this day go by without honoring him and his lasting legacy.
**We put together this card to send over to him on his birthday, and we invite you to add your name. We're hoping to have 5,000 signatures before midnight tomorrow, so please:**

---
Peter,
---
The Biden Administration’s failure to secure our border is devastating Arizona communities.
---
DHS Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, came to Arizona touting promises to secure our border and promoting Operation Blue Lotus, which targets fentanyl entering the United States.
---
**But just last month, illegal border crossings jumped 30%, and in June nearly $2 million worth of fentanyl was seized in southern Arizona.**
---
_Not to mention just this week the DEA Announced Arizona Has Become the Hub for Smuggling Fentanyl into the U.S._
---
**Mayorkas and the Biden administration have left border states and communities to shoulder this crisis alone while putting our citizens at risk.**
---
_It’s past time we hold this administration accountable for their failures and secure our border once and for all and I need your help._
---
[**Please add your name to my official petition to call for DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas’s resignation and DEMAND the Biden Administration SECURE OUR BORDER to protect our communities.**](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=68f90eaaa8bc43759de5b80e6c97372a&_e=mb9j2i4f2deAwJ-DwXib0Q3DzYDZl3SUqU_F_I5c_uvvg2BvSnTS4uA8U08Vd-C0O40WPQKTBOurJZgz7CN5I44LOfldkD6Ay1Is0E8Wd99VdUNtK8UiN6K0ttvFzJCdOFz0UkwHD6AwAe0mvkAEInCxdtir7hH0Fa00Nv4uE5-TlIG9uwLeTrduSzX_ZmlKcPprs9-CL0PRgLN16IeOg8SMqU6Q8KvLRFAKPpxJDNIW3EYa9uWvlPQaYEbQz440aN2uLeqHDETP0202qOisLHv6lOnx6FBIeYsqRoATJ-71q8PzWCmNPhAfotg0BtwZjh9RlWGs6iNMIsuIR66d3gf5KL_62hxvHtKYVx4lxwW3TDBB6FKwC8qOGxwWwTVueFwIto2oZbRo68XIcioUFWN3z0gGExvDLjZnJCYzvsMi1AZJ81GyWkCQUz7PskF7EFQ53LsjEx4BmmmeMuEZvQ%3D%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=68f90eaaa8bc43759de5b80e6c97372a&_e=mb9j2i4f2deAwJ-DwXib0Q3DzYDZl3SUqU_F_I5c_uvvg2BvSnTS4uA8U08Vd-C0O40WPQKTBOurJZgz7CN5I44LOfldkD6Ay1Is0E8Wd99VdUNtK8UiN6K0ttvFzJCdOFz0UkwHD6AwAe0mvkAEInCxdtir7hH0Fa00Nv4uE5-TlIG9uwLeTrduSzX_ZmlKcPprs9-CL0PRgLN16IeOg8SMqU6Q8KvLRFAKPpxJDNIW3EYa9uWvlPQaYEbQz440aN2uLeqHDETP0202qOisLHv6lOnx6FBIeYsqRoATJ-71q8PzWCmNPhAfotg0BtwZ4hbJAl4V2q-HgB95QqmBaxirE-a_XhQiIgk7zUHpyo7bBM0ZYFEKTql-PZLjMnj_JCLstmoDRls_1_fNWi7jcKV165uVw9FctS7DeKl7P_kAE5C_CgFQ-cICNyi8iWEpWCwqAVMQC0dM1jhoiG_xtQ%3D%3D)
---

In July alone, Border Patrol apprehensions in the Tucson Sector hit the highest in 15 years, reaching 40,000.
---
_People are risking their lives to cross the border because they know they won’t be stopped as Mayorkas and Biden continue to make this border crisis worse._
---
_Their open-border policies have allowed cartel operations to increase, risked lives, left border communities to fend for themselves, and put Americans’ safety at risk every day._
---
I won’t stop fighting to secure our border and protect our communities and with you fighting alongside me, I know we will succeed.

name: Michigan Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Michigan
body:
A key chamber in Michigan is at risk. If just two seats slip from our hands, extreme Republicans will regain control. | | |
---
| | We will get right to the point:**GOP extremists in Michigan just outraised Democrats in the fight for chamber control.** **Q: What does this mean?** A: Extremists will stop at nothing to retake control;**they are expanding their efforts** by pouring money into these races and filing baseless recall petitions against SIX Democrats. **Q: What’s at stake?** A: With a slim majority Democrats have achieved major milestones – including repealing Michigan’s outdated abortion ban. If the Michigan GOP continues building their war chest, **they could overtake our majority in 2024 and undo _all_ our progress...** **Q: What can you do?** A: By chipping in $7 to the DLCC, you can help protect our majorities and defend our progress. Friend – Last night, I hosted my friend and Senate colleague Sherrod Brown in Denver to help him with his re-election campaign. I’m going to explain why this is so important, but if you want to cut to the chase,**[click here and chip in whatever you can to help Sherrod.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67568495/420148122/571695245?refcode=X_080423_BrownEvent_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQxZWMzOS1kMjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nh3wjqj1pMM7k-mRnF0vfYep2SVeyKk88cPT0YWm_eE=)** Sherrod and I have worked together for a long time and we’ve made great progress for Colorado and Ohio. In 2015, we started working together on the American Families Act, which became the expanded Child Tax Credit that we passed in 2021. In that same bill, we also passed the expanded EITC for childless workers. **We kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty and supported millions of American workers. Now, we’re working together again to make both policies permanent.** Sherrod believes in the “dignity of work” – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. He always says, "Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I will fight for you." **[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, team , to ask if you’ll split a contribution between my campaign and Sherrod’s today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67568496/420148123/571695245?refcode=X_080423_BrownEvent_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQxZWMzOS1kMjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nh3wjqj1pMM7k-mRnF0vfYep2SVeyKk88cPT0YWm_eE=)** We need leaders like Sherrod Brown in the Senate. If we want to maintain our Senate majority and make progress on the most pressing issues like creating an economy that works for everyone, not just a few at the top, we need to do everything we can to re-elect Sherrod Brown. **[Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can to help re-elect Sherrod? He can’t do this without our help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67568497/420148124/571695245?refcode=X_080423_BrownEvent_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQxZWMzOS1kMjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nh3wjqj1pMM7k-mRnF0vfYep2SVeyKk88cPT0YWm_eE=)**

clean_body: | | | = | | = Friend – Last night, I hosted my friend and Senate colleague Sherrod Brown in Denver to help him with his re-election campaign. I’m going to explain why this is so important, but if you want to cut to the chase,= Sherrod and I have worked together for a long time and we’ve made great progress for Colorado and Ohio. In 2015, we started working together on the American Families Act, which became the expanded Child Tax Credit that we passed in 2021. In that same bill, we also passed the expanded EITC for childless workers. We kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty and supported millions of American workers. Now, we’re working together again to make both policies permanent. Sherrod believes in the “dignity of work” – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. He always says, "Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I will fight for you." = We need leaders like Sherrod Brown in the Senate. If we want to maintain our Senate majority and make progress on the most pressing issues like creating an economy that works for everyone, not just a few at the top, we need to do everything we can to re-elect Sherrod Brown. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | Thank you, as always, Michael | | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States = | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | = | | | PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO | | = By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Fellow Conservative,

We haven't even been in this race for two months, but thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we have already made a _HUGE_ statement.

**Inside Elections just ranked Montana's U.S. Senate seat a TOSS-UP. [Your support is helping make this top-targeted race competitive.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ece18c827334506b96caf1791dcbbc0&_e=ZDGoV2VbeqCfqk0zaqzfXaIztZp1PH19t4WVnl1wLdOAJVb2qd5i4nlmB2FGvebp7Ol5RUrLAJ6iwKXEk7uhWJM3lwo9r6cScq0lD2P1oSstiT60jVLdrbE27e75DqGTi6BdChKR9OpjUKAZ7XiG12rQkbs4XocHeghAPArTdgWRA6Ni7nkIAKJCtHFIcHbtDgK1Li9KMj_u9g7hK0nN6oIUG_FdCVhhT2xiJNoRuKI7vUUPsf6RHdzpyqkQC25NdLMRb19pwJe2r68JVoH6z0kdyXROM77IShfAWF-vEsqDYQGi_sXElN4J09bHx6yw_g4KeBGI5bGPS5hAjgiNCPMYXyvD9bgaLdTIR3l3D8ZJQPSKIMJ-apG5lqMWhpcTucvhQmc6HItQGcsXZSaKvw%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ece18c827334506b96caf1791dcbbc0&_e=ZDGoV2VbeqCfqk0zaqzfXaIztZp1PH19t4WVnl1wLdOAJVb2qd5i4nlmB2FGvebp7Ol5RUrLAJ6iwKXEk7uhWJM3lwo9r6cScq0lD2P1oSstiT60jVLdrbE27e75DqGTi6BdChKR9OpjUKAZ7XiG12rQkbs4XocHeghAPArTdgWRA6Ni7nkIAKJCtHFIcHbtDgK1Li9KMj_u9g7hK0nN6oIUG_FdCVhhT2xiJNoRuKI7vUUPsf6RHdzpyqkQC25NLhShROqBS6KPAlpd7lxd7i4NP9B5_CDMs9JjskN6GP_PdM6vW2F2GABRs6V_Xt9uvtLQAqSKsXLYYUqz1Un5-f7RAOUvFB59qbPkOuzJzCKA2czuNS-Fo5vtl5nOBjI7y19SoOTlPjhihhwPL1fW9A%3D%3D)

But, Fellow Conservative, we cannot take this for granted. **Montana may be in the toss-up category today,_but this race is far from over._**

This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. [**Can I count on you to step up TODAY to help keep our momentum going?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ece18c827334506b96caf1791dcbbc0&_e=ZDGoV2VbeqCfqk0zaqzfXaIztZp1PH19t4WVnl1wLdOAJVb2qd5i4nlmB2FGvebp7Ol5RUrLAJ6iwKXEk7uhWJM3lwo9r6cScq0lD2P1oSstiT60jVLdrbE27e75DqGTi6BdChKR9OpjUKAZ7XiG12rQkbs4XocHeghAPArTdgWRA6Ni7nkIAKJCtHFIcHbtDgK1Li9KMj_u9g7hK0nN6oIUG_FdCVhhT2xiJNoRuKI7vUUPsf6RHdzpyqkQC25NE8nwmaKOIJjFczLz05HGQWKAQKmfqKcpv56cLi8o6muYC7TMOExvZ01jWFWS_tx-TM1pXyLPBp1fOqLPfDv2iZK4fw_s6YSYjmUNd9apEKfd-vtpbSR0OGTqUZ9JWYzewsp1Lt1lYrQA91oxWTFiwA%3D%3D)

[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM
TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ece18c827334506b96caf1791dcbbc0&_e=ZDGoV2VbeqCfqk0zaqzfXaIztZp1PH19t4WVnl1wLdOAJVb2qd5i4nlmB2FGvebp7Ol5RUrLAJ6iwKXEk7uhWJM3lwo9r6cScq0lD2P1oSstiT60jVLdrbE27e75DqGTi6BdChKR9OpjUKAZ7XiG12rQkbs4XocHeghAPArTdgWRA6Ni7nkIAKJCtHFIcHbtDgK1Li9KMj_u9g7hK0nN6oIUG_FdCVhhT2xiJNoRuKI7vUUPsf6RHdzpyqkQC25N50ZnXisk3fiHsw4uHejiYvAAFt04xGTPWxu5pdfjyjvpdWq9rOdVTYkwgX92EjbOYkALz3wB2Bal9U-v52toT8kSlyXJY6P89lZ0P_xxX8mkrhYH_2cPbgVqcK4l2nax7ejM3W-YiwbTnRUXyFVK1Q%3D%3D)

I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column.

**After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. **

That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, **meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer.**

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: Ted Cruz and Book Bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19006?t=1001&akid=3466%2E346206%2EatwnTI ][IMG]

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was
pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting
there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the
money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different
career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same
opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are
fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their
far-right agenda.

That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the
Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But
I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against
Ted Cruz. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19006?t=1002&akid=3466%2E346206%2EatwnTI ]Will you please split a donation of $25 today between our
campaign and Charles Booker to help send me to the Senate? →

Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz
is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just
five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and
tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change.

But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and
expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats
like you to be by my side every step of the way. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19006?t=1003&akid=3466%2E346206%2EatwnTI ]So please, before my
midnight fundraising deadline, will you split a donation of $25 or more
between our campaign and Charles Booker to help me defeat Ted Cruz and
flip Texas blue? →

Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you
can.

Colin

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230804-3466-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3466_346206_atwnTI&akid=3466%2E346206%2EatwnTI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3466%2E346206%2EatwnTI

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdobjc9oup00ob1vbbgieqa4kig0ir6mdugmhbh0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chjmco72cph2bs)
---
Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**

body:
I recently sat down with WGAL to talk about my record and Pennsylvania’s upcoming Attorney General race–check out a clip of our conversation:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67571743/420159675/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3Y2U5NS1kNzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGCi2rVl8zkV7R-B52KmJuvqBY6bM2vwctZojECVNiQ=&emci=2f4c2d59-5332-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=98e7ce95-d732-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Hi there,

I recently sat down with WGAL to talk about my record and Pennsylvania’s upcoming Attorney General race – check out a clip of our conversation: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67571744/420159676/-402133594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3Y2U5NS1kNzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGCi2rVl8zkV7R-B52KmJuvqBY6bM2vwctZojECVNiQ=&emci=2f4c2d59-5332-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=98e7ce95-d732-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) People across Pennsylvania know my record in the State House as someone who worked across the aisle to get things done, and my record of cracking down to save taxpayers over $1 billion as Auditor General.

_(Psst: What you may not know is that I got all my office furniture at a yard sale!)_

I want you – and every single Pennsylvanian – to know that I would bring that same passion and fight to the Attorney General’s office.

I will prioritize fighting for reproductive freedom, voting rights, and keeping our communities safe from the threat of gun violence.

But if I’m going to get my message out across the Commonwealth, I need your help. **[Can you make a donation to my campaign today to help us spread our message across Pennsylvania? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67571745/420159677/-1919679526?refcode=email_080423_interview_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3Y2U5NS1kNzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGCi2rVl8zkV7R-B52KmJuvqBY6bM2vwctZojECVNiQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67571746/420159678/-1919679526?refcode=email_080423_interview_t3&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3Y2U5NS1kNzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGCi2rVl8zkV7R-B52KmJuvqBY6bM2vwctZojECVNiQ=)

I believe my experience as Auditor General uniquely qualifies me to take on the tough fights facing the next Attorney General. But Pennsylvania’s a big state. And getting our message out to voters won’t be easy without considerable grassroots support.

**[I’m asking you to pitch in to my campaign for Attorney General and help us hit the ground running in this campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67571754/420159686/-1919679526?refcode=email_080423_interview_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3Y2U5NS1kNzMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGCi2rVl8zkV7R-B52KmJuvqBY6bM2vwctZojECVNiQ=)**

Eugene DePasquale

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift
body:
In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. | |

|
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e643571203544a41b80c55f2b6110623&_e=E2rYXOV-9vQJO1FtzBQnjPgSSmiUvhRVBbz-WpcAAP-MZB7XUkHGdnpvwVuWsO1q0rk6QJUWGa0O5T9CuRvxk3XwBIARZyTKzmYSbVYvHU9PZ391IA_SOvyfWSZ2hF_wxapLZGhOMpFbtPlU0EZaqZJDjlZNfeo9LCEJpwjJ1k0VbaxIjlqVxf6gODcLPP4947-UDeRIh2vOgksKIpw8ioXlBYdjYwn5SBs89DFegaTQvNZ0ZAZh0O1Gsnbc-o2OA4KkJF0WQTetqvvJYwDY0pVpUAaFfkai4cN9tlkxqBLcxQLtZxPiakemAL-vvTB4)
---
| | |
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e643571203544a41b80c55f2b6110623&_e=E2rYXOV-9vQJO1FtzBQnjPgSSmiUvhRVBbz-WpcAAP-MZB7XUkHGdnpvwVuWsO1q0rk6QJUWGa0O5T9CuRvxk3XwBIARZyTKzmYSbVYvHU9PZ391IA_SOvyfWSZ2hF_wxapLZGhOMpFbtPlU0EZaqZJDjlZNfeo9LCEJpwjJ1k2xcd8ULpk9JsJmD4yTwnLN263XAV4SRIyVZnAwUIaNRW5KL6RPcjTHqRWQhDNtD9XJzcOQx_dC7F_WbfVc92k3Vs7mJPgg77TM5Wp-vntWtTbOBPovLr3qn7BwkoGem6_2tiVC-9SOlWtsjO9IKQSb)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

name: Merch Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: 📣 Hot off the presses: Courier Newsroom Merch
body:
We’ve got t-shirts, mugs, tote bags, and more →
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1332%2E120351%2EeSvAXS)
Peter, Courier Newsroom merch is finally here... and it’s perfect. It’s hard to pick a favorite piece but, if we _had_ to, it would probably be our ‘Fascists Hate Facts’ shirt (and tote!).
**Just take a look for yourself:**

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed by my Republican opponent. Will Rollins is now running to unseat him.
body:
We can do this!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07761f54-8a01-4f17-932c-119f920d6cc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T706bd09a-f047-440c-b72f-ecb02c51bd8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to split a [$10 donation between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27fbbddf-6f4f-48c6-a96d-b5304e2fe489/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcad7b8c3-539f-4e0c-aeb3-bc5aa0aac7c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat. Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. [Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please split a contribution of $10 or more between Blue Amp Action and Will’s campaign before their next fundraising deadline. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b6e348d-fc91-4739-a539-0c489a31bacf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54d77fcd-0551-422e-8ba2-22983cb0d4d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | _Thank you,_ Mark
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

| | Do you have 1 minute, fellow American? Will Hurd has been making waves, hosting campaign events, and talking to voters to lay out his forward-thinking vision for America. clean_body: | | | | | Do you have 1 minute, fellow American? Will Hurd has been making waves, hosting campaign events, and talking to voters to lay out his forward-thinking vision for America. He does a lot of talking, but he wants to make sure that's in tune with voters nationwide. He asked us to conduct a survey to see what issues facing our nation are most pressing to you. From AI to the border and rising tensions with China, Will wants to talk about the issues that will directly impact your life – that no other candidate is talking about. Your feedback is critical at this point in the campaign. Thank you, Survey Team Hurd for America | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Team Keith Potts for Senate
subject: …can you keep a secret? 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230804_em_pet_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230804_em_pet_b1_TKP_react]
Friend, it's Team KP, here with a bit of an...unusual request.
It's Keith's birthday today!
As his team, we've seen how hard he works for the community, and how hard he works to make sure people know about his vision for the future – one that focuses on expanding on our freedoms, not taking them away.
And what better way to celebrate him and his passion for the community than a card signed by the wonderful people in it?
Friend, this would really mean a lot to Keith – will you sign his card and wish him a happy birthday today? [https://dry5fuec.paperform.co]
WISH KEITH A HAPPY BIRTHDAY [https://dry5fuec.paperform.co]
https://dry5fuec.paperform.co [https://dry5fuec.paperform.co]
Thank you,
Team Keith Potts for Senate
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230804_em_pet_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230804_em_pet_b1_TKP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
