| | _**Living Dangerously in 2023**_ By Sean Feucht
---
| | We were welcomed to Idaho by a scathing editorial from this paper's editorial board titled, "Keep your religion out of our government. Dangerous activists coming to Idaho Capitol." I don't begrudge the Statesman for what they wrote—they are well within their Constitutional right. We both exercised our rights under the same amendment. What they wrote is not so much a critique of the Let Us Worship Movement as it was a shameless plug for the LGBTQ agenda. To stand on the Bible is _dangerous in the year 2023, _especially when that truth conflicts with the LGTBQ agenda. Of course, it is easy to find “faith leaders” willing to sign their name to a letter denouncing Let Us Worship. But those very same faith leaders echoed a chorus of avowed Satanists, which makes me wonder which group should examine their beliefs. Simply put, to stand for the TRUTH of the Gospel is dangerous. Fear not, for it is Truth - and ONLY THE TRUTH - that sets us free. The Let Us Worship movement started as a response to an injustice I witnessed firsthand in my home state of California during the early stages of the Covid pandemic. Had churches in California been afforded the rights to gather, the same rights that strip clubs and bars never lost, we probably wouldn't be here today. But the government telling Believers to stay home, while strippers and bartenders could go to work, was the final straw. This birthed a movement that continues today. name: Victor Riches
subject: Joe Biden: “They’re all our kids.”
body:
President Biden recently doubled down on his comments about children

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaeaebf8840545b283a9c537c95eb594&_e=FW8opzgJGdLL0dLEbYmWTA0Xa8vsUnYSybMb57poQFGk9RgIdYA4UJ8nR1Zz_MfZo92T4bc-TFKv5yO4QuXxFrh9PqYbow_Nj8KhH1ogwcXBg4CcZjJZEmkuIGLGQqpYx-gDVnkaAKr_RJ2j2CbXheEcPrqEFiCY3TNw6871qmNf6_W1A-Uw3CVM8fNhVq2Pw0bJq3LBs-uyc5g4r7YBmHKlld9o_ohKxmutuhpXAOQCi88s8jgzF-F0loygnf-XUQGb_tG0Wssz48PJcEzVWGsRfbU7ypUsY3x9pvfbOwI%3D)

Friend,

President Biden recently doubled down on his comments about children belonging to the state. This echoes what the Secretary of Education recently said about parents, _" Teachers know what is best for their kids because they are with them every day."_

This nonsense needs to stop.

The Goldwater Institute is taking groundbreaking steps to defend parental rights in education and bring academic transparency to public schools.

_**We 're launching our new project: askyourschoolnow.com**_

You have a constitutional right to direct your child's education, upbringing, and healthcare. Your rights include knowing what your school is teaching your kids.

Here's how you can help us launch this massive new project.

_The Goldwater Institute is looking to raise $34,000 online towards parental rights and curriculum transparency. We don 't have corporations, the media, or Hollywood on our side. We are counting on your immediate support to help the Goldwater Institute_.

[Can you donate $250, $35, $50, or even $10 today to the Goldwater Institute? Click here to send your urgent donation >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaeaebf8840545b283a9c537c95eb594&_e=FW8opzgJGdLL0dLEbYmWTA0Xa8vsUnYSybMb57poQFGk9RgIdYA4UJ8nR1Zz_MfZo92T4bc-TFKv5yO4QuXxFrh9PqYbow_Nj8KhH1ogwcXBg4CcZjJZEmkuIGLGQqpYx-gDVnkaAKr_RJ2j2CbXhT-AEuAcmjVEZe4D0CDPYY07kZ50kLNGARi-ARzvIiU0HUXSGyQTvCJ6hwKoAXBKTtwoUyqTYtbx_fsUvX22HFirIvTE3Ma4A4-JCXicEiQlhfRO979Yxrf55Pe11EwTSJnNzWyI78O6WfB5IPPh0DM%3D)

[Donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaeaebf8840545b283a9c537c95eb594&_e=FW8opzgJGdLL0dLEbYmWTA0Xa8vsUnYSybMb57poQFGk9RgIdYA4UJ8nR1Zz_MfZo92T4bc-TFKv5yO4QuXxFrh9PqYbow_Nj8KhH1ogwcXBg4CcZjJZEmkuIGLGQqpYx-gDVnkaAKr_RJ2j2CbXhREolK0_klsFdS_nqTrLRA9ubn6J5a6rZGlqHllm4BfXHAKEd-77_4J5hWaq4dHgWc-5GF3RmvCB0VefPy0o2llEx3ENMCw7QeJhd65_osZqWVgsB-ihXNFHCYdu-OqK0VM0l0VyTjHBoPqJhYpEh8U%3D)

Academic transparency is the newest battle in reclaiming our education from radical leftists.

The National Education Association (NEA) -- the nation's largest teachers' union -- teamed up with the New York Times' 1619 Project to promote classes like "Reparations Math and Reparations History."

It's a "3-4 week" pro-reparations program. It includes a mandatory final project in which students will "share their research into the lasting impacts of slavery" and make the case for reparations, including "what math function the U.S. should use to determine and provide monetary preparations [sic]."

There's a good chance that your child's district is teaching some sort of radical ideology, such as Critical Race Theory, gender theory, or another politically charged agenda, without your knowledge.

The Goldwater Institute is holding public schools accountable with our latest project, **Ask Your School Now**. It's critical that we go on the offensive and give parents the tools they need to exert their rights.

**Please help me raise $34,000 online for the Goldwater Institute.**

There are dozens of organizations fighting for free market values, but none have had the success of the Goldwater Institute.

_For over a decade, the Goldwater Institute has led the nation on school choice_.

Goldwater delivered the nation's first universal school choice program. We have now passed school choice laws in nearly 20 states, and we won't stop until all families have access to the best possible education for their kids.

_We 're also leading the movement to defund Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion pledges used by schools and universities as political loyalty oaths_.

The Goldwater Institute has developed legislative proposals to explicitly prohibit schools from using political tests to screen out pro-liberty teachers or from granting preferential consideration to leftist applicants.

This echoes what the Secretary of Education recently said about parents, " Teachers know what is best for their kids because they are with them every day." This nonsense needs to stop. We 're launching our new project: askyourschoolnow.com You have a constitutional right to direct your child's education, upbringing, and healthcare. Your rights include knowing what your school is teaching your kids. Here's how you can help us launch this massive new project. The Goldwater Institute is looking to raise $34,000 online towards parental rights and curriculum transparency. We don 't have corporations, the media, or Hollywood on our side. We are counting on your immediate support to help the Goldwater Institute. Academic transparency is the newest battle in reclaiming our education from radical leftists. The National Education Association (NEA) -- the nation's largest teachers' union -- teamed up with the New York Times' 1619 Project to promote classes like "Reparations Math and Reparations History." It's a "3-4 week" pro-reparations program. It includes a mandatory final project in which students will "share their research into the lasting impacts of slavery" and make the case for reparations, including "what math function the U.S. should use to determine and provide monetary preparations [sic]." There's a good chance that your child's district is teaching some sort of radical ideology, such as Critical Race Theory, gender theory, or another politically charged agenda, without your knowledge. The Goldwater Institute is holding public schools accountable with our latest project, Ask Your School Now. It's critical that we go on the offensive and give parents the tools they need to exert their rights. Please help me raise $34,000 online for the Goldwater Institute. Why support the Goldwater Institute? There are dozens of organizations fighting for free market values, but none have had the success of the Goldwater Institute. For over a decade, the Goldwater Institute has led the nation on school choice. Goldwater delivered the nation's first universal school choice program. We have now passed school choice laws in nearly 20 states, and we won't stop until all families have access to the best possible education for their kids. We 're also leading the movement to defund Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion pledges used by schools and universities as political loyalty oaths. The Goldwater Institute has developed legislative proposals to explicitly prohibit schools from using political tests to screen out pro-liberty teachers or from granting preferential consideration to leftist applicants. We're giving conservatives nationwide the tools to reclaim their schools. Please donate any amount you can generously afford to contribute to this fight. Contribute $10 to fight for curriculum transparency. Contribute $10 because we will put every dollar we receive today toward our work on parental rights and education. Contribute $10 because every donation reaches our important goal of raising $34,000 online. Thank you for your support! Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Majority Whip Jazz Lewis
subject: Reminder: Block Party with Jazz Lewis!
body:
Hey Team,
I'm so excited for to be hosting a Block Party next weekend and would love to see you there. We'll have a great time with guest speakers Comptroller Brooke Lierman & Sheriff John Carr, as well as a DJ, moon bounce, live music performance, and prepaid food trucks. Come out and have a good time!
All the details are below and you can register and purchase tickets at: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzfestblockparty
Hope to see you on the 12th,
Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]
Join us at the
Summer Block Party
hosted by
Majority Whip Jazz Lewis
Special Guest Speaker Brooke Lierman
Chair, Public Safety & Administration and Vice Chair, Capital Budget Subcommittee
House Appropriations Committee
DJ and Live Music
Food Trucks
Fun for the Family
Saturday, August 12th, 2023
12:00-3:00pm
Arbor Park
1100 Arbor Park Pl.
Bowie, MD 20721
Purchase Tickets > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzfestblockparty]
For questions please contact adam@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip in the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]
by Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer: Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Three strikes—He’s not out yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Donald Trump and his co-conspirators took explicit steps to overturn the 2020 election—Now it's time to hold him accountable.
|
---
Friend,

Former President Donald J. Trump has officially been criminally indicted for the third time and this is the most grave offense of them all: Four criminal counts for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election. The narrative that Special Counsel Jack Smith lays out in this indictment is, to say the least, extremely damning. Donald Trump, abetted by many co-conspirators, did everything he could to prevent President Joe Biden from taking office on January 20, 2021–including inciting a violent insurrection and an attempted coup against the government of the United States. clean_body: Donald Trump and his co-conspirators took explicit steps to overturn the 2020 election—Now it's time to hold him accountable. | Friend, Former President Donald J. Trump has officially been criminally indicted for the third time and this is the most grave offense of them all: Four criminal counts for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election. The narrative that Special Counsel Jack Smith lays out in this indictment is, to say the least, extremely damning. Donald Trump, abetted by many co-conspirators, did everything he could to prevent President Joe Biden from taking office on January 20, 2021–including inciting a violent insurrection and an attempted coup against the government of the United States. It will run for a week on Fox News nationally and in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Arizona, and Wisconsin, including on Hannity and Fox & Friends. Donald Trump is fundamentally unfit to hold any elected office again. Much less the presidency of the United States. We’re leading the fight to defeat him again and we can’t do it without you. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | Republican Accountability, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. **Today also happens to be my birthday, and there’s no way I’d rather celebrate than by helping reelect Joe and Kamala.**
I’m proud of the way Joe and Kamala are building this campaign -- from the ground up with folks like you at the heart of it. In fact, 97% of their campaign’s donations last quarter came from grassroots donors.
But there’s a lot of work to do over these next fifteen months. And each of us -- you, me, and this entire grassroots team -- have to do our part to make sure our country keeps moving in the right direction.
[I hope you’ll make a $25 donation today. When you do, you’ll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Joe and me in person. I couldn’t ask for a better gift than working with you, Peter, to help reelect my friends Joe and Kamala.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrjEHWxpUIjU4l6-p-WlpsiBLIvdB5alKHPOejx-6IEFR-0n20ltnshJlSXrNaQj7d8wO1JwFehhHIDttVWXxeLyFtKA5ideZ9-y8ANnaNHE5LmfEaL824n3_FnVL8eB7reRYuiuphK9LygQdtUtEyGsBzT1h8XQqUD3C0ud82hGvRLgsBzXjOSBpKd68AZfhoP_wekM-tw5_Hc0s4IZsLQa2tKv7DYnVyzUqx4jW8hdxoF_xj_54K4izhuV9mxT7q6llMrcsJZLlC9Flycm9xF9sHo4sd7soKs5BQsVp2ArBbsSG7rTbxCIuZkcGpnyZ1SyaTi_ahQrttbx6YXI_xM7X8jqQ1EY3CEmJn1K7Nw5PgkC0-XHrP2d5qSOTNTE4/3yg/af1ZIiHXSjya8gBijPnd2g/h6/knV9eTeWAjXqWZZILoDYpBGqBBB72aTDWOIe1U5XOw0)

clean_body: I hope you’ll make a donation to support Joe and Kamala today -- and when you do, you’ll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Joe and me in person. | | | Peter, how’d you like to meet Joe and me? Today, I’m excited to announce a new contest where one lucky supporter (and their guest) will get to meet us in person. The flight and hotel stay will be covered -- all you need to do is make your first donation to support the Biden-Harris campaign today. So, Peter, will you pitch in $25 to be automatically entered for a chance to meet Joe and me? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Today also happens to be my birthday, and there’s no way I’d rather celebrate than by helping reelect Joe and Kamala. I’m proud of the way Joe and Kamala are building this campaign -- from the ground up with folks like you at the heart of it. In fact, 97% of their campaign’s donations last quarter came from grassroots donors. But there’s a lot of work to do over these next fifteen months. And each of us -- you, me, and this entire grassroots team -- have to do our part to make sure our country keeps moving in the right direction. Thanks for being a part of this. \-- Barack Obama

Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. One of the candidates in this race remembers having to make do with water in her cereal before school because there wasn't enough in the budget for milk. She remembers the stress on her mother’s face when bills were due. She remembers laying awake late at night trying to find a way up. The other was born with a silver spoon in his mouth. Brian Fitzpatrick comes from a political dynasty with the connections and access to power very few people ever come close to having. His brother – a real moderate – previously held this congressional seat, and Brian rode his coattails into office. He's never had to make the tough decisions so many Pennsylvania families make every day. Ashley grew up in a single-parent household, lived in government housing, and bounced around southeastern Pennsylvania with her brothers. She joined the Army at 17 so she could afford college. Ashley worked hard to graduate from West Point and pilot Apache helicopters – one of the most advanced, lethal helicopters on the battlefield. **There are enough Brian Fitzpatricks in Congress – good ole boys who are used to getting their way without much effort.** **So let's replace him with someone who knows what it's like to have the odds stacked against you, who will fight for the little guy because she's been one, too.** [**If you agree, chip in your first donation of $5 (or whatever your can) to help Ashley defeat Fitzpatrick and flip PA-01. name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: my great-great-great grandfather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, there are NO Black women in the Senate. I’m running to change that, but I can’t make history again without your help. |
#
Friend, this is Lisa Blunt Rochester, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in Delaware. This is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867 — and my sister Thea made it into a scarf. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, there are NO Black women in the Senate. **[I’m running to change that, but I can’t make history again without your help. Will you rush $10 or more to my campaign and Tina Smith’s so we can send another Black woman to the Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67575255/420173045/1221027587?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230804_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE0NTg2NC1kZjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj8_GbC58LV-IvW5n_2_FxSCqwfdvWT8rC_StiYqs14=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67575256/420173046/1221027587?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230804_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE0NTg2NC1kZjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj8_GbC58LV-IvW5n_2_FxSCqwfdvWT8rC_StiYqs14=) I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. **The day I was sworn in, I carried that scarf.** It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. **I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection.** On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. **And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate.** **[If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $10 to my Senate campaign and Tina Smith’s? Every donation goes towards creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67575257/420173047/1221027587?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230804_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE0NTg2NC1kZjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj8_GbC58LV-IvW5n_2_FxSCqwfdvWT8rC_StiYqs14=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Lisa Blunt Rochester and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67575258/420173048/1221027587?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230804_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE0NTg2NC1kZjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj8_GbC58LV-IvW5n_2_FxSCqwfdvWT8rC_StiYqs14=)

clean_body: The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, there are NO Black women in the Senate. I’m running to change that, but I can’t make history again without your help. | Friend, this is Lisa Blunt Rochester, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in Delaware. This is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867 — and my sister Thea made it into a scarf. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, there are NO Black women in the Senate. = = I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. The day I was sworn in, I carried that scarf. It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Lisa Blunt Rochester and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Lisa Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

subject: Democrats can win in rural America. Here's how:

body:
I know how hard it is for Democrats to win in red districts – but I also know firsthand that it is possible.

| |

Hey Peter – I'm Matt Cartwright, representative for Pennsylvania's 8th District. I know how hard it is for Democrats to win in rural areas – but I also know firsthand _that it is possible_. I've won a Trump district with a significant rural population four times without compromising my beliefs or playing politics. **How? By fulfilling my promise to fight for every northeastern Pennsylvanian, restoring trust, and delivering results.** In the House, I've introduced dozens of pieces of legislation aimed at helping seniors, military families, veterans, students, workers, consumers, the middle class, and the environment. That's why the Center for Effective Lawmaking named me one of the most effective members of the U.S. House of Representatives. My constituents can trust that I'll tell the truth and fight for their priorities – and I have the track record to prove it. I'm ready to continue delivering results for rural communities in PA-08 – and across the country – but I need your help. In recent years, Democrats have lost ground with working-class voters in districts like mine. But with populist messaging and progressive economic policies, I've shown that we can win back working-class voters across the country. But winning in districts like PA-08 won't be easy. Republicans think my seat is one of their best pick-up opportunities in 2024 and the attacks against me have already started. I need your support to ensure I have the resources to fight back so I can continue standing up for all northeastern Pennsylvanians in Congress. clean_body: I know how hard it is for Democrats to win in red districts – but I also know firsthand that it is possible. | | Hey Peter – I'm Matt Cartwright, representative for Pennsylvania's 8th District. I know how hard it is for Democrats to win in rural areas – but I also know firsthand that it is possible. I've won a Trump district with a significant rural population four times without compromising my beliefs or playing politics. How? By fulfilling my promise to fight for every northeastern Pennsylvanian, restoring trust, and delivering results. In the House, I've introduced dozens of pieces of legislation aimed at helping seniors, military families, veterans, students, workers, consumers, the middle class, and the environment. That's why the Center for Effective Lawmaking named me one of the most effective members of the U.S. House of Representatives. My constituents can trust that I'll tell the truth and fight for their priorities – and I have the track record to prove it. I'm ready to continue delivering results for rural communities in PA-08 – and across the country – but I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Much of America resembles Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. body:

**[I'm reaching out today to ask if you will chip in a few dollars to Bob Casey's re-election campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230804-1?refcode=em20230804-1&refcode2=408_552475_WYTcdR&akid=408%2E552475%2EWYTcdR)** But first, let me give you three reasons why we all need to support Bob:

3️⃣ Our Democratic majority in the Senate is at risk — and with it, the chance to deliver for PA families at the federal level.
**So, what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in now to support Bob and keep PA blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230804-1?refcode=em20230804-1&refcode2=408_552475_WYTcdR&akid=408%2E552475%2EWYTcdR)**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Scientists are sounding the alarms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67576631/420178416/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNiNmNjZS1lMDMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Id4GaW8nZFSJgVpnKe3lQpMMKExRxKCz_834QOymk5Q=&emci=4f663ea5-3032-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=2acb6cce-e032-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | **Let this sink in: 2023 is on track to be the hottest year ever recorded.** Scientists are sounding the alarm as our climate continues to change due to the endless burning of fossil fuels and corporate greed. Across the country, we see the effects of climate chaos, and we struggle with them daily. Smoke from wildfires blankets our communities with air pollution, tornadoes rip through small towns and cities in the Midwest, and storms are intensifying, leading to record-level flooding and damage. We have to act before it's too late. **To help manage the effects of climate chaos we're seeing right now, I introduced the**** _Wildfire Smoke Emergency Declaration Act_****and the**** _Smoke and Heat Ready Communities Act_****– two bills aimed at protecting communities across the nation from the hazardous health, economic, and environmental impacts of severe wildfire smoke and extreme heat events, which are becoming more frequent due to climate chaos.** _But the bottom line is we can't keep living like this;_ for our sake and for the sake of future generations, we need Climate Champions in Congress – leaders willing to take big, bold action to stop pollution and tackle the climate crisis. We must fight back against Big Oil, Big Coal, the Koch network, and the corporations that pollute our air, land, and water. I'm going to continue the fight in the Senate by supporting legislation to help communities suffering the effects of the climate crisis and to curb carbon emissions so we can slow – and reverse – deadly global warming. Together, we can create a strong, green future for our country and ensure a bright future for our children. subject: I hope you’ll read

body:
I just wanted to follow up on my email from yesterday, friend. You see, my aunt had an incredibly deep influence on my life – she’s one of the reasons I’m now running for Congress. I’ve always told you family is the most important thing to me, and she was no exception. | | | I just wanted to follow up on my email from yesterday, friend. You see, my aunt had an incredibly deep influence on my life – she’s one of the reasons I’m now running for Congress. I’ve always told you family is the most important thing to me, and she was no exception. [**If you didn’t get a chance yesterday, I hope you’ll read her story below and consider donating to my campaign before the end of the day.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMhZNKt-XE9TMreiAWcw8W9qvQWqqvrgtmOuQwUru7KoJqvXvv7Xq-MhD8pHV_zjZe5MY5ASMXxdLhtNy3YNkuip9wFGowLuiihMn9-KlCtF36vwGa01TDMEIVNZkMEKrXWaWVucoXrR-2ipoRf_XwFrA%3D%3D) Thank you so much. John Padora \------ Begin Original Message ------ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMhennjKumYimVBo83C2tQSRyvxht-5QvoQKSa2yZ6sS3hIVheNJ3Fbkbu9SQV1RkA4jCSsB_-83qMRke-HC4Kgn53Wnztldj39MEG-1qSvxhmsgs4R50PpT2MmFHrADQPwP0h47CBXyo_KwKUBeO4Spw%3D%3D) I’d like to tell you a story, friend. This email will be longer than usual, [**so if you don’t have time to read it all, I’d be grateful if you could donate to my campaign.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMh9lDVK_xJfzLyYAY7X_bGwJ0GPJteU6vPbspg1n5HHfAdKNlhX69v7EGRGlCWeaZeSrP7p2ecANrqMP9JgTmr-dPx2tvm-WaLPcNWVCVL0XytPNBDSE3O6_O93XnIJST0rYbcpccBlZHbVcprY7RvUg%3D%3D) [****](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMhkamSimXws5dD88P-MMYQHAr7-MLuE93oF7l_FCigE_J8CsLMC5XO4rOlezPEFONR2a2mh2wAFwihG4L0aF1nb258VWP8G5fpPsXPgArL8BSH-fdpy-c7pO0e9bGUWyehAxsjj3OAnZymxvs5VOpaNg%3D%3D) That’s me and my Aunt Susan. She lived in Boulder my entire life. The only reason I ended up moving to Colorado in the first place was because of her! From a young age she would bring me out to stay the summer, and we would camp in Rocky Mountain National Park, visit hot springs in Buena Vista, see the Rockies play, ski in the winter, and go on countless adventures all over Colorado. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMh_rWKouCGNj7paFG-KZtduFmYEDG3Dz12I7JzL9GgJ9GjffUg9xsx1RvTxAIvgL0X0Co-tcCc8DS9JAjcqb5nBI_3kVyvbUwdUH3GZX2fRv_9bp-JOpQ559q6AsQSCrCpCsiIRPBPOBMzYK7RRKtBgg%3D%3D) She introduced me to her style of sustainable living that prioritized eating organic food, recycling, minimizing your carbon footprint by walking and biking places, and driving a 1988 Volvo sedan despite her ability to afford a much nicer vehicle. She was like a second mom to me. Always there to listen, encourage me to do big things, and to take the time to find out who I was. When I was a teenager, she was diagnosed with lung & kidney cancer – yet she never smoked a day in her life. Growing up, she had the microwave in her basement. When I first visited, I asked why – she said, "those things are cancer machines"! Ironically enough, the woman who was very health conscious and lived a very active life ended up with cancer. After battling lung cancer for over a decade, she finally lost that battle in 2016. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMhuMYGlzXZVQSAfuUOCy1g37kToeI_gtuZ4Opk9ltLGM1-vGy_gHeA9XMfW7U_wOpZPNbKJE6-xjlr_66Puz8kTQzkrHiCo9Lwei3SYG7WR4mKjem9-U5E-hf-YY_4jINd8mqVLKBCkNdbxfJWzIWHdw%3D%3D) She was very introspective about her mortality the last few years before she passed away. Her favorite quote was: _**"The trouble is you think you have time."**_ _I've lived by this ever since._ Watching her and my father pass away gave me a huge sense of urgency. If we don't get involved now to save our country and our planet – it's going to be too late. [**So I’m asking if you’ll join me on my mission to honor my aunt’s words, go to Washington, and fight for our community by donating any amount you can afford to my campaign today.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuYhYkzqo16ovRS0Q9qGnMhqP0TGG1IeYieh334Gkzi5Y_M8EHQgAiFx55NGaclw13o_h7XHUoc10N4lPHmrVpLGIH4FMUZSHdW_FZThAKcHJE7pLvrOjq6cXycsuJG_-tE-5_11MkDspBlGjTuae52gw1qWcHrPpQI4RNogYeh5g%3D%3D) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 NOW!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuReVoetsyDZzfeTTkcTHhng6D-9UU_9nsdBx2EUKFKkJ5lPUwaXaHrr8SmWnMQtrHZVllZVLUwCYPzH1jM_p3nJ_eKMYk8hc19jYzTQNNtQK4XKKOFgGUJSsdS-f6GduYZ32URxWD1fBV2XATnPTVHzeSon1H6QpXAKxzw95NJA2E_2nmuUXcorxjX5pexn3ghNksFJr5oE9uUHQ2rI-zu) | [DONATE $25 NOW!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=94e6d69d228c45e69958e5e7a330aecc&_e=12J9cMpUNDiAf0rAJcasnModQYWzdkbi76ZT8-97_UkHyLJNee9l3e9WGPfGesW1t1FQuh51FrG0BVqJNzspJdTqpL1a5SKoA8G1Q4Xg5nULIk2U_NlPSemazPnCnUWfoLGdHXhEBYk107kgcR1RRuOjEb8OHTHoWFB8m_DWM4Ib0qEkLpV7qyq5ZpfrkYgyvcztaMl7Pwx9Ip4EL_qitDj_Y302BoVDaXqDeEWmxZuReVoetsyDZzfeTTkcTHhng6D-9UU_9nsdBx2EUKFKkMy2zXe3BZ2vgCnrQqCAFccJdao6nY8qbsrofEBimfAGfqHkPtc2syCbS530o6s--B4lm-s2BuK6ajVaXeRtIPF8wQxGgKTxM8Op9-r0v7GCP7gp9QmC2EmYsWHUr13UcZw5-qtn-BKtE-rgErmI-9lT5ZIsxsoN5plxoEMoQXNz)

clean_body: I just wanted to follow up on my email from yesterday, friend. You see, my aunt had an incredibly deep influence on my life – she’s one of the reasons I’m now running for Congress. I’ve always told you family is the most important thing to me, and she was no exception. | | | I just wanted to follow up on my email from yesterday, friend. You see, my aunt had an incredibly deep influence on my life – she’s one of the reasons I’m now running for Congress. I’ve always told you family is the most important thing to me, and she was no exception. Thank you so much. John Padora \------ Begin Original Message ------ I’d like to tell you a story, friend. This email will be longer than usual, That’s me and my Aunt Susan. She lived in Boulder my entire life. The only reason I ended up moving to Colorado in the first place was because of her! From a young age she would bring me out to stay the summer, and we would camp in Rocky Mountain National Park, visit hot springs in Buena Vista, see the Rockies play, ski in the winter, and go on countless adventures all over Colorado. She introduced me to her style of sustainable living that prioritized eating organic food, recycling, minimizing your carbon footprint by walking and biking places, and driving a 1988 Volvo sedan despite her ability to afford a much nicer vehicle. She was like a second mom to me. Always there to listen, encourage me to do big things, and to take the time to find out who I was. When I was a teenager, she was diagnosed with lung & kidney cancer – yet she never smoked a day in her life. Growing up, she had the microwave in her basement. When I first visited, I asked why – she said, "those things are cancer machines"! Ironically enough, the woman who was very health conscious and lived a very active life ended up with cancer. After battling lung cancer for over a decade, she finally lost that battle in 2016. She was very introspective about her mortality the last few years before she passed away. Her favorite quote was: "The trouble is you think you have time." I've lived by this ever since. Watching her and my father pass away gave me a huge sense of urgency. If we don't get involved now to save our country and our planet – it's going to be too late. Friend, When the country lost its mind during COVID, when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue, Florida stood as a citadel of freedom and a refuge of sanity not only for our citizens, but for people throughout this country. We fought the media. We fought the Left. We fought bureaucrats like Fauci. We kept our state open. We kept our kids in school. And we ended up booming like never before. **We fought back against elites who wanted to plunge society into lockdown dystopia.** We bucked Fauci, we bucked the establishment, and we will do this nationwide when I'm President. **Anthony Fauci forced Americans to stay locked inside their homes and out of work, locked children out of school, demanded masks on their faces, forced them to get COVID jabs, and _lied before Congress._**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: I will bring accountability to the Washington Elite. I will break the swamp. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, When the country lost its mind during COVID, when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue, Florida stood as a citadel of freedom and a refuge of sanity not only for our citizens, but for people throughout this country. We fought the media. We fought the Left. We fought bureaucrats like Fauci. We kept our state open. We kept our kids in school. And we ended up booming like never before. We fought back against elites who wanted to plunge society into lockdown dystopia. We bucked Fauci, we bucked the establishment, and we will do this nationwide when I'm President. Anthony Fauci forced Americans to stay locked inside their homes and out of work, locked children out of school, demanded masks on their faces, forced them to get COVID jabs, and lied before Congress. | As President, I'm going to be willing to stand in and make the tough decisions. You can't coddle bureaucrats like Dr. Fauci.The way you treat somebody like Dr. Fauci is very simple. You tell him, Anthony, you're fired. I am tired of the excuses, and I refuse to put up with them any longer. Fauci has committed criminal offenses and the lack of accountability he has faced is dangerous. I need your support to take down the Washington elites who are bending the rules, protecting their own, and forcing the American people to pay the price. Please, if you can, will you join me in breaking the swamp? | | If I were President in 2020, Fauci would have been fired. He should be prosecuted for his crimes. I know who I'm fighting for, and what the cost of losing is. This election, we win; they lose. No excuses. "Will you support my campaign by sending in $25?" | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%%

| Peter-
I need your input.
Congress is out of session during the month of August. I'm using that time to hear from supporters about the issues they care about and what I should be focusing on when I return to Washington, D.C.
As Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force, I'm developing solutions to combat the Mexican drug cartels that are trafficking deadly fentanyl into our communities and killing Americans. I've developed legislation to:

* Authorize the use of military force against the Mexican drug cartels
* Increase criminal penalties against anyone who aids and abets cartel activity
* Impose sanctions on foreign officials who facilitate cartel operations

This work has received a lot of attention, including from the President of Mexico, who promised to campaign against me in my upcoming election.
I need a lot of resources to fight back against a foreign president... [will you donate $50, $25, even $5, to show Mexico's President we're not going to let him interfere in our elections?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00157a1H-RDp672lz5DFSis8WKvQW-8WUlu74afLb8eM7dkx6y5p6dsCHeUHFR1X3HcayLvJU9yc9QmFzj7swQ3fdvPdN9vqiC0VA5-S2ZoWzug2o-eN-A1rQT_teAIiNzuQ8j1MPT6tuNJ_nEzXXRb3bbxWLhzcRgixBA50anXdR8kneXvLrWMX8ijNAbQuuS52839ip30wTJu_c3z_3b3aOaanf1c6H3yd3MX2nsG79bbx5YVWNCBtLVlguxWDxID5Up1mDAYSF7AFTp_hTF1teSEqVYMNbVzUzs9z2PhdyvBqIHDWpevsFUZzd0P4kH2V1j3JuD1EiE=&c=dN2PFSejkENnrMqRhADUT-H_HmS_ZxXs-c82pEmo77Gnn9zlJYidzA==&ch=Z3UEYw0VlZx8dZ0sNeKmEA0QAxwNbpnbJyxlZBBny7NlmXngQsPAsg==)

| As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, I'm fighting back against Joe Biden's attacks on the American oil and gas industry. I'm working hard to:

* Prevent Biden's radical EPA from obstructing American energy projects
* Ensure American refineries are able to continue producing gasoline without their operations being shut down by the Biden Administration
* Debunk the lies from radical environmentalists who want to destroy American energy independence

And I'm also working to protect our kids from the dangerous transgender ideology that pushes sex change surgery for children. I've introduced legislation to stop your taxpayer dollars from funding programs at children's hospitals that encourage and even facilitate so-called "gender affirming care" for children.
I need your input on what issues should be prioritized when I return to Washington, D.C. in just a few short weeks. There are so many problems to tackle under the failed leadership of Joe Biden, but with your help I can ensure I'm focusing on the issues important to you to get America back on track.
[TAKE THE SURVEY: What issues are most important to you?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00157a1H-RDp672lz5DFSis8WKvQW-8WUlu74afLb8eM7dkx6y5p6dsCHeUHFR1X3Hcpa_eSBhXq88o-4JIJ1zsykqMcm5tks1xYqmg5-O4Ke_RODmr1C9hPfJOXj0DNCkdcYqZ53wVdNwpSCEFKWLwvEB851ZgWhbPBjxKE2fyr7CvQIsL9xeO9uiqJoifsf_T&c=dN2PFSejkENnrMqRhADUT-H_HmS_ZxXs-c82pEmo77Gnn9zlJYidzA==&ch=Z3UEYw0VlZx8dZ0sNeKmEA0QAxwNbpnbJyxlZBBny7NlmXngQsPAsg==)

* Combatting the Mexican drug cartels and stopping fentanyl trafficking
* Securing the southern border
* Increasing production of American oil and gas
* Addressing the weaponization of the federal government against conservatives
* Protecting our kids from radical transgender ideology
* Reducing government waste and spending

Please [take this survey](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00157a1H-RDp672lz5DFSis8WKvQW-8WUlu74afLb8eM7dkx6y5p6dsCHeUHFR1X3Hcpa_eSBhXq88o-4JIJ1zsykqMcm5tks1xYqmg5-O4Ke_RODmr1C9hPfJOXj0DNCkdcYqZ53wVdNwpSCEFKWLwvEB851ZgWhbPBjxKE2fyr7CvQIsL9xeO9uiqJoifsf_T&c=dN2PFSejkENnrMqRhADUT-H_HmS_ZxXs-c82pEmo77Gnn9zlJYidzA==&ch=Z3UEYw0VlZx8dZ0sNeKmEA0QAxwNbpnbJyxlZBBny7NlmXngQsPAsg==) so I know what issues you care about and can focus my work in Congress accordingly.
As always, thank you for your support, and I look forward to hearing from you.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: This isn’t a Republican or Democratic Issue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
One place we should always come together is making sure our Military is supported.
#
Derek —
Our newest ad hitting Tommy Tuberville is running on TV in Alabama. It’s from a Veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan, and he lives in Alabama.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-august23-games.T-vzAb&refcode=em230804-1-30&t=1&akid=13900%2E3013755%2E90ykH3)
But one thing we didn’t say in the ad is that this Veteran voted for Trump in 2016.
That drives home what we’ve been getting at this whole time:
This isn’t a Republican or a Democratic issue. Our National Security is an American issue.
Proud Americans can disagree on a lot of things. That’s expected. But one place we should always come together is making sure our Military is supported, and that our leaders are in the right places to keep our people safe.
Because of Tommy Tuberville, that’s not the case.
Until he changes course, we will keep up the fight. But it’d be a whole lot easier if we had you with us.
**[So if you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first donation, today is the day. $3 or anything you can afford. Please.](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-august23-games.T-vzAb&refcode=em230804-1-30&t=2&akid=13900%2E3013755%2E90ykH3)**
| [CHIP IN $3](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-august23-games.T-vzAb&refcode=em230804-1-30&t=3&akid=13900%2E3013755%2E90ykH3)
---

The team at VoteVets

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: For the first time in 14 years, we have the opportunity to compete to turn Wisconsin Blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
This is huge, friends.
On Monday, liberals regained control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court for the first time in nearly two decades.
Earlier this week, a lawsuit was filed to challenge Wisconsin’s heavily gerrymandered legislative maps. That means there is a chance fair maps and competitive races will return to Wisconsin in 2024.
Today, I’m setting up a special fund to help flip these legislative seats the moment we get fair maps in Wisconsin.
This is just the beginning of our battle for change and the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee and Wisconsin Assembly Democrats need our continued support to turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
**[So please, can you contribute $5 to our fund to flip the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=1&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee, the Wisconsin Assembly Democrats, and The Long Run:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.3dNr2f&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=20&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.Y4XBgr&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=21&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.0NVALl&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=22&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K0olN4&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=23&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.CcLfzi&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=24&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=25&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
For 12 years, Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature have abused their power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites.
They’ve forced through voter suppression laws, attacks on unions and collective bargaining, and kept in place Wisconsin’s draconian 1849 ban on abortion.
**Now, with the potential for fair maps on the horizon, we _finally_ have the opportunity to win a legislative majority and undo the damage they’ve caused.**
Wisconsin is a battleground state and with critical policy decisions like climate protection, voting rights, and reproductive freedom on the line, we _must_ help voters regain trust in our democracy and show out to the polls to vote for Democrats up and down the ballot. But I can’t win this fight alone.
So I am asking you to join me to flip Wisconsin’s state legislature.
**[If you can, please contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, to our fund to win Wisconsin and take back the legislative majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230804-1-tt&t=26&akid=4708%2E196590%2E5xw0Kr)
Thank you in advance for your contribution. Change is on the horizon.
Mandela

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: Join the cause of truth
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWDt29FDN0

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDt29FDN0

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tell=20It=20Like=20It=20Is=20PAC?=
subject: ICYMI: Chris Christie Visits Ukraine, Highlighting GOP Divide Over U.S. Role
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
ICYMI: Chris Christie Visits Ukraine, Highlighting GOP Divide Over U.S. Role | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e658ea1622e3/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559856?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---

**In Case You Missed It:
Chris Christie Visits Ukraine, Highlighting GOP Divide Over U.S. Role**

|
---
_“While Donald Trump was under arrest in a Washington D.C. courtroom, Chris Christie was in Ukraine standing with our ally for freedom. The contrast couldn’t be clearer. Governor Christie was showing real leadership, while Donald Trump was being arraigned for the third time in fourth months. America is the leader of democracy around the world – we are the shining light for liberty in the world. Under a Christie administration, America will stand up against authoritarian aggressors.”
\- Tell It Like It Is PA_C
|
---
|
---
[The Washington Post](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=7c12e54e35&e=d0a9afa930)
Maeve Reston
August 4, 2023
“Republican Chris Christie... visited Ukraine on Friday where he met President Volodymyr Zelensky on a trip that underscored the sharp GOP divisions over U.S. support for the country in its war against Russia and the high stakes for Ukraine, which now depends on American military and economic aid for its survival.
“The former New Jersey governor arrived in Kyiv on Friday for what he billed as a fact-finding mission to assess the effectiveness of U.S. military aid to Ukraine, though Christie remained within the relatively safe confines of the Kyiv region and did not visit front-line positions where Western weapons are being used in a bid to oust the Russian invaders from occupied territory. Christie also visited Moshchun and Bucha, which were ravaged by Russian forces before they were forced to retreat in spring 2022 and where Russian soldiers were accused of war crimes. ...
“In an interview with The Washington Post aboard an overnight train to Kyiv from Poland, Christie said he hoped Republican voters had begun to reconsider which of their party’s candidates will have the bandwidth to grapple ‘with the really complicated issues that the next president will have to deal with — including Ukraine — ‘and who is going to be dealing with trying to keep themselves out of jail.’
“His comment was a reference to Trump, who was arraigned in federal court on Thursday on charges related to his efforts to overturn the 2020 election, and who was charged in two separate criminal cases earlier this year.
“Beyond his argument that Trump is too mired in his morass of legal problems to focus on the most consequential decisions facing the United States, Christie also sought to amplify the policy differences between the two over the war between Russia and Ukraine. Those differences loom not just over the GOP primary but also the debate in Congress about future aid. ...
“We have people in the party like Trump and Ron DeSantis, Vivek, who are giving people a false choice, which is ‘Well, we can only do one thing; we can either improve things in the States or we can help Ukraine,’ Christie said. ‘When you look at the amount of money we’ve sent to Ukraine as a percentage of the federal budget, anybody who can do the math knows that’s a ridiculous statement.’...
“Led through Bucha’s Church of St. Andrew by Mayor Anatoly Fedoruk, Christie viewed graphic photographs mounted on easels throughout the church, documenting the bodies of torture victims. Fedoruk described how residents had been brutalized by Russian soldiers. Outside, Christie placed flowers at a memorial site marking the mass graves.
“Americans are a particularly visual nation; Things aren’t as real to us if we don’t get to see them, ’Christie said as he left the church. ‘By seeing them we feel them. And so I’m here because I want the American people to see the things that I’m seeing — and I’m confident that when they do, that the resolve they already have — and there are hundreds of millions of Americans who support our partnership with Ukraine —but their resolve will become even greater.’
“I will tell everyone at home whatI saw here,’ Christie told the mayor as he left Bucha. ‘Stay strong.’ ...”
-###-

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: What I thought on the drive back from the DC Courthouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
It’s a very sad day for America.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1unDAUhZ_G7Bjh6x_MgkUTa7oYtWoqtWmzGRn7MnNTbBCYoLx9xWiS7XeOrPP5ujgN1L-3rH5gAFcKCwNg4gsDOMmHP9_16flky79ft5fSaiW3PYVHBpDfJ_ys3l85YHQ07LS2RWjBG_C-wJbrhnNtpOHFte3BN072SmIXuqrjukEPClSjpMNe9QW1UIGoTCV5XVXQHDpjupoHrEBpjqZmstooHcKY3BBe87zG6eDHWAztNedpuU06Mjgu6NcZDxulGcPe2Jl7w9JFnMm78nWklMt-TWF2tFC6lH6MkXJGZHCUCkAbIwMP0BnZMXFcczxHDLRGJuxdVu9wGdfZIxPW09ndmXdxcnRJTNgPoY9kTBlTZsI2xjQM9DkNFJiw_349fftxUtvz2w3eziHsb_NTPfLL00sxt2HaaBho0fsvXPYFu9j_AAAA__-2Xovf)
---
Friend,
On my drive back from the federal courthouse – where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man – I thought that this was truly a sad day for America.
As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti.
_This is not the place that I left behind._
**But it’s emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation’s capital.**
This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot.
So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he’s going to prosecute me.
As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America.
Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2OpCAUhZ8Gd1bggogLF9NNqheVTGZ6MT-9qSAXrdsRNIpj-u0nVqp7-50Tcj6ui_NI_UfL6icGcCNcGQCT3xjART39-a4vvy-2_Puyv5VWV2o_UnhmAPljDl_VxyunEB2NB61tgS14A94XoRW6EUIbZURxa3vDPXLFJapKCA-9x04qUemG875BX1ALHCQ3XImac2hOnTFdLTBwqLQIpmaK75ROOCU34ntetjif_BSLsb3lPK_3SWcG5zX4bQmnndIS8GgczP0LpYthIe_K94lSLvst4eJopTSUfoqRcg6BwVlVANoYhQKhM6pj8rzleI0BaYtM2oesPuA6bYsPTFpPV_dg3sXZ0ZCYtJ9Cn8mUckiZSdsY0zDQ1zQSMmkHeOnBY3j9cYf3c0j7y7xWz2L4-VYsLc47jSOt-viF4VhwiP0PAAD__9lXiw4)
---

clean_body: It’s a very sad day for America. | | | Friend, On my drive back from the federal courthouse – where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man – I thought that this was truly a sad day for America. As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti. This is not the place that I left behind. But it’s emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation’s capital. This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot. So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he’s going to prosecute me. As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America. Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again. | If you are doing poorly due to the sinister forces who run Washington, DC right now, don’t even think about donating! | Thank you, | Donald J. Friend, When the country lost its mind during COVID, when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue, Florida stood as a citadel of freedom and a refuge of sanity not only for our citizens, but for people throughout this country. We fought the media. We fought the Left. We fought bureaucrats like Fauci. We kept our state open. We kept our kids in school. And we ended up booming like never before. **We fought back against elites who wanted to plunge society into lockdown dystopia.** We bucked Fauci, we bucked the establishment, and we will do this nationwide when I'm President. **Anthony Fauci forced Americans to stay locked inside their homes and out of work, locked children out of school, demanded masks on their faces, forced them to get COVID jabs, and _lied before Congress._**

**As President, I'm going to be willing to stand in and make the tough decisions. You can't coddle bureaucrats like Dr. Fauci._The way you treat somebody like Dr. Fauci is very simple. You tell him, Anthony, you're fired._** I am tired of the excuses, and I refuse to put up with them any longer. Fauci has committed criminal offenses and the lack of accountability he has faced is dangerous. I need your support to take down the Washington elites who are bending the rules, protecting their own, and forcing the American people to pay the price. Please, if you can, will you join me in breaking the swamp?

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b332f98db0044744a4f2e7101bd71b7a&_e=d6plHJHkAHny-dGxzWLK3jtLTaZriqcJN295N6OSBIoCqwiEF59GxxfVzMuxXst8KYPpd42I9JNKiTSg6IrXxow0RW-NeAIWysyABpH7WuHZEfEa-feAvkWwexLHXsJCY8zon3VkcpPPGGF3b_d04JPcK3kkuvZBYUt_Fp6AIIrc987GUfBVMOEhg6dw6I9mwyNPm5XZTKxZ8dkGgUOkqIDfgUemeQeX6uKLnPIEJJTQOThgwUIegD25VZC_XCWnbE10j-OdQnIatAwyzwpsefaelw3mNidRKGvuVqVa-so4IIkRXxRTEDWzDN9-8VHfzhJBmZCBt3zQ87tgfn26djriFXfg9Bldl8PolzBeQhdW9VxGTX7TjEDT4JgwNOUak9jt3z3ODfk20jfLilBE6MK5ssN9QrtJ_LPbCEDsQHyEtunnxfOxxNxLOYiVws9RyjRuZAf_7LMMRfyMH4fKzA%3D%3D)
