| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

subject: I’m being put to the test again
body:

**Derek, my colleagues and I have worked tirelessly to ensure that women everywhere can access critical reproductive care. **
From funding the UNFPA to give women around the world the reproductive resources they need, to ensuring that servicewomen accessing reproductive care are able to travel to another state if needed – having the chance to do this incredible work means so much to me, and I’m committed to continuing to fight for a better future for PA-06 and the United States.
But as a representative, my position gets put to the test every two years at the ballot box. The far right is determined to halt the progress of this progressive movement right now. As a critical member of this team, I’m asking if you’ll join me again:
**[_Derek, we set a deadline of recruiting 100 Founding Members by midnight to start the month strong. Can you join me in my fight and become a Founding Member of my 2024 campaign? ---
[**STAND WITH HERITAGE ACTION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=66742ba135304a03bd3de53a81ab3155&_e=66oyY5Hf_tWfI9XtR5J6YyfabS9kH_GKz90zLcub1MQxpe3c--YP3k_BI1ZzVUCWObG3NLwGYYiZ5hKYcxqMLiKA7vrBK_QXg0sb-UsX10EnVSH2Gn81DxUlLXxFqY47WwwdgO0c1KR-RnUMdOqUdEpOD5WuPEv3UCNJPQ1gCwjptOvEJ3Cb5aJ8QM_MUeM9CqksYjHNz2EoGADaxHxqfy47Z3jGSyQXA_wxlmD7zD6D2QykTDjXs7eMkEW0ghlNMyRzYDZU9KjtymR8MUTWTzd4rsUlUeQqxMdhkTQf4VUo_wXDxn2dukSrr8mue7VvPbX4zwp0BLANlys4pee89fss--m3NMABuZcElQCdl1M%3D)

| | Peter, it’s Ryan Walker, and I wanted to share an important update with you. Heritage Action has been locked in a legal battle against the FEC and the Campaign Legal Center (CLC), **a deep-pocketed liberal organization.** The CLC had a clear goal: **Force Heritage Action to disclose the name and addresses of our confidential grassroots supporters. ** This was an effort to dox conservatives. It served no other purposes than to target and harass individuals on the Right. What’s terrifying, is that **Democrat members of the Federal Election Commission weaponized their power to target conservatives** and help the CLC’s lawsuit. **They wanted to intimidate and silence the grassroots.****But we fought back.** Heritage Action doesn’t shy away from a fight,_especially_ when it comes to exposing the corruption and weaponization of the federal government. **We went on offense and used the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to expose the FEC for their abuse of power, and highlight their weaponization of the government against conservatives.** The FEC’s Democrat commissioners refused to allow their agency to disclose already dismissed matters, misled federal judges, and allowed Left-wing allies like CLC to wrongly stand in the FEC’s shoes and attack political opponents in court. Not only did we defeat the Left’s ridiculous lawsuit, but we exposed the political bias in government.**** Our victories in court are a win for the American people. **We believe in fighting on every front, in every battlefield we can!** Whether it is in the courtroom, Congress, or state legislatures, Heritage Action will continue fighting to bring integrity back to our government institutions and protect Americans’ rights.
Peter, as you can imagine, fights and lawsuits like these aren’t cheap, but they are worth every cent if it means protecting grassroots conservatives' privacy and free speech. **That’s why I humbly ask you to stand with Heritage Action[by donating today.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=66742ba135304a03bd3de53a81ab3155&_e=66oyY5Hf_tWfI9XtR5J6YyfabS9kH_GKz90zLcub1MQxpe3c--YP3k_BI1ZzVUCWObG3NLwGYYiZ5hKYcxqMLiKA7vrBK_QXg0sb-UsX10EnVSH2Gn81DxUlLXxFqY47WwwdgO0c1KR-RnUMdOqUdEpOD5WuPEv3UCNJPQ1gCwjptOvEJ3Cb5aJ8QM_MUeM9CqksYjHNz2EoGADaxHxqf_E80XTZ5vj4DR5dU9vIzW5ezVCZlkIg9NcPECDHVUzGuF2uxrbapNhSH6FZupxAnH64rDN7ykppq4m9UF6XwYDDyxUUIfExB7Rm2ClvfyWAjTkeG-zMdJmSTrrTAzF0k0xDlx_pwTAOWHwKu6-gX3A%3D)**

clean_body: Heritage Action has been locked in a legal battle against the FEC and the Campaign Legal Center (CLC), a deep-pocketed liberal organization. | | | | | BREAKING: HERITAGE ACTION SCORESMAJOR LEGAL VICTORYTO DEFEND CONSERVATIVES’ PRIVACY | | Peter, it’s Ryan Walker, and I wanted to share an important update with you. Heritage Action has been locked in a legal battle against the FEC and the Campaign Legal Center (CLC), a deep-pocketed liberal organization. The CLC had a clear goal: Force Heritage Action to disclose the name and addresses of our confidential grassroots supporters. This was an effort to dox conservatives. It served no other purposes than to target and harass individuals on the Right. What’s terrifying, is that Democrat members of the Federal Election Commission weaponized their power to target conservatives and help the CLC’s lawsuit. They wanted to intimidate and silence the grassroots.But we fought back. Heritage Action doesn’t shy away from a fight,especially when it comes to exposing the corruption and weaponization of the federal government. We went on offense and used the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to expose the FEC for their abuse of power, and highlight their weaponization of the government against conservatives. The FEC’s Democrat commissioners refused to allow their agency to disclose already dismissed matters, misled federal judges, and allowed Left-wing allies like CLC to wrongly stand in the FEC’s shoes and attack political opponents in court. Not only did we defeat the Left’s ridiculous lawsuit, but we exposed the political bias in government.** Our victories in court are a win for the American people. We believe in fighting on every front, in every battlefield we can! Whether it is in the courtroom, Congress, or state legislatures, Heritage Action will continue fighting to bring integrity back to our government institutions and protect Americans’ rights. Peter, as you can imagine, fights and lawsuits like these aren’t cheap, but they are worth every cent if it means protecting grassroots conservatives' privacy and free speech. body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=726a60d057ac4e1b89ef5031a85d499b&_e=BoPO5J2TaWSaZ8OhTWttHnaDCQhXv0V-J8Pbikkbj7muSXqD1lmN7cscws5nv6Ot_T0Ftos33jCHoArC93TKZBa8WCmsEWkUeZHn_6a0_o0CGi8dXlHjZZsZtdxQX9e4eaMquhmQAREXTHoXtIGbLcA7MhOTNPcJhmJArof82j949Q-8mtD-BbDRh6ejWfnreQCsalqQ7uz61ZLZxi2aDBE0_iJBx6wrJ7xLU60SZk4F1e0UyDpoyo1QrIDqz-F-HgyNiCTumFfPfVBPNbegWkkCFQT9cS1u5WKxdam8C55zSkwbvsjkHQpxKKxOaMnXs0kaem_X0cDCQANIU7LzNbd58SlvRSWWOQr5jIiNXKWHVTUvm2Tb1VvwOVMBsWgKa3twDd9tNJ-dNKq7LNiYCw%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=726a60d057ac4e1b89ef5031a85d499b&_e=BoPO5J2TaWSaZ8OhTWttHnaDCQhXv0V-J8Pbikkbj7muSXqD1lmN7cscws5nv6Ot_T0Ftos33jCHoArC93TKZBa8WCmsEWkUeZHn_6a0_o0CGi8dXlHjZZsZtdxQX9e4eaMquhmQAREXTHoXtIGbLcA7MhOTNPcJhmJArof82j949Q-8mtD-BbDRh6ejWfnreQCsalqQ7uz61ZLZxi2aDBE0_iJBx6wrJ7xLU60SZk4F1e0UyDpoyo1QrIDqz-F-5O-YQ2-YlqpVA3ivyYLSH0NxZF1GUKPo58cB8FqjzsKmQRiVyONVR14x2y08-3771guajpJkTXHgkpYt58-QrJAzizlfooEf03YCTpcUE5Wm9-XzzInfVeczrB5CARXT50PhCWZa8wHsbW4SgJPGUw%3D%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution of even just $1 to prove that the _REAL_ America knows that we will weather this storm and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=726a60d057ac4e1b89ef5031a85d499b&_e=BoPO5J2TaWSaZ8OhTWttHnaDCQhXv0V-J8Pbikkbj7muSXqD1lmN7cscws5nv6Ot_T0Ftos33jCHoArC93TKZBa8WCmsEWkUeZHn_6a0_o0CGi8dXlHjZZsZtdxQX9e4eaMquhmQAREXTHoXtIGbLcA7MhOTNPcJhmJArof82j949Q-8mtD-BbDRh6ejWfnreQCsalqQ7uz61ZLZxi2aDBE0_iJBx6wrJ7xLU60SZk4F1e0UyDpoyo1QrIDqz-F-PEr-alET9KdSkDaoCUWHczEmZwdschySWn40yMnihQzlhL6VFIspAiKLEWgZC12K7nmi_i8-SfEsVRLFdxd_CEuYzftZf2I4g6AFJaBY16Lq_ynlSY_EzTLFBC3L6XawAbX4H4RX78vBUA1GJaV_Fg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Adding insult to injury. . . | | | | | Patriot, The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed... ...But perhaps most fraudulent of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... It should read Biden v. the American People , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for. We all know that the REAL United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side. Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: to put the United States of America FIRST. After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for America. As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens. Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: " United States of America v. Donald J. Trump." But I know that this is NOT the United States of America. What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic. The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice. And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it. With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| 🎂 Today is President Obama’s 62nd birthday! 🎈 We couldn’t be prouder of the former president’s incredible achievements, from the Affordable Care Act to economic growth and job creation.

Let's make his day even more special! We’re collecting 1,000 signatures for his birthday card to show how grateful we are. And we want your name to be on it!

body:

Fellow Patriot, Another week, another sham indictment against former President Trump. This is made all the more disturbing given that it so closely follows the sweetheart deal that the DOJ proposed for the President’s own son. Sadly, we’ve become all too familiar with the corruption of the Biden DOJ and the weaponization of the government. AFL continues to be the tip of the spear in the fight to reign in such unlawful behavior and restore equal treatment under law.If you have a moment, I urge you to read AFL Vice President and General Counsel Gene Hamilton’s forceful statement on the matter and watch his interview with Jesse Watters last night:Statement: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-statement-following-the-politically-motivated-indictment-of-president-trump-by-special-counsel-jack-smith/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUcAACDkFtQAAAAPl1QAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkzTSlE1BwQQ2kR_-bzA7TlTb_pAAXqZI/2/P61m6xFz7wZ0D3ANANxe6w/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLXN0YXRlbWVudC1mb2xsb3dpbmctdGhlLXBvbGl0aWNhbGx5LW1vdGl2YXRlZC1pbmRpY3RtZW50LW9mLXByZXNpZGVudC10cnVtcC1ieS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtamFjay1zbWl0aC8)
Interview: [_https://www.foxnews.com/video/6332268255112_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUcAACDkFtQAAAAPl1QAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkzTSlE1BwQQ2kR_-bzA7TlTb_pAAXqZI/3/TJ2T-S4Sfw0iY_SQyVWktQ/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdmlkZW8vNjMzMjI2ODI1NTExMg)
In other news, yesterday, AFL filed a Freedom of Information Act Request with the Civil Rights Division of DOJ regarding the Southern Poverty Law Center’s “Year in Hate and Extremism.” The report targeted what the SPLC calls the “anti-government movement,” which included innocuous parents’ rights organizations like Moms for Liberty and Parents Defending Education.The vicious and chilling attacks on the First Amendment rights of parents advocating for their children is a dangerous precedent that has grown since the Biden Administration colluded with the National School Board Association and Attorney General Garland issued his October 4, 2021 memo requesting that the FBI open federal investigations into parents speaking at school board meetings. It is extremely concerning that the Biden Administration has met with SPLC officials at least eleven times during his administration.Given these events and the necessity of American citizens to be able to exercise their First Amendment rights to advocate for their children without government interference, it is imperative for the public to understand the extent of the Department of Justice’s relationship with the SPLC, specifically in relation to the inclusion of parent groups on the SPLC’s 2022 “Year in Hate and Extremism” report. America First Legal will not cease its investigation until the public has full clarity.AFL also recently took action to hold yet another government official accountable for a blatant violation of federal law. AFL demanded a multi-front federal investigation into Dr. David Morens, Senior Advisor to the Director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Disease (NIAID). Dr. Morens was Fauci’s right-hand man during the COVID response of 2020/2021, and he decided to use his personal email address for official business to circumvent a FOIA request and had offered to destroy emails sent to his official account, as shown by documents released by the House Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic. Accordingly, AFL has demanded that the Office of Special Counsel, the HHS Inspector General, and the Archivist of the United States each investigate and work with the DOJ to recover the records and refer any criminal violations for prosecution.As a reminder, we will be hosting our AFL _Weekly Donor Briefing_ with Stephen, **TODAY at 1:30PM EDT**. I hope that you can make it, as we will be discussing these issues and many more in greater depth. Call: **973-528-0083** to join. _Thank you for your patriotism and for being our partner in the fight for our nation!_ In Liberty,Mary
| [**DONATE >>**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUcAACDkFtQAAAAPl1QAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkzTSlE1BwQQ2kR_-bzA7TlTb_pAAXqZI/4/oVBCxMY1o5Xoa-H3RRdKXg/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vcl8yMDIzMDcyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXdlZWtseS1kb25vciZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBH)

Hola Peter,
Our campaign has recently been endorsed by some of the biggest progressive organizations in the country like the Working Families Party, the League of Conservation Voters, and PODER PAC.
Their support proves that our campaign is the true, progressive choice in this race. When it comes to issues like the climate crisis, reproductive freedom, economic justice, and democracy, we will always lead without apology.
But we can’t lead on these issues for Arizona and force Congress to act if we don’t have the resources to win this election – that’s why we need your support! Can you chip in $10 or whatever you’re able to our campaign right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080423_progressiveleadership&amount=10]
From housing and homelessness, civil rights, and the ongoing climate crisis, we know how much is at stake for us in 2024.
Raquel has spent nearly two decades fighting for working families, and with your support, we can take the fight to Congress. Support our grassroots campaign today with a contribution of $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080423_progressiveleadership&amount=10]
Sí se puede,
Team Terán

**They just INDICTED President Trump...AGAIN.**

President Trump and other Republicans running for President are DOMINATING Joe Biden in the latest polls, so what does Biden’s corrupt DOJ do? They just INDICTED President Trump...AGAIN. Joe Biden has corrupted our federal government and weaponized it against Conservatives in an unprecedented way. It’s un-American, and we must DEMAND an end to it. The ONLY way to reverse Joe Biden’s shameful actions as President is to DEFEAT him andhis radical Left-wing cronies in Washington in 2024. First, they come after President Trump,and then it could be us next. Let’s make sure Republicans TAKE BACK the Senate Majority, Peter. Jailing political opponents only happens in THIRD-WORLD banana republics, which is exactly what Biden and the Communists in Washington are turning this country into. We can STILL SAVE AMERICA before it’s too late, but we have to have the support of our top patriots like you. clean_body: | | | | This can’t be ignored. | Peter, we have a serious border security and terrorism problem: We are seeing an alarming surge in encounters. Fentanyl is pouring into this country from the border. The number of these encounters has increased ninefold. This is clearly a national security threat that cannot be ignored any longer. Can you help me tackle this issue head-on? | Together, we can make a real difference and ensure a safer future for our country. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=24786a36867a468cbb25db8b6e933fd7&_e=an8E3RL4Tz59qRayRNmgmsNPjfrknrUz59wzDgGmpTdzLHp8DZMie9pnluR87xpJSyskUZfRSc8Yz1-GdR_iNzwoMZklxV32YF_61VouQcMBJ_kEhxmiy9a1viRoHh5Mx4Fzpv4JKDVb9ywQU0758YP59jhwXX8X4_2xE-8FXbBY9R0I7JRhGMws-LMjWLfUq7z3DJKvASflWuZR3R9wNsBz_aIsb4x1r41uzJHbqZRHsA7piNoG2DYLIpGsXYbuMV3NjUr72Ww63VR7Yr5DlR8eZ9hs76wcxsHC7wSptsd84uMXy1vcCGkee7xbaedZA-KJm0kzopQlklDj-MqQ2ijf7FN6VcBhnbVV_BRUz1FPTWvOgKON7CxdIWWIIQEiUjVQHyl7FGZub-w1rBK0tZJXVgqwYOvNY6-qQMTGMRY%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Folks, we want to share some good news: **Governor Gretchen Whitmer recently signed legislation banning the horrific practice of conversion therapy in Michigan. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67596158/420205776/-392451408?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWIzNmY5ODYtZjEzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pnxtxT2zliHIB2hPfm7Z6xj4ib4v7tzbGlkYm2mOruQ=&emci=0a36f986-f132-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=1b36f986-f132-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753) Here in Michigan, we will fight for your freedom to be who you are and live as your authentic self. This past June, Governor Whitmer also established the first ever, state-wide LGBTQ+ Commission, in addition to signing into law a bipartisan amendment to the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act (ELCRA) that explicitly includes protections for sexual orientation and gender identity.
All of this progress is not only due to decades of organizing by pro-LGBTQ+ groups and activists, it’s a direct result of the will of Michigan voters in the 2022 midterm elections, who rejected a dangerous, anti-LGBTQ+ campaign by radical politicians.
Together, we will keep working to expand our fundamental freedoms and fight back against any and all forms of discrimination.
Thank you for all that you do to help make Michigan a place where anyone can build a brighter future.

I’ll keep this email short, but I wanted to reach out and let you know about some news that broke in this race yesterday. WPRI reported that the father-in-law of one of Gabe’s opponents has put in $125,000 to help him win this election, supporting a Super PAC working to get Gabe’s opponent elected. Gabe’s family doesn't have $125,000 to spend to get him elected to Congress, but just like Gabe, they’ve been serving our community for decades. His mom’s a nursing home nurse, and his dad’s a small business owner.That’s why I’m asking you to chip in TODAY. body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

I wanted to share an important update on national security.

Right now, Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville is blocking hundreds of military promotions and refusing to fill key leadership posts.

In fact, this is the first time in 164 years that the Marine Corps doesn’t have a leader confirmed by the Senate.

Why? Because Tuberville wants to push a culture war and is willing to use our servicemembers as political pawns.

https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-08-tuberville [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-08-tuberville]

In Iraq and Afghanistan, I fought alongside servicemembers from every race, gender, and political affiliation. We had each other’s backs and still do.

Tuberville’s political games are an affront to our servicemembers and jeopardize our national security.

I will not sit quietly while people attack the rights of women who have stood up to serve this country — especially from people who have never served themselves.

Add your name to demand Senator Tommy Tuberville end this reckless military blockade. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-08-tuberville]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-08-tuberville]

Thank you,

— Jason Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-august-2023]

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: My campaign + Missouri’s election-winning labor movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you please give me a moment to explain why this coalition matters so much to our campaign?
#
Peter — earlier than ever before for a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri, working people are uniting behind our movement to replace Josh Hawley.
**In a moment, I’m going to tell you why the support of this election-winning coalition matters in this race.** But first, let me share a little more about my background and why I’m running for this seat:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
**[CHIP IN TO ELECT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)**
I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Jeff City, right in the middle of Missouri. Like most Missourians, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, medical bills bankrupted us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
But we weren’t alone. When my parents had to take my sister to get surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat.
The support from our community motivated me to work hard, stay focused on school, and run on the cross-country team. That all helped me get into college, which I could afford thanks to a Pell Grant and scholarships from people around town. I got to keep running there too.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
After college and law school, I joined the Marines to honor and serve the community that had done so much for me. I was active duty for 13 years. Deployed to Iraq once, Afghanistan twice. Then the Joint Staff at the Pentagon, where I'd go on to help lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
In the Marines, I learned what service for your country really means: Doing the right thing — even when you’re far away from home — and never forgetting the community you signed up to serve. **But for every tour of duty, I also learned just how little service meant to corrupt elites like Josh Hawley.**
I led a police training team in Iraq, running missions outside the wire through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. Near our camp, a burn pit bathed us in toxic fumes for months. And when we came back home, politicians like Hawley turned their backs on us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
Between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, I was stationed at Camp Pendleton. While our politicians let Wall Street banks gamble away our economy, I fought to protect service members from predatory scams and illegal foreclosures.
I deployed twice to Afghanistan. Learned Pashto. Investigated corruption. I saw how lies from corrupt leaders in Washington cost us two decades, trillions of dollars, and thousands of American lives.
Then at the Pentagon, I saw how Big Oil bought off our politicians so dictators, war criminals, and a handful of corporate executives got to decide how much Americans pay for energy — while authoritarian oligarchs in China start to dominate renewable energy.
But between tours, one of the hardest things was coming back home and seeing what was going on in my old neighborhood. The community I had signed up to serve was stripped for parts. The corner store boarded up. Our first family home even bulldozed down. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
The whole time politicians like Hawley kept voting to send Marines like me overseas to fight pointless wars, they were letting their corporate mega-donors gut our communities back home. **And now they don’t just attack our way of life, but also the democracy I swore to defend.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed us he’s a fraud and a coward who will cut and run at the first sign of trouble.
I’m running for U.S. Senate because Missourians deserve a senator who’s willing to stand and fight for them. They deserve a warrior for working people — and I'm ready to serve.
**Now we’ve united on-the-ground leaders, workers, and everyday people across Missouri into a record-breaking movement to take on Josh Hawley.** This is the same coalition that defeated an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam statewide by 67.5%-32.5% in 2018.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)
The national GOP and corporate elites are afraid of the movement we're building because this is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and they know we’re not going to waste it. **So I have to ask:**
**[Will you chip in $10 or anything you can afford right now to help us flip this U.S. Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, which means I’m relying on real people like you to power this campaign forward every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35401?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35400?refcode=em20230804-3506&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=3506%2E614464%2EF0Qr0X)

Together, we can take back our power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country again.
Thanks for always having my back, Peter.
Let’s get to work,
Lucas Kunce

clean_body: Will you please give me a moment to explain why this coalition matters so much to our campaign? Peter — earlier than ever before for a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri, working people are uniting behind our movement to replace Josh Hawley. In a moment, I’m going to tell you why the support of this election-winning coalition matters in this race. But first, let me share a little more about my background and why I’m running for this seat: I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Jeff City, right in the middle of Missouri. Like most Missourians, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, medical bills bankrupted us. But we weren’t alone. When my parents had to take my sister to get surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat. The support from our community motivated me to work hard, stay focused on school, and run on the cross-country team. That all helped me get into college, which I could afford thanks to a Pell Grant and scholarships from people around town. I got to keep running there too. After college and law school, I joined the Marines to honor and serve the community that had done so much for me. I was active duty for 13 years. Deployed to Iraq once, Afghanistan twice. Then the Joint Staff at the Pentagon, where I'd go on to help lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia. In the Marines, I learned what service for your country really means: Doing the right thing — even when you’re far away from home — and never forgetting the community you signed up to serve. But for every tour of duty, I also learned just how little service meant to corrupt elites like Josh Hawley. I led a police training team in Iraq, running missions outside the wire through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. Near our camp, a burn pit bathed us in toxic fumes for months. And when we came back home, politicians like Hawley turned their backs on us. Between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, I was stationed at Camp Pendleton. While our politicians let Wall Street banks gamble away our economy, I fought to protect service members from predatory scams and illegal foreclosures. I deployed twice to Afghanistan. Learned Pashto. Investigated corruption. I saw how lies from corrupt leaders in Washington cost us two decades, trillions of dollars, and thousands of American lives. Then at the Pentagon, I saw how Big Oil bought off our politicians so dictators, war criminals, and a handful of corporate executives got to decide how much Americans pay for energy — while authoritarian oligarchs in China start to dominate renewable energy. But between tours, one of the hardest things was coming back home and seeing what was going on in my old neighborhood. The community I had signed up to serve was stripped for parts. The corner store boarded up. Our first family home even bulldozed down. Here’s all that’s left of it: The whole time politicians like Hawley kept voting to send Marines like me overseas to fight pointless wars, they were letting their corporate mega-donors gut our communities back home. And now they don’t just attack our way of life, but also the democracy I swore to defend. On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed us he’s a fraud and a coward who will cut and run at the first sign of trouble. I’m running for U.S. Senate because Missourians deserve a senator who’s willing to stand and fight for them. They deserve a warrior for working people — and I'm ready to serve. Now we’ve united on-the-ground leaders, workers, and everyday people across Missouri into a record-breaking movement to take on Josh Hawley. This is the same coalition that defeated an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam statewide by 67.5%-32.5% in 2018. The national GOP and corporate elites are afraid of the movement we're building because this is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and they know we’re not going to waste it. So I have to ask: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we can take back our power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country again. Thanks for always having my back, Peter. Let’s get to work, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred

They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger. And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice. Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"! Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [] I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority. But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [] Let's do this. Colin Allred [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

Recently, Cori and Rashida were part of a small group of progressives who opposed a horrible GOP resolution that denied Israeli apartheid and reaffirmed unconditional support for the government of Israel, despite its rapidly escalating violence against Palestinians. The next day, both congresswomen boycotted the speech of Israeli president Isaac Herzog, in protest of Israel’s racist policies.
Predictably, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC have been coming for Cori and Rashida ever since. **Especially as Jewish Americans, it’s crucial that we back our champions up as they face vicious smear campaigns from anti-Palestinian groups.**
Now is the time to show up for the members of Congress who are calling for a true end to U.S. complicity in Israeli apartheid.
In solidarity,
Beth Miller
Political Director, JVP Action PAC

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: AIPAC is at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
They’re targeting Jamaal Bowman.
#
We just got word: AIPAC is at it again. **They’re trying to recruit an establishment executive to run against my brother in The Bronx, Jamaal Bowman.**
We know what comes next. AIPAC won’t wait much longer to start funneling dark money against Jamaal and ramping up attacks against our movement.
[Will you chip in $5 to Jamaal’s campaign as he stands up to AIPAC?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)**
We’ve seen the AIPAC playbook. They target progressive, working-class candidates of color. They abuse campaign finance laws to spend millions of dollars on misleading attack ads. And they’re willing to undermine democracy to slow our progressive movement — they endorsed 109 insurrectionist Republicans.1
**AIPAC has usually held off from opposing incumbent members of the Squad. Not this time.**
The fact they’re trying to make a play now, as Jamaal runs for his third term in Congress, means _they think they have a path to victory._
[It’s up to us to make sure Jamaal has what he needs to defend his seat from AIPAC and keep our progressive movement strong. Will you please help Jamaal fight back today with a contribution?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)**
Jamaal and I form the “Bronx delegation” in the House, and there’s no one I’d rather have by my side. Jamaal unapologetically speaks truth to power. He’s unafraid to call out the BS that holds us back from real progress. And he does all that from a place of deep compassion and radical joy. When he greets you with “peace and love,” he means it.
As a former middle-school principal, community leader, working father of three, and proud Black man, we need Jamaal’s voice in Congress — especially as MAGA Republican extremists continue to target our schools and our children.
**So today, I’m asking you to take a stand against dark money and shady special interests – because when we do, we win.**
[If you can, please donate to help keep Jamaal in Congress where he belongs.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman.XIGIXY&refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

1 - [**The Nation:** AIPAC vs. Democracy](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20372?t=25&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230804-jamaal-bowman?refcode=em20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&t=26&refcode2=4750_2526796_sZQof3&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230804-4750-P_FND_ANO_OPP&t=27&akid=4750%2E2526796%2EsZQof3)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Action Needed: Protect kids from the dangers of unchecked social media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67600222/420213959/623074613?code=jtk1343-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAyNDY5MTktZjkzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2DHcjxTTRIOQfnADQZMGYmvJwwqAH-sAQtTwbn6jhfc=&emci=058c5213-5932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=50246919-f932-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,
Experts are sounding the alarm: America’s youth are facing a mental health crisis, and there’s increasing evidence to show unchecked and intentionally targeted social media use is fueling it. The statistics around teenagers and social media are remarkable. According to Surgeon General Vivek H. Murthy in a recent op-ed for the Washington Post, "nearly all teenagers in the United States (95 percent) use social media platforms – two-thirds use them daily and more than one-third 'almost constantly.'" It’s no coincidence that teens are also reporting record levels of hopelessness and despair – feelings being fueled by black box social media algorithms which facilitate bullying, eating disorders, suicidal thoughts, and more. The situation is so dire that the Surgeon General recently issued a formal advisory on social media and its effect on youth mental health. And it starts well before the teenage years with carefully crafted, highly addictive, data driven models....designed to hook our kids as soon as they encounter a screen. **We simply cannot afford to let these trends continue unabated. That’s why I’m taking urgent action in the Senate: My bill, the Kids Online Safety Act, just passed unanimously out of committee and is headed to the Senate floor.** This lifesaving plan would provide specific tools to stop Big Tech companies from driving toxic content at kids and hold them accountable for putting _**profits over the safety of our children**_. These commonsense steps have growing support from Democrats and Republicans, young people and their parents, mental health experts and public interest advocates. In fact it was just voted unanimously out of committee with the support of 44 US Senators co-sponsoring this legislation from both sides of the aisle. **But there are forces aligned against us and we’re still far from crossing the finish line. I need your help to get there.**
**That’s why I’m asking 5,000 supporters to sign my new petition, and I’d be honored if you would represent Pennsylvania, friend.[Please click here to add your name to tell social media companies to stop putting profits over safety and protect our kids!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67600223/420213960/979031202?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1343-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAyNDY5MTktZjkzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2DHcjxTTRIOQfnADQZMGYmvJwwqAH-sAQtTwbn6jhfc=&emci=058c5213-5932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=50246919-f932-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)**
It’s up to all of us to understand this problem and take immediate action to protect our kids. Thanks for adding your voice.

Sincerely,
Dick
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | Friend, Experts are sounding the alarm: America’s youth are facing a mental health crisis, and there’s increasing evidence to show unchecked and intentionally targeted social media use is fueling it. The statistics around teenagers and social media are remarkable. According to Surgeon General Vivek H. Murthy in a recent op-ed for the Washington Post, "nearly all teenagers in the United States (95 percent) use social media platforms – two-thirds use them daily and more than one-third 'almost constantly.'" It’s no coincidence that teens are also reporting record levels of hopelessness and despair – feelings being fueled by black box social media algorithms which facilitate bullying, eating disorders, suicidal thoughts, and more. The situation is so dire that the Surgeon General recently issued a formal advisory on social media and its effect on youth mental health. And it starts well before the teenage years with carefully crafted, highly addictive, data driven models....designed to hook our kids as soon as they encounter a screen. We simply cannot afford to let these trends continue unabated. That’s why I’m taking urgent action in the Senate: My bill, the Kids Online Safety Act, just passed unanimously out of committee and is headed to the Senate floor. This lifesaving plan would provide specific tools to stop Big Tech companies from driving toxic content at kids and hold them accountable for putting profits over the safety of our children. These commonsense steps have growing support from Democrats and Republicans, young people and their parents, mental health experts and public interest advocates. In fact it was just voted unanimously out of committee with the support of 44 US Senators co-sponsoring this legislation from both sides of the aisle. But there are forces aligned against us and we’re still far from crossing the finish line. I need your help to get there. That’s why I’m asking 5,000 supporters to sign my new petition, and I’d be honored if you would represent Pennsylvania, friend. It’s up to all of us to understand this problem and take immediate action to protect our kids. Thanks for adding your voice. Sincerely, Dick | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

Yes, you read that correctly. Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is trying to purge over 191,000 registered voters from the rolls this month under the state’s shameful “use-it-or-lose-it” policy.
To put the impact of this purge into perspective, 191,000 voters is:
* More than the population of Savannah, Georgia
* More than twice the size of the crowd at a Georgia Bulldogs football game
* About twice as much as Senator Raphael Warnock’s margin of victory in his 2022 Senate runoff race against Herschel Walker
* About four times as much as Senator Jon Ossoff’s margin of victory in his 2021 Senate runoff race against David Perdue

That’s a crucial number of potential voters — who, as we’ve witnessed, can determine the outcome of an election — that Republicans are attempting to disenfranchise.
If Raffensperger successfully purges these 191,000 voters, it could affect the outcome of Georgia elections to come — including the 2024 presidential election. And it could disproportionately silence voters of color.
**We have until August 13 to reach the voters impacted by this purge and help connect them with the information they need to maintain their registrations — so we launched a special Prevent the Purge Fund to assist in these critical mobilization efforts.**
[_**Before the August 13 deadline, will you please rush a donation to the Prevent the Purge Fund? Your support will help our team train volunteers to call and text impacted voters, and will help Fair Fight mitigate any future voter suppression attempts in Georgia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67600601/420214656/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230804_f_voterpurge2_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQ5Njk0MS1mOTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s98iggsi4fNU7OetG0N6w8hjJTtxITXOuC7QkPr1Bzs=)

clean_body: To put the impact of this purge into perspective, 191,000 voters equates to... | | | As you read this, here’s what’s happening in Georgia: | = | = Yes, you read that correctly. Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is trying to purge over 191,000 registered voters from the rolls this month under the state’s shameful “use-it-or-lose-it” policy. To put the impact of this purge into perspective, 191,000 voters is: More than the population of Savannah, Georgia More than twice the size of the crowd at a Georgia Bulldogs football game About twice as much as Senator Raphael Warnock’s margin of victory in his 2022 Senate runoff race against Herschel Walker About four times as much as Senator Jon Ossoff’s margin of victory in his 2021 Senate runoff race against David Perdue That’s a crucial number of potential voters — who, as we’ve witnessed, can determine the outcome of an election — that Republicans are attempting to disenfranchise. If Raffensperger successfully purges these 191,000 voters, it could affect the outcome of Georgia elections to come — including the 2024 presidential election. And it could disproportionately silence voters of color. We have until August 13 to reach the voters impacted by this purge and help connect them with the information they need to maintain their registrations — so we launched a special Prevent the Purge Fund to assist in these critical mobilization efforts. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Fair Fight will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for making this work possible, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. Abigail

But I’m sure it absolutely INFURIATED the hacks over at the failing New York Times to have to write this headline about their very own first poll of the 2024 election: “Breaking news: Trump is crushing G.O.P. rivals, Times/Siena Poll finds” With even the New York Times showing us cruising to the nomination, many are saying it’s already over for the special interest RINO mega-donors and their Deep State-approved candidate.. And that’s because YOU — the more than 74 MILLION patriots who make up our America First Movement — will NEVER let a handful of shadowy billionaires BUY this nomination. Soros even admitted that his dream scenario for 2024 was a long and drawn-out Republican primary that would allow Biden to sneak by unscathed for months on end. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Less Than 100 Days Until Election Day_ This week we passed the 100 day mark until municipal Election Day in Indiana. On November 7, we have candidates across the state running to bring good governance and fresh energy to their local communities. Now is the time to get involved. [Sign up for an event near you today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601088/420216802/626575025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601089/420216803/1415246401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601090/420216804/1415246401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) From Michigan City to Evansville, we’re looking to elect new Democratic mayors that have the best interests for their cities. In big cities like Indianapolis and South Bend, we’re protecting incumbents who are putting their residents first, investing in infrastructure and creating jobs. **** _Republican Policies Failing Hoosier Working Families_ Next year marks 20 years of uninterrupted Republican administrations in Indiana. The results have been disastrous for working families. A steady brain drain from our universities and institutions of higher learning, and lack of investment in workforce education, is leaving Indiana behind the curve. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601091/420216805/129321460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601092/420216806/129321460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) A new study shows that our state has been [unable to fully capitalize](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601093/420216807/458453324?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) on the accomplishments of the Biden Boom because of our lack of quality workforce development. In addition, this shortcoming has led to Indiana being ranked in the [bottom five states](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601094/420216808/766890981?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) for wage growth. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601095/420216809/1558616188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601096/420216810/1558616188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) This week, we’re featuring [Rep. Frank Mrvan’s priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601097/420216811/705891625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) for the 2024 fiscal year budget. Rep. Mrvan is fighting for critical funds for law enforcement departments across Northwest Indiana. Every department deserves to have the resources needed to keep their communities safe. In addition, his priorities include extra funding for education initiatives in the Region. Rep Mrvan [commented](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601098/420216812/705891625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) on his agenda, “I am grateful that a transparent process was established for all Members to include eligible projects in the House appropriations measures, and believe that this process is an essential component of our ability to advocate for economic growth and success in our districts. As we move forward, I will continue to work with all of my colleagues to move these measures forward and complete this Constitutional responsibility as soon as possible.” ******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601099/420216813/1120568628?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Rep. André Carson](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601100/420216814/1120568628?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601101/420216815/1457937498?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE2ODI3My1mYTMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMXrS-rTdN8_kNcOzpHjb3X2siHWDi-mDxQ0af4bodw=&emci=dbb7eef6-d332-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=76a68273-fa32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Sen.
