clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Less Than 100 Days Until Election Day This week we passed the 100 day mark until municipal Election Day in Indiana. On November 7, we have candidates across the state running to bring good governance and fresh energy to their local communities. Now is the time to get involved. From Michigan City to Evansville, we’re looking to elect new Democratic mayors that have the best interests for their cities. In big cities like Indianapolis and South Bend, we’re protecting incumbents who are putting their residents first, investing in infrastructure and creating jobs. Republican Policies Failing Hoosier Working Families Next year marks 20 years of uninterrupted Republican administrations in Indiana. The results have been disastrous for working families. A steady brain drain from our universities and institutions of higher learning, and lack of investment in workforce education, is leaving Indiana behind the curve. A new study shows that our state has been on the accomplishments of the Biden Boom because of our lack of quality workforce development. In addition, this shortcoming has led to Indiana being ranked in the for wage growth. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, we’re featuring for the 2024 fiscal year budget. Rep. Mrvan is fighting for critical funds for law enforcement departments across Northwest Indiana. Every department deserves to have the resources needed to keep their communities safe. In addition, his priorities include extra funding for education initiatives in the Region. Rep Mrvan on his agenda, “I am grateful that a transparent process was established for all Members to include eligible projects in the House appropriations measures, and believe that this process is an essential component of our ability to advocate for economic growth and success in our districts. As we move forward, I will continue to work with all of my colleagues to move these measures forward and complete this Constitutional responsibility as soon as possible.” ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 2.5% of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie is one of just eleven Members of Congress who doesn’t take lobbyist checks.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27647%2E3422442%2EZS1bXQ)
In 2022, total lobbying spending was more than $4 billion. That’s right, billion with a B!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230804-1?refcode=EMAK04_1_LOB_20230804_V1_F&refcode2=27647_3422442_ZS1bXQ&akid=27647%2E3422442%2EZS1bXQ)
For decades, fossil fuel, pharmaceutical, and other powerful industries have had an outsized influence in Washington.
**Katie’s proud to be one of just eleven House members to reject federal lobbyist money, and the only one in the race for California’s Senate seat to do so.**
But that puts our fundraising at a disadvantage. It’s why we rely on folks like you chipping in what you can. body:
They want their clowns back!

| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfHy_qh0zRXWFxGlABKb1ztUZQEYL3NFPyaB9jlMDuqEMBsOwjZTQso9F2xZ03gFXkUn4t5ZTjgUhB01OXec7IaMubgE_mrmMkOOp2TwtdjQfuIwJXmc2PqYIgrM-wDogLGbIxAqZ_Onbl0EVbi8tA_SMfWqm7shPqT8CjBREDnUtxRxDVnn0kaGhCq6Kc3Hq_tqIDHIbdOCZ8b4kVEuzf3axFwXAEm0NaKSCe8ZR5IH1iU-jh-DiI5rD4GEINnIJaNiahOoJoPgiCr4CbZKkH_LDY1SbgaADInw0n0-aWH-sA624bzf0erWbfnkwBW1zQQ%3D%3D)

| | **The Circus Called 🎪**
---
---
| | The Ringling Brothers got nothing on the Biden crime family. We finally have hours of testimony from Devon Archer, Hunter Biden’s former business partner, and the details sure pack a punch. We’ve got Archer fessing up that Hunter put then-Vice-President Biden on speakerphone with his corrupt business partners [at least 20 times](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfIxNpPyKAe80Kr5QSXLLwhMtWM6Xx4QmJP0I90hZ3evLshp400Rk_Aflh3GnOR9HFyFDNEvNnNInmBUfH9ge9wADJdCpbviOS4TXbTUn7ZgC6iINd6nUhjl8VTEbx2WLz0OmOQOcB_k0sCKd-ACRQXLpaWJVEX2QBOXH3CuJuIJC2cnYki6aSr_QyESVHq3qvlCk7ZwiIJpJ9Q7J3j8eVACbLOrnSM8JNUX8MvlQC3Yrt0X_4fWE27ecB-rP4OnvdpdHxklGRTtm9AeokaAgy0WEM5bdl1xhk9TT7AXvBISEDV5hBFTslx6J_WRCq3QNtwJmY4PXs3k_84S7vzu156Q%3D)—all in an effort to “sell the brand.”
Simply put, the Bidens provided a buttoned-up front to hide a complete clown show. Among them were endeavors with Burisma, a Ukrainian natural gas firm paying Hunter more than[ $83,000](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfOX_KcTaS7wE1HJ-0PqH-2rFyJEnLm21tL3oQf1JVoMnB4tqvW9U7le1QnHJvHk1UvnirRE7fJcE2RfHUCx7kKbRMg2sYAE4cf_7YaPShlQXJPCxZwfxrkXURyX791gv_5ZBU_tENaAC2t3VRpHNFdDOHmJx89Zwek0XvpSX8tPrXgUZ_aBU83RBeU5zCCq0W8je9uoKFp1BX1e80OLvZbXOaDVKXSO0fj72DivPcudNd12bFmwlZz_Cb7sW6YJTEPjq8NNhe5r45GVIwBh2_JU%3D) monthly to sit on its “board.” Archer says he and Hunter would use their “unique understanding” of Washington, D.C., as a selling point to put their wheeling and dealing in a positive light. But the cherry on top is that Archer also claims Hunter and Burisma executives[ “called D.C.” in 2015](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfIxNpPyKAe80Kr5QSXLLwhMtWM6Xx4QmJP0I90hZ3evL-N8FquhlJPbJdXhW4d1AA2gk9i-gNvbIQx78o7Wa5sO_3m7wLbSxT0P79men4qAjlRC5igjX59JuuzuoBxfIyko093Djz-2JFzXOhE6D9a4luyZoWmGuglUKuuzko_897jjO-0vA2mAmQhfjHwog-RrrMnTbDzhVeiHMfM2blcWm6CZwBK2ZZ7MtViPx2BjGjy9wQtu5BcE44ZABQ6DEp-ItgBzninZsOdoapuYqHOY%3D) to ask the Obama gang for a little help firing a bothersome Ukrainian prosecutor. As the left plays duck-and-cover with President Biden’s rap sheet, they claim these speakerphone conversations were just average father-son chit chats. How convenient. But Archer helped shine a bright light on the truth by also confirming that then-VP Biden would attend [dinners with foreign associates](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfCPL9tFUHIoUGgKxvRfCIenuA1Xc6t17T1pkltDpZSGMcY-ZVNZJVOnr0QKDFCPwlX8mKKT--4lThvFz19xSF9tb6BHOgumD9YGd5WlTKdcTCj2M5ll8Za0bQETWQx3hqbkEuYpONxw3hxRE-2lWeKPOrlFpwpbSz4c2dr0Mj7-KYyCSvC9skNm21TC56q8uUQTY-5tZ_8ql6uLUYedfhD7sunzTvmJ_GW7j9Bm9xqmkAXYIBKCXWYSZ9LJL9He_e0ES4sQX6jp5_iNRMzrKxjU%3D), including a Burisma Holdings executive. The fact of the matter is this: [lyin’ Biden isn’t telling the truth](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfIxNpPyKAe80Kr5QSXLLwhMtWM6Xx4QmJP0I90hZ3evL68AgAo3Ypf98R4Hr87aOWBtAlT1JoTXHYZnIApjjsaaFSpOE5Mp-dLVYsZLxgOoZnKcl8c9Letk71Kb-0F7jrSIzYa_wg6ig8vvqRhff7W8VD_Ge6cYrzO-mq2D_Nxa7fMIpfYA3vXw1V1Ji9L1MAHaDSyE3K_tZz9nXQPUgNowJjhF4WaKXcddE7z-yUHL3Lak34NV0WRRGOZJxsWhprq5H1vjHha6aotjaBMuUyt0_6k713OVlANwAB3Cl2a1jtLpxsKuIFNFcY3hc_e3dvQ%3D%3D) about his knowledge of _or_ participation in his family’s business dealings. [Rep. James Comer](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfB91lJFSWeu_luz5TfNMPLiDjhTNPHiXaXcD-5V5AFNODawDN_uoW_FcjnnEHm5tFkguX3ZaCu3W25wSLxFoSLwy0MF4xWTSSrM2u8-2IM68OgwLdhc_urFIH-6yc5iBBR6pDn0WtHLNqHsCQ1A7bk_S_EAX0V5Ee-7S7XPO3iWa53tse4MomvEaHwIEZ5KMxZDhgn5oMiYv-uZM7LGRQjZbSwsOOq4dOIIxrlZV4RQ4vsRReFbuGskxTVhesv3m6Y65yY0snF2WAo7kM5HnAgE%3D) hit the nail on the head when he said it begs the question, what else is he hiding from the American people?
---
| | |
---
| | **Family First ❤️**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe89689743814542a9a4ffd75270c0c3&_e=HxZ9T9xS3derBY_PCwfFfEg0XdGJbOwgIDr33FbLzIfnd3OfxoPSCUKjEKqs9tI98fooYsD1LensNbz9FaUNRA9qUmrCrDqeLGFd1HkSfqVMSkndRxAm8kkOaDVjNdkfmXFV1uOA_2amkol0aIDYlojsSucq1n2WurOtDe9eO3A9rqZ2qS3xoF60eofO0m0CmQSfGBZEnvs9iRWwpz09_c6no_VikriVH_R5bz7LO15b-vHBGj8ayV29AgInlUPc)
---
| | Serving you in Congress is one of the greatest honors of my entire life. If you follow me on Twitter, you’ll often hear me end videos by saying, “Thank you for sending me here.” It’s a privilege to champion our values in Washington every day, and I never lose sight of that. But as much as I love being a congressman, I love being a husband and father even more. Kelly and I recently celebrated our 9th wedding anniversary. She is the best life partner I could have hoped for, and I’m forever grateful for her love and support. It would be impossible for me to serve the people of our district without her by my side. I’d also like to take a moment to brag about our little girl, Isabel, who is a World Champion Barrel Racer. She won her division in the World Championship last week, and we are over the moon. Isabel is kind, intelligent, and excels at everything she puts her mind to. As I continue to serve in Congress, these are the blessings that fuel my passion to restore what is broken in America. Thank you for allowing me to share these special milestones with you.
---

body:
| | |

**DEVELOPING FROM CAPITOL HILL:
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand Leads the Charge to Certify the Equal Rights Amendment!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601662/420218873/419487029?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=&emci=d5bdec62-8a2c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f36301e5-fb32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend: This is incredible news! Kirsten Gillibrand, a bold leader for gender equity, has introduced a new resolution to finally add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to the Constitution!
**The ERA would classify gender-based discrimination as unconstitutional, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights nationwide.** Activists have spent 100 years pushing to add this amendment to the Constitution, and now the required 38 states have finally voted in favor of it. But an arbitrary, unbinding deadline is blocking us from finally adding the 28th Amendment to the Constitution.
Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and finally ensure that all Americans are treated fairly under our Constitution, regardless of gender identity.
**We already know that right-wing extremists will do everything they can to sabotage this resolution – that's why it's so important to know if Americans support the ERA. You've been selected to represent 43614 in this live opinion poll, so please respond before midnight tonight to make your voice heard for gender equity:**
**Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601670/420218880/419487029?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=&emci=d5bdec62-8a2c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f36301e5-fb32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601671/420218885/419487029?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=&emci=d5bdec62-8a2c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f36301e5-fb32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

_Poll will close at midnight | 5,000 Responses Required for Statistical Significance_
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601672/420218886/1575385346?code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601673/420218887/1575385346?code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67601674/420218888/1575385346?code=jtk4332-su-nd&refcode=jtk4332-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzYzMDFlNS1mYjMyLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgTYFolQ0GS2OCMSVmMCHsEVXZO-y23kNreulq-AJhE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Breaking: AIPAC is recruiting candidates to run against ours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We just found out that AIPAC is actively recruiting candidates to run
against our Justice Democrat incumbents, including members of the Squad.

Over the last few years, AIPAC endorsed 109 Republicans who supported the
January 6 insurrection and have spent millions of dollars against
progressives.

During the 2022 election cycle alone, the group’s super PAC dropped almost
$3 million on misleading attack ads against Summer Lee in the Pennsylvania
Democratic primary, and another $680,000 during the general election. But
thanks to this movement, Summer won in one of the biggest progressive
electoral victories to date!

If AIPAC had their way, Summer wouldn’t be in Congress right now fighting
for the freedom and justice of all people alongside her fellow Squad
members.

Now, they’re preparing to try and defeat our Squad — and any other
progressive candidate willing to stand up for universal human rights. We
can’t let that happen, which is why we need your support today to fight
back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136287?refcode=em20230804-30217&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb ]Rush $3 or whatever you can to support Justice Democrats
as we work to re-elect the Squad and send even more progressives to
Congress →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136287?refcode=em20230804-30217&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb ]Donate $3

Summer and the rest of the Squad are in office fighting for progressive
change right now because of people like YOU supporting us.

Thanks for fueling our fight,

Geoff Simpson, Campaigns Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230804-30217-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30217_1203867_L0RxJb&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30217%2E1203867%2EL0RxJb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Phil Kerpen
subject: AARP betrayed seniors. Help us fight back.
body:
Dear Friend,
I know that you are as disturbed as I am about the creeping government takeover of our healthcare system.
First, they forced Americans to buy government-approved health insurance under Obamacare.
Then under Biden’s so-called "Inflation Reduction Act," liberals forced drug companies to accept government-set pricing or face a 95% tax on their gross sales – with the savings diverted to green energy giveaways.
Both of these bills were finances with big Medicare cuts. **And no lobbying force has done more to enact these anti-senior policies than AARP.**
**That’s why I hope you will please**[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3sasgsztogrm9vl6x27qp6vkk3i5bjxes8ic51je2fomke7vfpz5547q90jbyeg9lqh64ll6co45cql3utrbldk06063y4cjesdequst3vrcbkgll79308hwi57k8s1etk3mvulk0zsgll9nry78o9fd9oh9xt540y291l1z47qsqid691goymqfbanh9t2cbqmeohhcmi6p0fj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
A recent bombshell report from Juniper Research reveals how the supposed "seniors organization" AARP is little more than a marketing scam for UnitedHealth – the largest health insurance company in America.
AARP sells UnitedHealth insurance exclusively in return for a 4.95% cut of every monthly premium – AARP’s corporate royalties net them over $1 BILLION a year.
[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3sasgsztogrm9vl6x27qp6vkk3i5bjxevm9wy537wfidh1ezqwry7yja32o3qbnj1ugnpcjyc67283y8h2xkoykj420me0yrbgoeylwaplh9n6ztwmt9ykeuaxrrmleapj1tb971pxre5yixk8iajpz21a0c6vqzle00fcvla4xaji1wzwid2dgbthx4fdhv24vi9z8ziwi6ljd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
It is important to understand AARP’s blatant conflict of interest as they work to dupe seniors and members of Congress into believing that socialized medicine will _help_ them.
**The policies AARP advocates for would decimate our healthcare system – while enriching its big insurance partner and itself.**
AARP was taken to court over this blatant conflict of interest.
At trial, AARP defended itself by arguing that its relationship with its senior members "is not one of 'trust or confidence' that creates a fiduciary duty" and "does not 'transcend an ordinary business' relationship."
**When AARP says they have no responsibility to act with seniors' interests in mind — take them at their word.**
[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3sasgsztogrm9vl6x27qp6vkk3i5bjxeynyr388z2gt8dnpcld83m5zjj3ct6xfw3yfsyti2c09kbe9q7ze6btlg23gtjitjz7jehsahasmdiqrl5pbs9abst1yipvvw9hlaglq4cvqbnmvishy5utsofl66dxa7kjjexu2o81ejshnl23l5v9mxm2gqq2anqgf06qxxu9y0l1s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
American Commitment and the Committee to Unleash Prosperity have launched a campaign to push back against socialized medicine by exposing AARP as a prop for Big Insurance.
That’s why it’s so important you take a moment to [**sign your letter to Congress**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3sasgsztogrm9vl6x27qp6vkk3i5bjxebol9wnq2wh1bzwkgwk0woaq7d54gkun75cexh8gubgoh7sivw8kr2p0d05ab3eprwxuf3jf2kicmty8scsjyiqyq9tgps3ms5gji0bx83tpysk76luny3x9zymnzozjdk3hwp9wadl05lgypsz1vlcct2m3zkpt3dx2435kv3kngk51&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) so that we can get our message out as loud as possible.
The future of America’s health care system may well depend on us unmasking AARP as a front group for UnitedHealth. **Will you join me in taking this important stand against socialized medicine?**
Thanks for all you do,
Phil Kerpen
P.S. If you act today, we will also sign you up for a FREE subscription to the Committee to Unleash Prosperity's HOTLINE newsletter by famed economist Stephen Moore. Newt Gingrich calls it "brilliantly done and always informative-a remarkable achievement."

[Privacy Policy](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=242y96v0ihoqm20uyqszxww1jaymcv4flscyb4ze6u3ruptpddpvw1n1vxruqqhmexgu4znfh0gdceksc21oiuv8j4bivxuex9t10lj0nmczriwm144xh07op0ypyttu9dkqmi5s5cqo6qqs47x1w8ml41esqo5sg00o9x6k52&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Advertise with us](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=12vla9tjocef9ct6cmtvzwo7j6ygy7e29xp33k92lmnisokrw92d5ia2a1j3dimnnlo5ydpqrue3wmxeeaso4s4dp0zht2prkefbx5bn0o9fa2tu2muy616jzkkj7nofjsf9j7eagondw06w62pclfmjq86t7vnv6zte&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

name: Tamie
subject: NOW I’m a Barbie girl
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67602479/420221254/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUzMTU0YjMtZmUzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sj6vnGa3uj2cl0AafN_lnfaXz_lkxN8HI0gY_FQOhLI=)
---
Friend, As you may have read in the last email I sent out about Barbie, I _did not _grow up as a Barbie girl. But on Saturday my staff and I went to see Greta Gerwig’s _Barbie _and it's safe to say my opinion about Barbie changed significantly. In _Barbie_ , the character Gloria, played by actress America Ferrera, delivers an impassioned speech after witnessing the iconic doll Barbie come to life—only to suffer an existential crisis about her place in the world as a powerful, smart, attractive woman: “It is literally impossible to be a woman...we have to always be extraordinary, but somehow we’re always doing it wrong. “You have to be thin, but not too thin. And you can never say you want to be thin. You have to say you want to be healthy, but also you have to be thin. You have to have money, but you can’t ask for money because that’s crass. **You have to be a boss, but you can’t be mean.** ” I never wanted to be the stereotypical woman in politics— always serious, with the pantsuits, no makeup, the typical haircut brushed to perfection, everything just so and in place. A polished focus-group Politician BarbieTM️, if you will ,but that's not me. I have curly hair. I laugh and smile a lot. I love embracing everything about being a woman. I am a loving mother, I'm smart, savvy, funny, kind, thoughtful, strategic, and a problem solver. I am a get it done girl, like most women I know. I am a big thinker, and I like making a big impact. I care about everyone. I stay up at night thinking and conducting research on how I can help more people when I am elected. I think and work on my campaign meeting people and creating solutions for Americans more than anyone running for this seat.
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67602480/420221255/1649708063?refcode=barbie-togetherNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUzMTU0YjMtZmUzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sj6vnGa3uj2cl0AafN_lnfaXz_lkxN8HI0gY_FQOhLI=)
---
But to be a woman in politics (hell, just being a woman) is to be scrutinized with a giant magnifying lens and measured by a unique double standard that simply doesn’t apply to men. I've been told I'm too pretty, my nails are too long, heels too high, lips too bright, etc. etc. and my response always is, "There are people suffering, starving, and homeless in America. Don't you think our time is better spent serving them than commenting on my looks?" I’ve always wanted to embrace all of who I am. And while everything America Ferrero said is true about being a woman in politics, the real tragedy is those feelings apply to every woman everywhere, in every walk of life. So in the spirit of Barbie, and striving only to be my full, authentic self, [I'm not afraid to ask you for money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67602481/420221256/1649708063?refcode=barbie-togetherNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUzMTU0YjMtZmUzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sj6vnGa3uj2cl0AafN_lnfaXz_lkxN8HI0gY_FQOhLI=) And while I may at times be bossy, I'm never mean—except when I call out Jim Jordan. [Despite all of the challenges of being a woman running for office against one of the most toxic men to wield power, I am unafraid and unabashed because you are with me and we’re going to change how this game is played by getting the job done and winning it our way, together:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67602482/420221257/1649708063?refcode=barbie-togetherNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUzMTU0YjMtZmUzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sj6vnGa3uj2cl0AafN_lnfaXz_lkxN8HI0gY_FQOhLI=)

name: Team Shyne
subject: We can turn this around
body:
**"The political economy may have just hit its recession"
_-Politico_**
---

In case you missed this headline last week, small dollar grassroots funding for campaigns like ours is drying up, and team, it’s bad.

But we don’t think it’s because you don’t care, we know you do. That’s why we want to fill you in on some behind-the-scenes changes we suspect are behind this troubling trend.

Recently, email providers have been making changes with how email messages like these are handled. We don’t want to bore you with wonky details, but to make a long story short, it’s impacting our ability to get our message into inboxes. That spells bad news for **grassroots campaigns like ours** who rely on small online donations — not big corporate PACs or wealthy campaign contributors — to raise money.

But we’ve got a solution: **REPLY TO THIS EMAIL!**

Seriously, just reply to this email, it doesn’t have to be long. We promise someone will be there to send you a response too. It might take a few hours, or maybe even a few days — but that exchange helps tell the algorithms that decide which emails you see know that you want to continue seeing these messages.

It’s a small action, but it makes a huge difference in our campaign and our ability to raise money to send a fierce progressive fighter like Sepi to Congress.

Simply reply to this email, and we will get back to you! And if you want to [**chip in $5 afterwards to deliver real change for CA-30, we’d really appreciate it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67602597/420221602/1205795474?refcode=em23_230804_reply_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230804_reply_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=70769157-ff32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA3NjkxNTctZmYzMi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NkU_LgEu8J10ZmxbzN3HzfBVShSdhBWlhc33VxAoGOA=)

clean_body: "The political economy may have just hit its recession" -Politico In case you missed this headline last week, small dollar grassroots funding for campaigns like ours is drying up, and team, it’s bad. But we don’t think it’s because you don’t care, we know you do. That’s why we want to fill you in on some behind-the-scenes changes we suspect are behind this troubling trend. Recently, email providers have been making changes with how email messages like these are handled. We don’t want to bore you with wonky details, but to make a long story short, it’s impacting our ability to get our message into inboxes. That spells bad news for grassroots campaigns like ours who rely on small online donations — not big corporate PACs or wealthy campaign contributors — to raise money. But we’ve got a solution: REPLY TO THIS EMAIL! Seriously, just reply to this email, it doesn’t have to be long. We promise someone will be there to send you a response too. It might take a few hours, or maybe even a few days — but that exchange helps tell the algorithms that decide which emails you see know that you want to continue seeing these messages. It’s a small action, but it makes a huge difference in our campaign and our ability to raise money to send a fierce progressive fighter like Sepi to Congress. Simply reply to this email, and we will get back to you! And if you want to = Thanks for everything, Team Shyne Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP, POWER, and The Leadership Conference set to bring community conversation on the state of our federal judiciary to Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends,
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Upcoming Event
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/final%20eblast%20NG.png]
The New Pennsylvania Project, in partnership with The Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights, as well as POWER, will be hosting a community conversation on the current state of our federal judiciary on Wednesday, August 23rd from 6:00PM-8:00PM in Philadelphia.
This event will feature elected officials and will be MC'd by WHYY's Cherri Gregg.
Event Details
*
When:
Wednesday,
August
23rd
from
6:00PM-8:00PM
*
Where:
United
Lutheran
Seminary
(7301
Germantown
Ave,
Phila.,
PA
19119)
*
Light
refreshments
will
be
served
*
Free
and
open
to
the
public
To RSVP for this event, click here [https://forms.gle/7zdxYJV2zzF9VdnA7] .
Facebook Post of the Week
https://www.facebook.com/reel/609278717737361 [https://www.facebook.com/reel/609278717737361]
The New Pennsylvania Project was on the ground in Harrisburg this past Saturday at The Roots concert, talking with attendees to get them registered to vote and make sure they're ready to head to the polls to vote in this November's crucial odd year election.
A huge thanks to HU Presents for not only allowing us to participate in Saturday's concert but for inviting us back for every remaining show in the summer concert series. You can find us at Harrisburg's Riverfront Park on the following dates, so if you'll be at any of these events swing by our table to check your voter registration status and grab some free NPP swag.
*
Aug.
26th:
The
Head
and
the
Heart
*
Sept.
16th:
Mt.
Joy
*
Sept.
17th:
Trey
Anastasio
Make sure you're following us on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] so you can stay up-to-date on all the work we're doing across Pennsylvania!
NPP in the News
Screenshot of the City & State 2023 Power of Diversity: Women 100 [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_1316.jpeg]
Our CEO Kadida Kenner was recently named to City & State's 2023 Power of Diversity: Women 100. From City & State:
Last year, Kadida Kenner’s New Pennsylvania Project registered more than 20,000 voters. Kenner, who founded the voting rights nonprofit, maintains that momentum as she looks to upcoming elections – advocating for a higher state minimum wage, rallying with the League of Women Voters and reaching out to the many Pennsylvanians of color who remain underserved and underrepresented. On Twitter, she regularly reminds voters of the importance of the judiciary as co-chair of Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania.
To see the full list and read the full article, click here [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/power-lists/2023/07/2023-power-diversity-women-100/388870/] .
Images from the Ground
It was a busy week for the New Pennsylvania Project and we just so happened to bump into a few notable figures, include Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg, Harrisburg Mayor Wanda Williams, and Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Facebook%20Post_3.png]
News You Can Use
Philly is suing three local gun stores for allegedly selling firearms to ‘straw purchasers’ [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/philadelphia/shootings-gun-violence-philadelphia-lawsuit-straw-purchases-20230725.html?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
( Philadelphia Inquirer)
The lawsuit is the latest attempt by the city to gain some leverage over the issue of gun control through the courts, because Pennsylvania doesn't allow cities to pass their own gun control measures.
The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency has announced that $14.3 million in grants will flow to Pennsylvania farmers [https://www.ydr.com/restricted/?return=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ydr.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2F2023%2F07%2F27%2Fpa-farmers-targeted-by-epa-for-bay-cleanup-14-3m-in-grants-to-help%2F70468508007%2F]
(York Daily Record)
This "once-in-a-lifetime" investment will look to improve water quality and help the state meet its obligation to reduce pollution in the Chesapeake Bay.
Climate adaptation carries a $15 billion price tag for Pa. towns, study says [https://stateimpact.npr.org/pennsylvania/2023/07/27/climate-adaptation-carries-a-15-billion-price-tag-for-pa-towns-study-says/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(NPR)
A new study says the commonwealth’s cities and towns will need to spend more than $15 billion by 2040 to protect residents from the effects of climate change.
Democrats worry their most loyal voters won’t turn out for Biden in 2024 [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2023/07/31/democrats-black-voters-2024-election-biden/]
(Washington Post)
“When you think about election cycle to election cycle, [Black voters] have been telling us for a long time what matters,” Smith added. “They want to put food on the table, a roof over their head, send kids to good schools, live in neighborhoods that are safe. I don’t think the issues are new, it’s the way we talk about them and the way we’re centering the voice of the people who live in these communities.”
News you can use special edition, Pennsylvania Budget Update [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Facebook%20Event_3.png]
Budget Update and What You Need to Know
On Thursday afternoon, Gov. Josh Shapiro received Pennsylvania’s main budget bill from the state Senate and signed it into law [https://www.politicspa.com/shapiro-signs-main-2023-24-pennsylvania-budget/124236/] .
“The people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with the responsibility to bring people together in a divided legislature and to get things done for them – and with this commonsense budget, that’s exactly what we’ve done,” said Shapiro.
Some highlights of what is included in this budget:
*
Historic
investment
in
K-12
public
schools,
including
the
largest
increase
in
Basic
Education
Funding
in
Pennsylvania
history.
*
Universal
free
breakfast
for
every
public-school
student
*
$112
million
to
improve
our
parks
and
forests,
including
the
creation
of
an
Office
of
Outdoor
Recreation
*
$23.5
million
in
workforce
training
and
vocational-tech
programs
*
$20
million
to
increase
county
mental
health
funding
While there is still work to be done and the budget isn't perfect, it contains so many things that will have a positive impact across Pennsylvania. This wouldn't be possible without the tremendous work done in 2022 and serves as a reminder of what's at stake in 2023 and beyond.
If you'd like to dive into additional reading on the PA budget, you can find links below:
What’s Delivered In PA’s Newly Signed State Budget, And What Needs More Work. [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2023/08/whats-delivered-with-pennsylvanias-newly-signed-state-budget-and-what-needs-more-work.html]
(Penn Live)
“All sides agree a certain number of new line items, or line items that are being funded for the first time with state tax dollars, need completion of accompanying enabling legislation before they can be released.”
Shapiro Signs Budget Bill, Vetoes School Voucher Funding, Billions In Allocations Still Unsettled [https://www.cnhinews.com/cnhi/article_07ae25e2-323e-11ee-a030-8b378b524eb1.html]
(CNHI News)
“Pennsylvania’s state budget was signed into law Thursday, seemingly ending a month-long standoff over the commonwealth’s $45.5 billion spending plan. Except, the process still isn’t completed in full and partisan divides over Republican-backed school vouchers that precipitated the delay could jeopardize at least $1.1 billion in spending prioritized by Democrats.
Shapiro Administration To Allow State Contract With CPC Organization To Expire [https://www.politicspa.com/shapiro-administration-to-allow-state-contract-with-cpc-organization-to-expire/124266/]
(PoliticsPA)
“Following Governor Josh Shapiro’s signing of the 2023-2024 budget, Department of Human Services (DHS) Secretary Dr. Val Arkoosh announced the Commonwealth’s contract with Real Alternatives – an organization that purports to provide counseling, referrals, and other services through partnerships with crisis pregnancy centers – will come to an end by December 31, 2023.”
Celebrating Black Philanthropy Month
August is Black Philanthropy Month and we'd be remiss not to acknowledge the crucial role our donors play in allowing us to reach our centered-communities. It's the continued support of donors like you that provides us the opportunity to fulfill our organizational mission and provide a voice for those who have been voiceless for far too long.
Black Philanthropy Month, It's impossible for NPP to reach our centered-communities without the continued support of donors like you! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Instagram%20Post%20Square_3.jpg]
Help us register more voters by donating to the New Pennsylvania Project today! Donations of any size can be made at the following link: click here to donate [https://bit.ly/NPPDonate]
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Regional
Organizing
Director
(Allegheny)
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Part-Time:
Education
&
Engagement
Associate
(
via
c3
organization
New
PA
Project
Education
Fund
[https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/eea/]
)
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]

New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

I don’t think the issues are new, it’s the way we talk about them and the way we’re centering the voice of the people who live in these communities.” News you can use special edition, Pennsylvania Budget Update [] Budget Update and What You Need to Know On Thursday afternoon, Gov. Josh Shapiro received Pennsylvania’s main budget bill from the state Senate and signed it into law [] . “The people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with the responsibility to bring people together in a divided legislature and to get things done for them – and with this commonsense budget, that’s exactly what we’ve done,” said Shapiro. Some highlights of what is included in this budget: Historic investment in K-12 public schools, including the largest increase in Basic Education Funding in Pennsylvania history. Universal free breakfast for every public-school student $112 million to improve our parks and forests, including the creation of an Office of Outdoor Recreation $23.5 million in workforce training and vocational-tech programs $20 million to increase county mental health funding While there is still work to be done and the budget isn't perfect, it contains so many things that will have a positive impact across Pennsylvania. This wouldn't be possible without the tremendous work done in 2022 and serves as a reminder of what's at stake in 2023 and beyond. If you'd like to dive into additional reading on the PA budget, you can find links below: What’s Delivered In PA’s Newly Signed State Budget, And What Needs More Work. [] (Penn Live) “All sides agree a certain number of new line items, or line items that are being funded for the first time with state tax dollars, need completion of accompanying enabling legislation before they can be released.” Shapiro Signs Budget Bill, Vetoes School Voucher Funding, Billions In Allocations Still Unsettled [] (CNHI News) “Pennsylvania’s state budget was signed into law Thursday, seemingly ending a month-long standoff over the commonwealth’s $45.5 billion spending plan. Except, the process still isn’t completed in full and partisan divides over Republican-backed school vouchers that precipitated the delay could jeopardize at least $1.1 billion in spending prioritized by Democrats. Shapiro Administration To Allow State Contract With CPC Organization To Expire [] (PoliticsPA) “Following Governor Josh Shapiro’s signing of the 2023-2024 budget, Department of Human Services (DHS) Secretary Dr. Val Arkoosh announced the Commonwealth’s contract with Real Alternatives – an organization that purports to provide counseling, referrals, and other services through partnerships with crisis pregnancy centers – will come to an end by December 31, 2023.” Celebrating Black Philanthropy Month August is Black Philanthropy Month and we'd be remiss not to acknowledge the crucial role our donors play in allowing us to reach our centered-communities. It's the continued support of donors like you that provides us the opportunity to fulfill our organizational mission and provide a voice for those who have been voiceless for far too long. Black Philanthropy Month, It's impossible for NPP to reach our centered-communities without the continued support of donors like you! [] Help us register more voters by donating to the New Pennsylvania Project today! Donations of any size can be made at the following link: click here to donate [] We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. Regional Organizing Director (Allegheny) Community Engagement Associate * Part-Time: Education & Engagement Associate ( via c3 organization New PA Project Education Fund [] ) To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [] . Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. In solidarity, #TeamNPP PA ELECTION DATES: Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023 Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023 We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate. Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023! Invest in our democracy [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: a historic moment:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek, big news: **I just signed my first budget for Pennsylvania into law.** This budget makes _historic_ investments in education, supports small businesses, and strengthens our local communities. I couldn’t be prouder of what we accomplished with this budget. It even includes **the largest increase in basic education funding in Pennsylvania history!** With their vote, Pennsylvanians entrusted me with the responsibility to bring folks on each side of the divided legislature together and deliver for them. **That’s exactly what this budget did.** This budget will invest _millions_ in workforce and economic development, support first responders, and fully fund our public schools. It’ll provide free breakfast for every public school student. And it’ll create four new classes of cadets of the Pennsylvania State Police. **This is a _massive_ victory for our Commonwealth**, and I’m so excited to make progress on the issues that are impacting everyday Pennsylvanians. I’m truly proud of this bipartisan effort, and I’ll never stop fighting for hard-working families as long as I’m Governor. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
This week, Donald Trump was indicted for the third time — this time on charges of conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election.
This is a somber occasion.
Trump's indictment serves as a stark reminder that no individual, regardless of their position, should be above the law. It underscores the importance of preserving the integrity of our electoral process and upholding the trust that the American people place in our democratic institutions.
Here in Arizona, our Republican leaders took part in perpetuating the Big Lie.
First, eleven "fake electors" attempted to cast our state's electoral votes in favor of Trump. Then, extremists in the Arizona State Senate wasted millions of taxpayer dollars on an audit of Maricopa County votes.
The perpetrators of the audit — all of whom were Republicans in Leadership roles — served with me in the Senate. They hired Cyber Ninjas as the security contractor, a group that was clearly underqualified and inexcusably biased. As the audit dragged on, they proved that they only cared about political fanaticism, not about election security.
I saw firsthand what was going on. It was unacceptable, and I fought hard against it the whole time.
When we see forces coming together to attack and subvert our democracy, we must take action. It's why I stood up against fraudulent electors and the Maricopa County audit, and why I'm glad to see the Justice Department taking action now.
Our democracy is built on the foundation of fairness, transparency, and the rule of law, and the events that have unfolded since the 2020 election have tested these principles greatly.
In Congress, I will continue to fight for free and fair elections — to ensure that every vote matters and every voice is heard.
This is a challenging time for our nation, but together, we can move forward and build a stronger, more just future.
Best,
Kirsten
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080423_Indictment_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080423_Indictment_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080423_Indictment_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080423_Indictment_act]

That was our average donation in July, Peter.

Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. **Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this month's debate,_but the next one too!_**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=56428f199d3045208a7195451fcc78c6&_e=zVnkxxirTOJYrRMIU2yQibsqusbDrEgtmWVgSFR3cW1jIPb4hMzyTDH3JIX1SJO9qL9ODDHua_pclmBKNMxaPza-LtKffOZOd-ewJUS4Jvb0ZzzDHUnBwtbYHUKwNLtqfxeHTGFc2AMtOCQz0EQeLOakd9Vi5AURliiKK2YuHJ4HJqWKco7LuhHi2yB-jmQ6v1f-c66fu3Ov7KqnW7mVx69HGxP_drCWSYN0J-LCLOc7nTrSRLE-ZSCL1fuE6tlM-sMaygQQAl0JNYR15JYFq1Dlg9AYK4th05thpv94y9VkgKSQ0r1pUr9F-G6W1zKxkHVWolfA8CMuxFUThb4poPT0bF43OV1nDLSxJX_OuBI0kQXLBHsJpfEUoA52EAXNtIK8KaLEW_IQVary1Izhig%3D%3D)

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=677ff626b3&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: What I thought on the drive back from the DC Courthouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
It’s a very sad day for America.

It’s a very sad day for America.
| | | [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=77399f0bd8df46a2b16e726bdf7a27e0&_e=tHNFP_w__tRYQEQOZAPvnRdbOyvHfmYrUxrNXX_4IVMhmRyk8WpoXroFsr-0xrRxc3TOh539s7wWknr2SW05qDR8_apWmt9aTqmSKFIacP55ZD52IxrmQ96_OCXQSmydl9VthpVV7ggr5i8dhMySFxP5PVscwADZnkZm0JmtBQ77CFKplss2Cf3UtHRWpJ54xrsAcC0y9GrbhIRwK0FROsZskY1tsaFpEgoTcDdPr3sHBRchhhzGHrOTi7bVSCs_d6jbpDLxEoinkxsR2b8fqX9jsNNkg-TdWNuWUMLUVBqYpiIeOajjFeOrFANcJLt73zHr06naQQoOfbVar7SZC3oB1uOocQ476m5gnt0baLReF70jWbP4HRIQCU72KRgbyYTw8AVqgwG74uNJENgZIQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
On my drive back from the federal courthouse - where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man - I thought that this was truly a sad day for America.
As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti.
_This is not the place that I left behind._
**But it 's emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation's capital. **
This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot.
So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he's going to prosecute me.
As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America.
Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.
| [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=77399f0bd8df46a2b16e726bdf7a27e0&_e=tHNFP_w__tRYQEQOZAPvnRdbOyvHfmYrUxrNXX_4IVMhmRyk8WpoXroFsr-0xrRxc3TOh539s7wWknr2SW05qDR8_apWmt9aTqmSKFIacP55ZD52IxrmQ96_OCXQSmydl9VthpVV7ggr5i8dhMySFxP5PVscwADZnkZm0JmtBQ77CFKplss2Cf3UtHRWpJ54xrsAcC0y9GrbhIRwK0FROsZskY1tsaFpEgoTcDdPr3sHBRchhhzGHrOTi7bVSCs_xgvlPpUPHHztcqCPs7KqjPOQ40AofmyTgq3z3ZDke-7CIyUFUKU43ZgzPO35h6_Mp5GtJmAHryCg82uWKAKHlrYWlVJ8ANx2zSOQD_R1dR4YQ1XdeSmPKqcJPBDOIOgW8MIo8eXA6U9r_uj66gq4EQ%3D%3D)

It’s a very sad day for America. | | | Friend, On my drive back from the federal courthouse - where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man - I thought that this was truly a sad day for America. As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti. This is not the place that I left behind. But it 's emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation's capital. This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot. So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he's going to prosecute me. As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America. Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again. | If you are doing poorly due to the sinister forces who run Washington, DC right now, don 't even think about donating! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:

name: Team Schiff
subject: Want to know our secret?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We mean it: We can’t win this race without a strong grassroots team knocking on doors, making phone calls, sending texts, and organizing across California (and beyond!).
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3265%2E5257348%2EC9GuJY)
Derek,
Running a campaign is no small feat, especially a race across the great state of California.
To reach all the voters we need to connect with and share why Adam would make a great Senator, it takes a lot of time, money, and resources.
**But the secret power to a winning campaign?_Our volunteer team!_**
We mean it: We can’t win this race without a strong grassroots team talking to their friends, sending texts, and organizing across California (and beyond!). That work begins right now.
**[We need all hands on deck to support Adam, which is why we’re asking you to sign up to volunteer for our campaign! Just an hour of your time can make a huge difference:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2455?t=4&akid=3265%2E5257348%2EC9GuJY)**
[SIGN UP TODAY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2455?t=5&akid=3265%2E5257348%2EC9GuJY)
---
Adam has a proven record of getting things done for the people of California and holding MAGA extremists accountable. Now as he runs for U.S. Senate, he needs your help, and we hope he can count on your support.
Thank you for being a part of the best team!
— Team Schiff

**WATCH: Chris Christie Visits Ukraine: “We Need To Be With Ukraine”**
Governor Chris Christie visited Ukraine where he met with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and reiterated his full commitment and support for the Ukrainian people.
[_The Washington Post_](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d6ce76c0c1&e=d0a9afa930) _: “Americans are a particularly visual nation; Things aren’t as real to us if we don’t get to see them, ’Christie said as he left the church. ‘By seeing them we feel them. And so I’m here because I want the American people to see the things that I’m seeing — and I’m confident that when they do, that the resolve they already have — and there are hundreds of millions of Americans who support our partnership with Ukraine —but their resolve will become even greater.’_ ”
Below is a video of remarks Governor Chris Christie made during a visit with President Zelenskyy:

**“We Need To Be With Ukraine”**

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: abortion care is healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

A few days ago, Indiana’s six abortion clinics stopped providing abortions due to the state’s near-total abortion ban.

And last month, the House voted to overturn a policy guaranteeing abortion access to members of the military.

**These are not isolated incidents, Peter, but the concerning reality in a world without _Roe._** Right now, 15 states have near-total abortion bans, Republicans in Congress have proposed a national abortion ban, and access to Mifepristone, a safe and legal drug used in medical abortions, is under attack and headed to the Supreme Court.

[We must stand against these attacks on a woman’s right to reproductive healthcare. As a doctor I know firsthand the impact of denying healthcare to patients in need, and if elected to Congress I will oppose these restrictions. Will you chip in anything to help fuel my campaign so I can work to protect those rights and codify _Roe_ into federal law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67604200/420230351/-947588297?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230804_FR_Roe_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_ReproductiveRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5MTA3ZTQtMDczMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_sEeYXSYgG5zffl4x_PvnVu7KwivFu4i8QrOV5IpjvY=) | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67604201/420230352/-947588297?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230804_FR_Roe_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_ReproductiveRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5MTA3ZTQtMDczMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_sEeYXSYgG5zffl4x_PvnVu7KwivFu4i8QrOV5IpjvY=)

Ending the constitutional right to abortion paved the way for broader attacks on reproductive rights, with state legislatures creating new barriers not just for abortion, but for birth control access, doctors providing patient care, and much more.

As a surgeon, I have seen firsthand the damage caused by these harmful decisions. Abortion care is healthcare – and we need a leader who knows how important it is to expand healthcare access instead of creating life-threatening obstacles.

[Peter, we need to codify _Roe_ into law, and we need to take back our House majority to do so. Will you chip in right away to help us defend this seat so I can be one more voice in Congress toward reinstituting our life-saving abortion protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67604202/420230353/-947588297?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230804_FR_Roe_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_ReproductiveRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5MTA3ZTQtMDczMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_sEeYXSYgG5zffl4x_PvnVu7KwivFu4i8QrOV5IpjvY=)

clean_body: | | Peter, A few days ago, Indiana’s six abortion clinics stopped providing abortions due to the state’s near-total abortion ban. And last month, the House voted to overturn a policy guaranteeing abortion access to members of the military. These are not isolated incidents, Peter, but the concerning reality in a world without Roe. Right now, 15 states have near-total abortion bans, Republicans in Congress have proposed a national abortion ban, and access to Mifepristone, a safe and legal drug used in medical abortions, is under attack and headed to the Supreme Court. = | = Ending the constitutional right to abortion paved the way for broader attacks on reproductive rights, with state legislatures creating new barriers not just for abortion, but for birth control access, doctors providing patient care, and much more. As a surgeon, I have seen firsthand the damage caused by these harmful decisions. Abortion care is healthcare – and we need a leader who knows how important it is to expand healthcare access instead of creating life-threatening obstacles. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Dr. Brian Williams | | | = | Click ** to unsubscribe from our email list. | Peter,

Friends keep telling me that they’re seeing increasing attack ads and billboards against me and my record in Congress. National Republicans are spreading lies and misinformation to try to defeat me next year.

**This is just one of the many challenges we’re going to face in this campaign, but I won’t let these attacks shake me.** Unlike Republicans, I’m committed to running an honest and positive campaign.

We’ve got a long road ahead of us, and I can’t stand up to these lies and attacks alone.

If we’re going to counter these attacks and spread my message throughout the Lehigh Valley, then I need your help. We need to ensure we have the resources to reach every voter in PA-07.

body:
One of my greatest joys is connecting with my constituents on the issues that matter most to them.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67604772/420232443/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230803-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmIyMzkxZS0wYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VovSs2zfoY8t0ErYKZp61ckn9ap_o34YwWAoLzp9Zu0=)

| Hi there,

One of my greatest joys is connecting with my constituents on the issues that matter most to them. Earlier this week, I went to Grand Haven to host a town hall and discuss local concerns like immigration policies, higher education, and more.

The fact of the matter is that West Michiganders have spent too long with representatives who don’t listen and don’t deliver results on the issues that matter most to them. **That’s why I ran in 2022 and why I am running again in 2024, to make sure that West Michiganders have a receptive, empathetic, and fierce advocate in Congress who listens to their concerns.**

That’s why opportunities to touch base with my MI-03 are so important, they enable me to focus my energy on the issues that matter most to my community.[**_If you believe in my work to listen to and deliver results for real Michiganders, I hope you will consider chipping in just $5 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67604773/420232444/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230803-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmIyMzkxZS0wYTMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VovSs2zfoY8t0ErYKZp61ckn9ap_o34YwWAoLzp9Zu0=)

clean_body: One of my greatest joys is connecting with my constituents on the issues that matter most to them. | = | Hi there, One of my greatest joys is connecting with my constituents on the issues that matter most to them. Earlier this week, I went to Grand Haven to host a town hall and discuss local concerns like immigration policies, higher education, and more. The fact of the matter is that West Michiganders have spent too long with representatives who don’t listen and don’t deliver results on the issues that matter most to them. That’s why I ran in 2022 and why I am running again in 2024, to make sure that West Michiganders have a receptive, empathetic, and fierce advocate in Congress who listens to their concerns. That’s why opportunities to touch base with my MI-03 are so important, they enable me to focus my energy on the issues that matter most to my community.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for supporting my work, Hillary Scholten * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Peter,
Time’s up for the Criminals, the Communists, and the Bidens.
The Law and Justice Mayor of Miami, Francis Suarez, will stop the polarization of our Justice System and **PARDON DONALD TRUMP.**
[>>> GIVE $1 TO SUAREZ FOR PRESIDENT AND BRING LAW AND ORDER TO THE DEBATE STAGE<<<](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=57374073e0&e=9562ca5d98)
“Where is the special prosecution and indictments of President Obama for the Fast and Furious scandal, his unjust and purposeful prosecution of conservatives through the IRS, or the prosecution for Hillary Clinton who deleted classified information on her servers? **And why does every Trump indictment follow a very bad news day for Biden?”** \- Chapin Fay, Spokesman for SOS America
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=c4bf8cc90a&e=9562ca5d98)
As President, Francis Suarez will ensure law and order prevails, regardless of who your Dad is.

---
* Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez is the son of Cuban immigrants who fled Communist Cuba for a better life in America.

* Francis Suarez understands that THERE IS A **RADICAL COMMUNIST assault on our freedom** , and we all have a part to play in saving our country.

* Mayor Suarez is a fierce advocate for law and order, fiscal responsibility, and pro-business policies. He upholds conservative principles and advocates for the well-being of his constituents. Under his leadership, Miami has undergone a significant transformation, serving as a model for the rest of the country.

# Introducing the Miami Model

* #1 In Tech Job Migration

* Over 300,000 people will move to Miami-Dade County Over the Next Decade, According to State Estimates
* Top 50 Most Sustainable Cities in the World
* #1 In Pandemic Recovery
* #1 In Wage Growth
* $1 Billion In Wages to Miami's Economy

[**> >> GIVE $1 TO SUAREZ FOR PRESIDENT AND BRING THE MIAMI MODEL TO THE DEBATE STAGE<<<**](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=7c305652f7&e=9562ca5d98)

## The IBLC Will Be Hosting A Town Hall in Gary This Saturday
Tomorrow, I will be joining fellow members of the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus for a town hall in Gary. We will be discussing the recent legislative session, including the 2023 budget and bills our caucus successfully passed. Please join us for an update on the new laws at 11 a.m. CT in the IU Northwest Savannah Center. Come with any questions, comments or concerns you have, as well as ideas about proposals you would like to see introduced in the 2024 legislative session. Hope to see you soon!
[Read More](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..yGRmdRC-9HSJscX5QotBUgpeFeIeuAmo44tcjSEiAPo/s/2950175210/br/223769541180-l "Read about this article")

---
## Marion County Students Work to Prevent Violence
Last week, I had the privilege to meet with local high school students engaged in the Marion County Youth Violence Prevention Fellowship program. The vision and energy of young leaders in the face of our community's challenges continues to inspire me as an educator and as your Senator.
If you or your organization would like to meet, I welcome you to contact my office below:
[Contact Sen. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Baby dolphins and baby sea turtles are being killed by plastics while you’re reading this
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914203?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Help STOP rampant plastic pollution that’s decimating our oceans and our planet!**[**Add your name now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914204?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) As you're reading this email, a **helpless dolphin** could be mistaking plastic waste for food like squid, causing a severe blockage in its fragile digestive system and _**KILLING THEM.**_ At this very moment, a **baby sea turtle** could be thinking a piece of plastic is food like jellyfish, getting stuck in its tiny throat and _**CHOKING TO DEATH.**_ More than _100,000 whales, dolphins, seals, and turtles_ are caught in an estimated _**640,000 tons**_ of discarded fishing gear and plastic annually. Innocent animals are becoming entangled and suffocated by the rampant plastic debris that’s consuming our oceans, and **OVER A MILLION** marine animals are _**KILLED BY PLASTIC**_ every year. We cannot let greedy Big Plastic continue threatening our precious oceans and harming the beloved wildlife who call it home. _**Please, Friend, our oceans need your voice to call for immediate federal action on the plastic crisis before more marine animals DIE.**_ [**Will you step up today and help save helpless dolphins and sea turtles from the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914205?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914206?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It only takes **ONE single piece** of plastic to _**KILL**_ a sea turtle. The odds aren’t looking good for these beloved sea creatures given that an _**entire garbage truck’s load**_ of plastic is currently dumped into the ocean _**every MINUTE.**_
Meanwhile, _25% of the world’s dolphin species_ are listed as **SEVERELY THREATENED** and at high risk of __**EXTINCTION.**__ One study found that plastic pollution like fishing gear is the NUMBER ONE threat to marine animals — **KILLING more than 300,000 dolphins** , porpoises and small whales every year, _not to mention numerous other species!_
Big Plastic and their friends at Big Oil aren’t just threatening marine life either, Friend. Plastic production at their gigantic factories spews out large amounts of **toxic pollutants and global-warming emissions into our atmosphere** , disproportionately leaving nearby low-wealth and BIPOC communities to bear the brunt of the **serious health risks.**
Greedy plastic corporations have wreaked havoc on our Earth for far too long, Friend. _**Don’t you think it’s time that we hold Big Plastic and Big Oil accountable for threatening our oceans, people, and planet — all for the sake of profit?**_ If you agree, then we’re asking you to step up right now and sign our petition by **11:59 P.M. TONIGHT.** We still need _3,011 more activist signers_ if we’re going to make an impact. [**ADD YOUR NAME: Tell President Biden to take federal action to STOP plastic pollution while there’s still time to curb this environmental crisis! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914207?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1914206?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Your voice is critical to ending plastic pollution.
Marcie Keever
Oceans & Vessels Program Director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

Hi Peter, we won’t take up too much of your Friday.

**We had to reach out because, thanks to your generosity and grassroots support, we were able to reach our July fundraising goal.**

This is what the off-year is all about Peter – building our resources, expanding our grassroots efforts, and coming together as a team to meet every challenge head-on. _When folks like you step up to help us reach our goals, you ensure that our team will be ready to win come November 2024._

We can’t thank you enough for your support.

— Team Emilia

---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

subject: Do me a favor and help my friend Bob?

body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!

| Hey Peter, I’ve got some biiiig news. **🚨 ****My pal and senior Senator Bob Casey is *officially* running for re-election! ****🚨**
---
| [Donate to Re-elect Bob Casey » ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67605014/420233659/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230804-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MTY1YjRmLTBiMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JH_5YrS9A0qAc2wASAgnGwPp2SyQ2cL39bRDOBZDhOI=)

If you saw us on the campaign trail in 2022, then you probably saw Bob Casey too. NO ONE knows PA like Bob Casey, and no one stands up for PA’s families like him, either.

He’s spent his LIFE fighting the ultra-wealthy and special interests that threaten PA’s hardworking people — and that’s *exactly* why we need to send him back to DC to keep fighting for us.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67605015/420233660/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230804-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MTY1YjRmLTBiMzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JH_5YrS9A0qAc2wASAgnGwPp2SyQ2cL39bRDOBZDhOI=)
