Fellow conservative,

The media may not be covering it, Washington insiders may not be talking about it, **but our border is still as insecure as it has ever been,_and we have to fix it!_**

**My family and I came to this country from Colombia when I was 5 years old in search of the American Dream. It was one of the greatest days and honors of my life to be sworn in as a U.S. citizen.**

Watching millions break our laws and cross our wide-open borders illegally is **extraordinarily offensive** to someone like me who came here legally, followed the process, and waited 13 years to become a citizen.

_Becoming an American should be an honor!_

So, when I see people just walking across our border and being rewarded for breaking our laws, **it’s a kick in the gut.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b06cc6e553304647b3651809a431fee8&_e=LTRxm-Ll6CZK-wDPBzQyH-Rls_6DaE6gv31H6AsTyZO4-DB1x4AGJgXoosA4OKgMiIYlGIRrC_AIf5Cj6RDpUOokEopE95w0TtV9SUrYxemoJZfkEPyWbI4bTmys8ESlW6BCFOEmUOuyZjMtEKamxLvZF5AZjJyrYBTuv_0iOlZnmn00Tk3fC2akOdmjYBuT6Q6Zf6lgHgdgxR2bSk7XR4XRTR_zCAbiULp9Klpc8E1jm-B2AEjHjiv5Ep9GEhGO5ZO7c4U9isSadOA7vF7j3GzlD4Ma32LEvfPV9bFdfLqgHDEorOvSkAn_bz4IoUB9MZehrzGGiW6gINrnm3l6MUSJtlJbbLK2PivfxQxWr-lFxsTq4N41Qvs5wcLQF4WX_lh0aCujv636K9wJyFFs7A%3D%3D)
If you cross our border illegally, your right for asylum should be forfeited. That shouldn’t be controversial.

As a proud American, I need your help to flip Ohio’s top-target, toss-up Senate seat and win back a Republican Senate majority so we can secure the border and enforce our laws.

[**If you agree with me, please stand with me by supporting my campaign with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or another amount today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b06cc6e553304647b3651809a431fee8&_e=LTRxm-Ll6CZK-wDPBzQyH-Rls_6DaE6gv31H6AsTyZO4-DB1x4AGJgXoosA4OKgMiIYlGIRrC_AIf5Cj6RDpUOokEopE95w0TtV9SUrYxemoJZfkEPyWbI4bTmys8ESlW6BCFOEmUOuyZjMtEKamxLvZF5AZjJyrYBTuv_0iOlZnmn00Tk3fC2akOdmjYBuT6Q6Zf6lgHgdgxR2bSk7XR4XRTR_zCAbiULp9Klpc8E1jm-B2AEjHjiv5Ep9GEhGO-bLQoSopkVJY9-BUMMoVxY9xMIyJFKgpGswPYwOka5xVYsqbPKKLBL5CfBmMKPXR7gtxC8C7yz1vaITo0WfywQKCkiY5Dz8t_9RXi_zeJ_0GSeoeyAIxKh5fYq5W_UFgc8dP7S3PDo5_kLVDTbAlRg%3D%3D)

For America,

Bernie Moreno
Republican for U.S. Senate

[ ** Stand with Bernie ➮ Secure the Border **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b06cc6e553304647b3651809a431fee8&_e=LTRxm-Ll6CZK-wDPBzQyH-Rls_6DaE6gv31H6AsTyZO4-DB1x4AGJgXoosA4OKgMiIYlGIRrC_AIf5Cj6RDpUOokEopE95w0TtV9SUrYxemoJZfkEPyWbI4bTmys8ESlW6BCFOEmUOuyZjMtEKamxLvZF5AZjJyrYBTuv_0iOlZnmn00Tk3fC2akOdmjYBuT6Q6Zf6lgHgdgxR2bSk7XR4XRTR_zCAbiULp9Klpc8E1jm-B2AEjHjiv5Ep9GEhGObOZuUupi3lYVLHi0eOMFtao6wRhdgsJzWk3oamr4NKoUrZ8x8z9gJuO5trid1SoZuFuaneW1Mw6Ht-WibgpUczcHyvjpvtKVxjo9iGE7LW8kR4yswNcj25nb-w0LbYNLopl7ffXK3CPXK3Q5Y9khNw%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Working Families Party
subject: WFP vs. the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
On Monday, the Philadelphia Working Families Party submitted a record-breaking 21,000 nomination signatures to get three candidates — Kendra Brooks, Nicolas O’Rourke, and Jarrett Smith — on the General Election ballot under the WFP line. | | | Peter,
**In one of the nation’s largest cities, voters have a choice this November between the Working Families Party and the GOP.** On Monday, the Philadelphia Working Families Party submitted over 21,000 nomination signatures to get three candidates — **Kendra Brooks, Nicolas O’Rourke, and Jarrett Smith** — on the General Election ballot under the WFP line. The eye-popping sum, which is _three times_ larger than the amount required by law, is a clear indicator that WFP is growing and gaining meaningful momentum amongst voters. It’s also a testament to what's possible when regular, working people come together behind a vision for a future that is uncompromisingly for the many, not just the privileged few. **If our Philadelphia Working Families Party candidates win all three seats, we’ll make history, Peter.**[**Can you chip in $21 or more to help us build real governing power and make the Working Families Party the second-largest party in Philadelphia?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nq-LNtKKwVwkMJ4mJG8E37AqSg4h8QlfqVvKBYyb2EXOzF8rwFNcr39q-2-5hvLK1_xEMANI6AmhXhTma6MRB_H0tzCb2OCXmTQKi9opxcovQZIjVUTHFT0L92MOCYR0BlWwv_omyfMcD4y7ArlrDRrzq07qVycjEQQxAlCjZztTgFxr77jARz1VsVEzMl_LOJ7DHqaXWbNAQ9x8rIkDqUPyiiiPJQAAD8LJv_tsEeU3evh7eWqaQDO8SkTsOq3C2RT8USxcqRmYfCNKc8ngproDqaHOwEdD3-x8W7Gq0XN0F5CDMVfAChrMU3mERP8PQEsdWNgQcDAsAY7XjK-hUR9g/3yg/K2KEzQb3R6Co3HoIokOHzg/h0/DBFVgTnJahONy_Jh4GvYE8ZbesiKuJvPVnpVzdQRk5s) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nq-LNtKKwVwkMJ4mJG8E37AqSg4h8QlfqVvKBYyb2EXOzF8rwFNcr39q-2-5hvLK1_v1weTkrUUtzFEDqs-kiDyEsGPRB4pLOpJLtWMrxW8g14n-h9TfGwubf7PR-lICu51dlZqe5U5cw6O8Z9OQdCPAD0d3-tn4EfpRu6tUYQE_wBozwu90q0VvBSCgj1wX1H5YecEmnP3vjwVqK-r0XS1muwu6dBMf1PEyr8gt4LFId-E4Efl0EXAR-Ix_jn47eGdmwTpryFSUfS9KhhRRzhcGYkkrrdN7JRdWux1SCoPX4F8xtWPq9xxPCEirD772VRvKoPVOY3Dw9VihvALU_u5g/3yg/K2KEzQb3R6Co3HoIokOHzg/h1/if94ZACuKbpi7_9nMGC8Bjna9jNlHhpgu5FDlKz5YFY) **[Contribute $21 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nq-LNtKKwVwkMJ4mJG8E37AqSg4h8QlfqVvKBYyb2EXOzF8rwFNcr39q-2-5hvLK1_NuGpwG0Aa4ZQ1-BAdVfKpb3o9StxSrslHV76cB7jUostGhFADWrvvawWbmCvAjU4s2o055iEpIbPc1bHviKDZIJOvepbGnJvdW_TpX2HSlRCYR26uV7Jd6vVjyAnLk_muFPiORrqVN8nkB40QlQ8pdm_xEdhMR5LgIyPMpl01PJsvytndwlTCCYuBb5beYlMwTQO85yXXg-XZfOEXoRb4YJqn_85gwbexWgH-DskmmcalyRc9L2EiP2HHI8sip-eq6SEY7WBSkGbsbNNFQpbUw/3yg/K2KEzQb3R6Co3HoIokOHzg/h2/zXPPJtO1_T4tetUGm6e-h7l9Oq1wRhBx_Fh1dO7NM-E)** In Philadelphia, one seat in the Office of the City Commissioners and two at-large seats in the City Council are reserved for a minority party — which has historically been the Republican Party. That is, until we shocked the political establishment in 2019 by electing Kendra Brooks to one of those two seats on the Working Families Party ballot line. For decades, Philadelphia Republicans have used their seats in City Hall to block progress on the issues that matter most to working families. **In the City Council,** they’ve voted on everything from siphoning public money out of public schools to giving big developers tax breaks while workers and families are left at the mercy of the housing crisis. **And in the Office of the City Commissioners,** with Republican lawmakers in Harrisburg mounting attacks on voting rights and thwarting efforts to end gerrymandering — they’ve lost any and all legitimacy as election overseers anywhere. If our Working Families Party candidates win their races against their Republican opponents, they would effectively end GOP governing power in Philadelphia’s City Hall, making the Working Families Party the new dominant minority party in Philadelphia. And with a Working Families Party minority in the city council and commissioner’s office — **we can push Philadelphia in a more progressive direction and deliver on priorities for working families.** But in order to do this and more, we need to pool our resources together to cover the costs of canvassing, texting, phonebanking, and all of the organizing that’s needed to reach voters across Philadelphia between now and November, and win this election. clean_body: On Monday, the Philadelphia Working Families Party submitted a record-breaking 21,000 nomination signatures to get three candidates — Kendra Brooks, Nicolas O’Rourke, and Jarrett Smith — on the General Election ballot under the WFP line. | | | Peter, In one of the nation’s largest cities, voters have a choice this November between the Working Families Party and the GOP. On Monday, the Philadelphia Working Families Party submitted over 21,000 nomination signatures to get three candidates — Kendra Brooks, Nicolas O’Rourke, and Jarrett Smith — on the General Election ballot under the WFP line. The eye-popping sum, which is three times larger than the amount required by law, is a clear indicator that WFP is growing and gaining meaningful momentum amongst voters. It’s also a testament to what's possible when regular, working people come together behind a vision for a future that is uncompromisingly for the many, not just the privileged few. If our Philadelphia Working Families Party candidates win all three seats, we’ll make history, Peter. In Philadelphia, one seat in the Office of the City Commissioners and two at-large seats in the City Council are reserved for a minority party — which has historically been the Republican Party. That is, until we shocked the political establishment in 2019 by electing Kendra Brooks to one of those two seats on the Working Families Party ballot line. For decades, Philadelphia Republicans have used their seats in City Hall to block progress on the issues that matter most to working families. In the City Council, they’ve voted on everything from siphoning public money out of public schools to giving big developers tax breaks while workers and families are left at the mercy of the housing crisis. And in the Office of the City Commissioners, with Republican lawmakers in Harrisburg mounting attacks on voting rights and thwarting efforts to end gerrymandering — they’ve lost any and all legitimacy as election overseers anywhere. If our Working Families Party candidates win their races against their Republican opponents, they would effectively end GOP governing power in Philadelphia’s City Hall, making the Working Families Party the new dominant minority party in Philadelphia. And with a Working Families Party minority in the city council and commissioner’s office — we can push Philadelphia in a more progressive direction and deliver on priorities for working families. But in order to do this and more, we need to pool our resources together to cover the costs of canvassing, texting, phonebanking, and all of the organizing that’s needed to reach voters across Philadelphia between now and November, and win this election. None of us can fund this movement alone, but together we can raise a lot. When you give today, you’re helping us build our vision for a government that has working people’s backs. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Last month, Arizona’s congressional delegation introduced the _Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni Grand Canyon National Monument Act_ to the Senate and the House with the overwhelming support from community members, local officials, conservation advocates, and tribal leaders and members of Arizona’s Indigenous peoples, who have long been on the frontlines of the effort to protect this land. **[It’s up to us to preserve the beauty of our land for future generations. Will you sign on today in support of designating the land around the Grand Canyon as a national monument?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605213/420234415/1013041310?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230804_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhlNjQ4YTItMGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q6XTNRIC0g6UvFOVuXk2tBtVK6GA5woZ-k5hGRSW6BI=&emci=fab5259c-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=78e648a2-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605214/420234416/1013041310?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230804_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhlNjQ4YTItMGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q6XTNRIC0g6UvFOVuXk2tBtVK6GA5woZ-k5hGRSW6BI=&emci=fab5259c-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=78e648a2-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)

The Grand Canyon is our state’s most notable landform, and tourists to the national park contributed over 700 million dollars to the local economy in 2021. 11 Associated Tribes call the 1,069,970 acres of land in and around the Canyon home. This vital legislation would make permanent the 20 year mining moratorium that is currently in place to protect the sacred and ancestral lands around the Grand Canyon.
**[We have to safeguard Arizona’s natural wonders from the threats of mining, contamination, and destruction. Will you sign on today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605215/420234418/1013041310?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230804_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhlNjQ4YTItMGMzMy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q6XTNRIC0g6UvFOVuXk2tBtVK6GA5woZ-k5hGRSW6BI=&emci=fab5259c-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=78e648a2-0c33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: That's a Crazy Coincidence!
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aeuljy-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! The transcript of Hunter Biden's business associate [_Devon Archer 's congressional testimony_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-y/) was released. **
**His Pants Are on Fire** **[Washington Post fact-checker Glenn Kessler slapped Biden with"Four Pinocchios"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-j/) **over his false claim that his son Hunter never made money from China. **Advocating for Violence** The Missouri Democrat Party used its official Twitter account**[to openly call for someone to burn down a Trump supporter's house.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-t/)** **Not Guilty** Former President Donald**[Trump pled 'not guilty' in federal court](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-i/) t**o all four federal charges stemming from the investigation into 2020 election interference. This is a **[crazy coincidence](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-d/),** right? **Biden Pulls Troops From the Border** A DOD representative has confirmed that it will withdraw 1,100 active-duty troops deployed to the U.S.-Mexico border earlier this year-- approved by Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin.

**Get Your Popcorn Ready** **[Ron DeSantis has agreed to a debate](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-h/)** with California Governor Gavin Newsom that will be moderated by Sean Hannity. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-k/)!**
* **[Holy.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-u/)**
* **[_Me too_.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-p/)**
* Hunter's**[Dog](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-x/).**
* [**Look!**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-m/)

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-c/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-a/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aeuljy-trhiujldw-f/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

body:
Before we start off another month of fundraising, I want to get a quick word in.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605757/420236462/919917611?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230804-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmMzNzE5Ny0wZjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kya245s6VwF3Ie7fytyn-gHYosaFMNLj2lrL0ArIahA=)
---
| Peter,

Before we start off another month of fundraising, I want to get a quick word in.

Fundraising is a decisive indicator of the strength of a campaign. As we approach another election year, it’s important we build AND sustain strong momentum.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, I have my sights set on empowering, supporting, and electing progressive Latinos up and down the ballot in 2024.

Peter, I’d like you to view my campaign as an avenue to hitting this milestone.

At a time when Republicans are hellbent on setting us back decades by rolling back equal access to the ballot, reproductive justice, and LGBTQ+ rights, ensuring a body of government that represents all of us must be our first priority.

to passing a basic code of ethics for Supreme Court justices

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605812/420236745/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDViMTkyNS0xMDMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJKFmqG0Ypcl8srth-zl2obL61VxvqfeYGQOqfvhHSI=&emci=ba6dfb15-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ed5b1925-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | We have good news, Derek. Senator Warner’s bill – the _SCERT Act_ – which he sponsored to make sure that Supreme Court justices are held to a clear set of ethical standards, has made it through the Judiciary Committee and is now one step closer to becoming law. This is huge. After a summer chock-full of disturbing reports of our justices’ undisclosed rendezvous with millionaire right-wing donors with business before the Court, it’s fair to say ethics reform is overdue. That’s why we’re writing to you today. _****[If you’re tired of seeing Supreme Court justices blatantly disregard the American people and never be held accountable for their unethical behavior, sign our petition right now to call on Congress to pass Mark’s SCERT Act>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605813/420236746/-312236130?refcode=mw_em_230804_1_a&ms=mw_em_230804_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDViMTkyNS0xMDMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJKFmqG0Ypcl8srth-zl2obL61VxvqfeYGQOqfvhHSI=&emci=ba6dfb15-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ed5b1925-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****_ The Supreme Court should be serving the American people, not whichever conservative donors take them on the fanciest vacations. But with no sort of ethics code at the Court whatsoever, it’s no surprise our justices are handing down decisions that reflect the will of the right-wing billionaires who spend the most money on them. Mark’s bill will change all that and finally give the American people what they deserve: Accountability and transparency from the most powerful court in our country. _****[Add your name today to tell Congress you’re ready for an ethics overhaul at the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605814/420236747/-312236130?refcode=mw_em_230804_1_a&ms=mw_em_230804_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDViMTkyNS0xMDMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJKFmqG0Ypcl8srth-zl2obL61VxvqfeYGQOqfvhHSI=&emci=ba6dfb15-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ed5b1925-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****_ Thank you, Team Warner ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67605815/420236748/-312236130?refcode=mw_em_230804_1_a&ms=mw_em_230804_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDViMTkyNS0xMDMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJKFmqG0Ypcl8srth-zl2obL61VxvqfeYGQOqfvhHSI=&emci=ba6dfb15-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ed5b1925-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)******

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We'll be real with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If you get emails from any other campaigns or political groups, we know that sometimes they can make deadlines feel like the sky is falling.
#
Hi Derek,
If you get emails from any other campaigns or political groups, we know that sometimes they can make it sound like the sky is falling when they ask you to take action or make a donation. We know, because we get them too. They’re basically like:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230804-1?refcode=em20230804-1-8493&refcode2=8493_434096_O3-B48&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)
**Here on Team Fetterman, we don’t want to do that.** So we’ll be real with you: Grassroots online fundraising is the main way we run this campaign, so that’s why we’re reaching out. No dirty corporate PAC money here -- just thousands of folks chipping in to power John’s work and defend our narrow Democratic majority in the Senate.
**[Can you show your support + help us stay on track to our fundraising goals by making your first donation to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230804-1?refcode=em20230804-1-8493&refcode2=8493_434096_O3-B48&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230804-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230804-8493&refcode2=8493_434096_O3-B48&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)**
From Day One, our team has been united by the belief that together we can accomplish more than any one of us can alone. That’s how we flipped PA blue 🔵 and it’s how we’ll keep up this movement: People power. 💪
**[So if you can chip in anything at all to help support John’s work in the Senate, we’d be extremely grateful.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230804-1?refcode=em20230804-1-8493&refcode2=8493_434096_O3-B48&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)**
Thanks for being on our team, Derek. 💛💛💛
Together,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230804-8493-footer&t=1&refcode2=8493_434096_O3-B48&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8493%2E434096%2EO3-B48)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Standing with our allies

| | Our allies need us, my friend. Vladimir Putin's war on Ukraine has become a contentious topic among Americans. But Will Hurd believes we need to continue to stay focused on this conflict. _**Why? **_**→** Because they have the potential to impact our economy, our security, and our future.
---
---
Will has made it clear – _**Russia's invasion of Ukraine is wrong and America has to stand strong next to its ally. **_ The consequences of allowing Russia to invade without resistance and failure to support Ukraine are far-reaching. Since the invasion, the US saw a 45% decrease in exports to Ukraine and a 27% decrease in imports. Our sanctions on Russia have helped slow down their war machine, but the Biden administration's energy policies have increased our dependence on foreign dictators for oil and gas and have driven up energy prices. **America must stand by our allies and give them the support they need.** [_**Donate $1 to get common sense on this complicated issue on the national debate stage.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=5c36f060e78d4c0397892ee0f653097f&_e=QKwnrq6aPbIvWu_Y2RAHbm-bbQiTOOh-jwLTQw_VAZbqhD6Tw37Cmffru-TpO6rax6OSsGNIuPzwqH5XDg3RvqZ1far4MiQEz0UNNX4HX_eFdJ0cPkD9muTeKYcN_nMUJtBnDdAsaXF_DxuoAlJeBiLzA3kpfONC8nTD6PRKHmC08OgmPGPWj2nv0UL6aNPAmZ2zNrN_94aeyWnSjjyobJ8Nk1jHxSC45V5w_2uh2b0gk__Z_BnMi2HnfDyzFMJ_Vnh2i5HLoLryQJrSBlizDi2DKH2xQGj7EXS3583P6vK8h35P1tuxNMFHCB8kybTGLamwL9F85CmeO-PQUcvoTD1DmFCBtW8CyPz86Alz-HbDKkv_4onKeXxH2mpg9Gjd) Thank you,**Hurd for America**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Protecting America's economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=15070be4c97c40f2939a7cb5425c2a82&_e=amDOXsYBTxHBGPYbcu3cyUCsCN1O9V9plz2YHLn6x4CSxQxjodjX15htXEF1hDky7fnyyO2yYPXoZlbNdsqo2NYiQVL9jmeFdN01Qk-dxQx2XwDeiXfmnU6AjHhSp_noYJwuSWFi_Dh9tF4Qr3gyv29ecmx8LZkU3vG4nWQ5O0k5oiAsvc7nrPOo0VKfsf4f2VqfM_o19HqulpYDqho1-_UMd9HnlNTobl0dpLwsQzDBWc9c0u_CNZWKqUZALKDH)
---
Fellow Minnesotan, It's one thing to talk about supporting rural Minnesota's economy and small businesses. _**It's another to explain why it matters so much.**_ **More than 99% of all businesses in the U.S. are small businesses, and nearly half of American employees work for a small business.** When Republicans say **"We're fighting to protect small businesses from burdensome Democrat taxes and red tape,"** it's more than a campaign slogan... _**[it's about protecting America's economy!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=15070be4c97c40f2939a7cb5425c2a82&_e=amDOXsYBTxHBGPYbcu3cyUCsCN1O9V9plz2YHLn6x4CSxQxjodjX15htXEF1hDky7fnyyO2yYPXoZlbNdsqo2NYiQVL9jmeFdN01Qk-dxQxMLiA9xWoHblBIdL_e00SytGhNg6ClMY-_Stbh5Ijfinf5QK_ruI1ZMm0Ty-i4CTF8qUqZwkhTyuv06AlYLhIioUVcNCwVK2v_cbytC6UqmkF69NenH9H1BHtcfa6KX4lYwwgKNYYUrfZR8RUL_rh2)**_ As a fourth-generation farmer, I know how challenging it can be to manage a small business. It's even more challenging when bureaucrats and politicians in D.C. are working overtime to make your job harder! **[I'm on a mission to support small businesses in Minnesota and our country.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=15070be4c97c40f2939a7cb5425c2a82&_e=amDOXsYBTxHBGPYbcu3cyUCsCN1O9V9plz2YHLn6x4CSxQxjodjX15htXEF1hDky7fnyyO2yYPXoZlbNdsqo2NYiQVL9jmeFdN01Qk-dxQyNdxDn2ERI4p0FkVM1mpEhfJttn5DDyd24JuZi5Q1MPvZ2NUCPbJ4UmzRSE4RiSURQBIeQ_2Kr6DguUQ9JskUK-AOyyLjjQ3kUdl4R05in460bs4M8cfetruQI1g_X0yygs-OuKzDSwUgeDp-t0BDj)** **[Will you make a donation today to help me get our economy back on track and fight for small businesses?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=15070be4c97c40f2939a7cb5425c2a82&_e=amDOXsYBTxHBGPYbcu3cyUCsCN1O9V9plz2YHLn6x4CSxQxjodjX15htXEF1hDky7fnyyO2yYPXoZlbNdsqo2NYiQVL9jmeFdN01Qk-dxQwe5ELq1mWvB_pqXDETkvrg4SBp1tAJnYkf78KW7O3fmRMAAZDf3yY7eXgBunoYbe_FbHoonNfBbOwFUO6yEedKKZfdUo3f3Fe0X9XmGDE5Veyxpde8oSZPDhdyCJHoT2hYj2cCUHQJh2qAiXFxD_gN)**

body:
It’s a very sad day for America.

It’s a very sad day for America.
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0662d6fed6f746b7acd2c99a53380944&_e=EvHEsKtLaSBb5grWQjqNsUtMkfxmhciPfoth0UzJJynRsPm-bKXUqo3I0wwYfWQtELGqipk1FqQeWaIOxrT_3JjBdsYqqKWqwrrGvdvih0dUIN1N4CUpJGfM03Z_5ki7O30X0Vv8H95ETVnx872hJJBwcFeTu5410fXcFLAgAG_mHyX8vQarAoMLkuYvkR025jJUv39fPa1pYT62DkYQBNd1ctVepKd-AojpvIKR87MmrnFNJMiDtzd4m-BeoHjLoSZbeYWcYsfgoxL050PIk8Vgtjnw1uNlIjWwifSh0LJvBcoCMUcMg9OApjI721cJtrUoOG3hsJ_NQ3DbfBs_-RtazjVqhokz6P8aLa6_x4DgvM2dAIUyG2vWpWJJKbASD05Z1w9mrD5RwhsHyzXQGzaiGYKPcleZGM4c0fxoz9aonP3L_eg7pbenx9as51M7)

Friend,
On my drive back from the federal courthouse - where I was processed, read my rights, and heard that I could spend the rest of my life in prison as an innocent man - I thought that this was truly a sad day for America.
As I drove back in the motorcade through Washington, DC, I saw the filth and the decay and all of the broken buildings and walls of graffiti.
_This is not the place that I left behind._
**But it 's emblematic of the vile corruption that has taken hold of our nation's capital. **
This is a persecution of a political opponent who happens to be leading by very, very substantial numbers in the Republican Primary and leading Biden by a lot.
So, Crooked Joe has decided that if he can't beat me, he's going to prosecute me.
As the rain poured down over us on this dark and gloomy day in the Washington Swamp, my last words to the dishonest press before I boarded Trump Force One were that this should NEVER be allowed to happen in America.
Friend, while a dark cloud hangs over our nation, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Sign ON to support actors and screenwriters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67606386/420238704/-217607130?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230804_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTlkN2FkMC0xMjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ushH9wwr4ONSe7AlymfnFoEmDLs0P0OcS2sXKu7pC4=&emci=ddbca46c-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f99d7ad0-1233-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
For the first time in 60 years, both the Screen Actors Guild (SAG-AFTRA) and the Writers Guild of America (WGA) are on strike for higher wages and a rethinking of diminishing residuals due to the rise of streaming services.
The Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP) , which represents major studios and streaming services such as Amazon, Apple, Disney, Netflix, and Paramount, has been unwilling to increase the modest pay of the 160,000 striking actors and writers.
The US Bureau of Labor Statistics reports the average pay for California actors is [$27.73 per hour](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67606387/420238707/795825708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTlkN2FkMC0xMjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ushH9wwr4ONSe7AlymfnFoEmDLs0P0OcS2sXKu7pC4=&emci=ddbca46c-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f99d7ad0-1233-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867#\(4\)), and residuals in some cases amount to pennies, _literally_.
**This is a fight for the heart and soul of the entertainment industry and against the exploitation of labor.**
**[Join us and sign the petition demanding that the AMPTP compensate and respect the artists who bring our stories to life! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67606388/420238709/-217607130?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230804_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTlkN2FkMC0xMjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ushH9wwr4ONSe7AlymfnFoEmDLs0P0OcS2sXKu7pC4=&emci=ddbca46c-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f99d7ad0-1233-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
Disney CEO Bob Iger, who collects around $31 million a year, said striking actors’ and writers’ demands are “just not realistic.” Netflix co-CEOs, who expressed deep disappointment with the union’s decision to strike, make between $28 million and $50 million a year.
Well known actors might be paid millions of dollars, but most members of SAG-AFTRA don’t make enough money to even meet the minimum requirement for health insurance ($26,470 a year). In fact only 12.7 percent of members qualify for the union’s health plan.
**The majority of workers in Hollywood are working people struggling to pay their rent, put food on the table, and get their kids off to school. **
[**Add your name to the petition to support striking writers and actors and demand that they be paid a fair wage!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67606389/420238710/-217607130?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230804_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTlkN2FkMC0xMjMzLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ushH9wwr4ONSe7AlymfnFoEmDLs0P0OcS2sXKu7pC4=&emci=ddbca46c-1033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f99d7ad0-1233-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)

clean_body: For the first time in 60 years, both the Screen Actors Guild (SAG-AFTRA) and the Writers Guild of America (WGA) are on strike for higher wages and a rethinking of diminishing residuals due to the rise of streaming services. The Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP) , which represents major studios and streaming services such as Amazon, Apple, Disney, Netflix, and Paramount, has been unwilling to increase the modest pay of the 160,000 striking actors and writers. The US Bureau of Labor Statistics reports the average pay for California actors is #\(4\), and residuals in some cases amount to pennies, literally. This is a fight for the heart and soul of the entertainment industry and against the exploitation of labor. Disney CEO Bob Iger, who collects around $31 million a year, said striking actors’ and writers’ demands are “just not realistic.” Netflix co-CEOs, who expressed deep disappointment with the union’s decision to strike, make between $28 million and $50 million a year. Well known actors might be paid millions of dollars, but most members of SAG-AFTRA don’t make enough money to even meet the minimum requirement for health insurance ($26,470 a year). In fact only 12.7 percent of members qualify for the union’s health plan. The majority of workers in Hollywood are working people struggling to pay their rent, put food on the table, and get their kids off to school. name: Voting Rights Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: Good news and bad news from Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Here’s what you need to know about competing elections bills >>
|
---

We have good news and bad news, team –

**The good news** is that Democrats in Congress have introduced The Freedom to Vote Act, which Attorney General Eric Holder called “an absolutely necessary piece of legislation to safeguard our democracy.”

**But the bad news** is that MAGA extremists have introduced competing legislation – and if their plan passed, it would undermine our elections across the country. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67606647/420239797/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230804_FR_8B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMTIxMzU4LTE0MzMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=04XOrygk1r5L5lUSaxYzsteNavBn0FGhcwpbfaY4eDI=)

**Team, MAGA extremists are engaging in an unprecedented effort to undermine free and fair elections. But by standing up to extremists by taking critical pro-democracy steps like passing the Freedom to Vote Act, our country can live up to the American ideal of a government by the people, for the people.**
[**_The NDRC is working across the country to defend our democracy from those who seek to weaken it. name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Fwd: 4 Things in Shelby County Republican Election News - Friday, August 4th, 2023
body:
> Shelby County Patriots,
>
>
> I have four important things to cover tonight.
>
>
> 1\. We need poll workers. For whatever reason, the Board of Elections has lost a lot of workers and they need replacements ASAP. A huge part of election integrity is to ensure Republicans are well represented on each bi-partisan team on election day. We’re currently 5 Republicans and 6 Democrats (or unaffiliated) short. Please consider serving, or recruiting someone to serve, on election day.
>
>
> If you are able, please call Deputy Director Drew Higgins at (937)498-7209. He is working from 7:30am-5pm tomorrow (Saturday), from noon until 6pm on Sunday, and all day on Monday. If he doesn’t answer, just leave a message and he will return your call as soon as possible.
>
>
> 2\. The “majority rule” mantra has way too many conservatives fooled. There is a place for “majority rule” in local politics, but it breaks down if you try to run a state or a nation that way. Our Founding Fathers worked hard to protect us from that. Please watch this video for an explanation of why “majority rule” is bad in statewide and nationwide contests. Spoiler alert: “majority rule” is exactly what liberal progressives are striving for and what our founding fathers protected us against. Video: [https://player.vimeo.com/video/851255657?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479](https://player.vimeo.com/video/851255657?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479)
>
>
> 3\. Early voting has been robust here in the county and across the state. The ORP said the latest polling had us ahead by 2 percentage points, but that is a race that is too close to call. We need every vote we can get, especially in our rural, conservative counties. Here is a breakdown of voting so far in Shelby County:
>
>
>
>
> Democrats are way outpacing us in the early voting, which isn’t a surprise, but should serve as a warning that we need every conservative voter to get to the polls in these last few early voting days, or on election day. We’ve had way more Republican voters than Democrat voters, but not “enough” more. Rs outnumber Ds 5 to 1 in Shelby County, but we’ve only outvoted them less than 3 to 1 so far. Rural counties like ours must crush the Democrat turnout if we stand a chance of winning this against the urban areas in Ohio.
>
>
> Notice that the Non-Partisan voters are almost completely disengaged in the fight so far. Just over a 2% turnout compared to Rs at 17.5% and Ds at 33.7%. Anything you can do to drive up conservative turnout would be greatly appreciated. Our state is depending on us rural counties to save it from the urban liberal progressives.
>
>
> 4\. Fourth, and most important, please join us this Sunday evening for a brief time of prayer at Tawawa Park. Flyer attached!
>
>
> Soli Deo Gloria...Dan
> (937) 206-2970
> [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
>
>

Please consider serving, or recruiting someone to serve, on election day. If you are able, please call Deputy Director Drew Higgins at (937)498-7209. Early voting has been robust here in the county and across the state. The ORP said the latest polling had us ahead by 2 percentage points, but that is a race that is too close to call. We’ve had way more Republican voters than Democrat voters, but not “enough” more. Rs outnumber Ds 5 to 1 in Shelby County, but we’ve only outvoted them less than 3 to 1 so far. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: #Breaking: ENDORSED! by Congressman Tom McClintock
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/endorsed-by-congressman-tom-mcclintock?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=37d0656695&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
Friend,

_**I'm proud to announce the endorsement of taxpayer protection hero and Central Valley Congressman Tom McClintock.**_ Congressman McClintock's service to California and our nation is tremendous, and he has long been one of the strongest advocates for California taxpayers and families.

Congressman McClintock wrote, "Navy Veteran and Central Valley business leader Michael Maher has my wholehearted endorsement for Congress. Michael is a constitutional conservative who will fight for farmers, working families, and local governance. We need Michael's military and national security experience in the House as we face increased threats from abroad and at our unsecured southern border."

I am thankful and appreciative of his support for our campaign. It's a great way to kick off August!

Can you help me keep this momentum going and support our campaign in the following ways?
---
| **1.** [Contribute to Team Maher for Congress](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=709845977f&e=1722d05e10) and help us run the robust campaign we will need to defeat my opponent.

---
| [DONATE](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=fcf51c99e4&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE")
---
| **2.** Get the word out in your neighborhood about our campaign.

**3.** Forward this email to 3 friends or family members to let them know about this race and its importance for our country’s future.

We are just 14 months away from ballots mailing out for the 2024 Election. Getting started now is critical to winning this seat.

Thank you, as always, for your continued support. I'm grateful for the endorsements of Congressman Tom McClintock, State Senator Shannon Grove, former Congresswoman Connie Conway, and so many others.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
| [JOIN THE TEAM](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=2b2bfd7e83&e=1722d05e10 "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
|
_**P.S.**_ It doesn't take much. Committing to a recurring donation of $5 a week through the Election will be a HUGE boost to our campaign. Click [HERE](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=a2665a25b4&e=1722d05e10) to be part of $5 Fridays!
---
| [CHIP IN $5](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=158c26cfb8&e=1722d05e10 "CHIP IN $5")
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help us fight for democracy | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** Former First Lady Michelle Obama sounded the alarm on the fight to save democracy. For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done.
**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 21 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**

clean_body: We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help us fight for democracy | | | | | FIRST: Former First Lady Michelle Obama sounded the alarm on the fight to save democracy. THEN: First Lady Jill Biden echoed her call to come together and defend democracy by expanding power in our state legislatures! BUT: Republicans all across the country are doing everything in their power to halt the expansion of democratic power, push their anti-democracy agenda in the states, and roll back all of our progress. SO NOW: We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help fight for democracy by electing state Democrats in places like yours and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done. It’s true: Just this year, we have won 21 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do. The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away. We're in this together, Team DLCC Photo of Jill Biden derivative of Adam Schultz for Biden For President | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2419d699495146a89cdbaa17082fe3bb&_t=SyVeGwsKIpww11VhtkhaZF0Oq77hW5Kqae_m--NE43T8oMZVQ8Ja36bWxRu0YnLxZIxmmp8AOyzyqXulC2wr__yWVEUQ_7kqm9PQu4f03x8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2419d699495146a89cdbaa17082fe3bb&_t=SyVeGwsKIpww11VhtkhaZF0Oq77hW5Kqae_m--NE43T8oMZVQ8Ja36bWxRu0YnLxZIxmmp8AOyzyqXulC2wr__yWVEUQ_7kqm9PQu4f03x8%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2419d699495146a89cdbaa17082fe3bb&_e=EHPDo2D_Y4IXkdK7QqI52TB4BspkLV3fBk_iiQTxkz1FC8ibQn3oym6nOhxpskxrX-597CUju4IRucX8t96HsmG1nXsHQWK3BBgSXMbRpKGpu9jvbJN28QIXPMl39URGb8ciiVWpr6MiWWau7qliYgCZ-_DdScUdxGZlaYTiZhZl1hyvFOIwMJHsHISDT-0pQP4DUzV-L_W_oZJGysSXLMu32JXNsw17l4xI0Gla4UdGO228_ZwvrXp5U8SrMLPJPDf1GzDjbBb2-9QxCpj9wuf3V-q5v-VSwnRxVDlU_LRLtHWz872LKNJ22JE9LAxEsmKWoOgYNtHbVdFVabiaLHwSnhr_gfhve3PfkBBFXaFwobs0Z_KAhJJW--tITccoBdLWArDYUicEiLkQTogdvg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. clean_body: We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | | Fellow Conservative, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster. Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 18 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory? We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate. If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. Thanks for your consideration, Sen. Marco Rubio United States Senator (R., FL) | | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Lateefah Simon HQ
subject: Our ethos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing with her all of our voices and our values.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)
We’re building this campaign on a foundation of grassroots support. [**Let us explain why your donation really matters:**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/231?t=2&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)
CA-12 deserves Lateefah’s voice – her drive, her passion – in Congress. And gifts from people like you, yes you, will help us send her there.
It’s clear that no one is more qualified than Lateefah Simon to uplift our voices and take our shared stories to Washington. Time and time again, Lateefah Simon has shown up to fight for us. In each and every season of her life, Lateefah Simon has dedicated herself to making sure people in power cannot ignore us.
The fight that Lateefah brings every day – her desire to deliver for Black, brown, disabled, and elderly folks – is the key ethos here in our campaign headquarters, too. And it’s why we rely on **grassroots** support for everything we do.
When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing **our voices** and **our values** – not corporate PAC money – with her.
[**So what do you say****: Will you chip in to power our efforts and help us work to elect Lateefah Simon?**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/231?t=3&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230804?amount=10&refcode=em20230804&refcode2=79_1163_Hj-CUq&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)**
We’re working day-in and day-out to power this movement with grassroots donations of $20, $100, or just $5 from folks like you who want to see Lateefah in Congress fighting for the people.
What they give – and what you (hopefully!) give today – might not seem like a lot compared to the checks a big corporate PAC can write, but hundreds and hundreds of people like you choosing to chip in what they can means we’re able to build a true progressive movement.
[**Lateefah is the best candidate for the job: a true representation of CA-12. We’re ready to make her our Representative on Election Day, and send her to Congress. To get us there, will you make a contribution to our campaign today?**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/231?t=4&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230804?amount=10&refcode=em20230804&refcode2=79_1163_Hj-CUq&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement folks. Grateful doesn’t even begin to cover it.
Together,
Lateefah Simon HQ
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230804&t=5&refcode2=79_1163_Hj-CUq&akid=79%2E1163%2EHj-CUq)**

PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
clean_body: When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing with her all of our voices and our values. We’re building this campaign on a foundation of grassroots support. CA-12 deserves Lateefah’s voice – her drive, her passion – in Congress. And gifts from people like you, yes you, will help us send her there. It’s clear that no one is more qualified than Lateefah Simon to uplift our voices and take our shared stories to Washington. Time and time again, Lateefah Simon has shown up to fight for us. In each and every season of her life, Lateefah Simon has dedicated herself to making sure people in power cannot ignore us. The fight that Lateefah brings every day – her desire to deliver for Black, brown, disabled, and elderly folks – is the key ethos here in our campaign headquarters, too. And it’s why we rely on grassroots support for everything we do. When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing our voices and our values – not corporate PAC money – with her. We’re working day-in and day-out to power this movement with grassroots donations of $20, $100, or just $5 from folks like you who want to see Lateefah in Congress fighting for the people. What they give – and what you (hopefully!) give today – might not seem like a lot compared to the checks a big corporate PAC can write, but hundreds and hundreds of people like you choosing to chip in what they can means we’re able to build a true progressive movement. Thank you for being a part of this movement folks. Grateful doesn’t even begin to cover it. Together, Lateefah Simon HQ
